authors_text: Mohaddeseh Bastan,Nishant Shankar,Mihai Surdeanu,Niranjan Balasubramanian
title: SuMe: A Dataset Towards Summarizing Biomedical Mechanisms
title_zh: SuMe：总结生物医学机制的数据集
abstract: Can language models read biomedical texts and explain the biomedical mechanisms discussed? In this work we introduce a biomedical mechanism summarization task. Biomedical studies often investigate the mechanisms behind how one entity (e.g., a protein or a chemical) affects another in a biological context. The abstracts of these publications often include a focused set of sentences that present relevant supporting statements regarding such relationships, associated experimental evidence, and a concluding sentence that summarizes the mechanism underlying the relationship. We leverage this structure and create a summarization task, where the input is a collection of sentences and the main entities in an abstract, and the output includes the relationship and a sentence that summarizes the mechanism. Using a small amount of manually labeled mechanism sentences, we train a mechanism sentence classifier to filter a large biomedical abstract collection and create a summarization dataset with 22k instances. We also introduce conclusion sentence generation as a pretraining task with 611k instances. We benchmark the performance of large bio-domain language models. We find that while the pretraining task help improves performance, the best model produces acceptable mechanism outputs in only 32% of the instances, which shows the task presents significant challenges in biomedical language understanding and summarization.
summary: Can language models read biomedical texts and explain the biomedical mechanisms discussed? In this work we introduce a biomedical mechanism summarization task. Biomedical studies often investigate the mechanisms behind how one entity (e.g., a protein or a chemical) affects another in a biological context. The abstracts of these publications often include a focused set of sentences that present relevant supporting statements regarding such relationships, associated experimental evidence, and a concluding sentence that summarizes the mechanism underlying the relationship. We leverage this structure and create a summarization task, where the input is a collection of sentences and the main entities in an abstract, and the output includes the relationship and a sentence that summarizes the mechanism. Using a small amount of manually labeled mechanism sentences, we train a mechanism sentence classifier to filter a large biomedical abstract collection and create a summarization dataset with 22k instances. We also introduce conclusion sentence generation as a pretraining task with 611k instances. We benchmark the performance of large bio-domain language models. We find that while the pretraining task help improves performance, the best model produces acceptable mechanism outputs in only 32% of the instances, which shows the task presents significant challenges in biomedical language understanding and summarization.
abstract_zh: 语言模型可以阅读生物医学文本并解释所讨论的生物医学机制吗？在这项工作中，我们引入了生物医学机制总结任务。生物医学研究经常调查一个实体（例如蛋白质或化学物质）如何在生物背景下影响另一个实体背后的机制。这些出版物的摘要通常包括一组重点句子，这些句子提出了有关此类关系的相关支持性陈述、相关实验证据以及总结该关系背后机制的结论句。我们利用这种结构并创建一个摘要任务，其中输入是句子的集合和摘要中的主要实体，输出包括关系和总结机制的句子。使用少量手动标记的机制句子，我们训练机制句子分类器来过滤大型生物医学摘要集合并创建具有 22k 个实例的摘要数据集。我们还引入了结论句生成作为具有 611k 个实例的预训练任务。我们对大型生物领域语言模型的性能进行基准测试。我们发现，虽然预训练任务有助于提高性能，但最佳模型仅在 32% 的实例中产生可接受的机制输出，这表明该任务在生物医学语言理解和总结方面提出了重大挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SuMe数据集，旨在通过总结生物医学机制中的实体关系及结论句，推动语言模型在生物医学领域的理解与摘要能力。
AI.motivation: 生物医学文献中常涉及复杂机制的描述，现有模型难以准确提取关键关系和总结机制，缺乏专门针对该任务的高质量数据集。
AI.method: 利用少量人工标注的机制句训练分类器，筛选大规模文献生成22k实例数据集；同时引入611k结论句生成任务作为预训练目标，评估生物领域大模型性能。
AI.result: 预训练任务提升模型表现，但最佳模型仅在32%的实例中生成可接受的机制摘要，凸显任务难度。
AI.conclusion: 生物医学机制摘要任务对语言模型提出挑战，需进一步改进领域理解与生成能力。

authors_text: Xiaochun Lei,Linjun Lu,Zetao Jiang,Zhaoting Gong,Chang Lu,Jiaming Liang
title: STDC-MA Network for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的 STDC-MA 网络
abstract: Semantic segmentation is applied extensively in autonomous driving and intelligent transportation with methods that highly demand spatial and semantic information. Here, an STDC-MA network is proposed to meet these demands. First, the STDC-Seg structure is employed in STDC-MA to ensure a lightweight and efficient structure. Subsequently, the feature alignment module (FAM) is applied to understand the offset between high-level and low-level features, solving the problem of pixel offset related to upsampling on the high-level feature map. Our approach implements the effective fusion between high-level features and low-level features. A hierarchical multiscale attention mechanism is adopted to reveal the relationship among attention regions from two different input sizes of one image. Through this relationship, regions receiving much attention are integrated into the segmentation results, thereby reducing the unfocused regions of the input image and improving the effective utilization of multiscale features. STDC- MA maintains the segmentation speed as an STDC-Seg network while improving the segmentation accuracy of small objects. STDC-MA was verified on the verification set of Cityscapes. The segmentation result of STDC-MA attained 76.81% mIOU with the input of 0.5x scale, 3.61% higher than STDC-Seg.
summary: Semantic segmentation is applied extensively in autonomous driving and intelligent transportation with methods that highly demand spatial and semantic information. Here, an STDC-MA network is proposed to meet these demands. First, the STDC-Seg structure is employed in STDC-MA to ensure a lightweight and efficient structure. Subsequently, the feature alignment module (FAM) is applied to understand the offset between high-level and low-level features, solving the problem of pixel offset related to upsampling on the high-level feature map. Our approach implements the effective fusion between high-level features and low-level features. A hierarchical multiscale attention mechanism is adopted to reveal the relationship among attention regions from two different input sizes of one image. Through this relationship, regions receiving much attention are integrated into the segmentation results, thereby reducing the unfocused regions of the input image and improving the effective utilization of multiscale features. STDC- MA maintains the segmentation speed as an STDC-Seg network while improving the segmentation accuracy of small objects. STDC-MA was verified on the verification set of Cityscapes. The segmentation result of STDC-MA attained 76.81% mIOU with the input of 0.5x scale, 3.61% higher than STDC-Seg.
abstract_zh: 语义分割广泛应用于自动驾驶和智能交通领域，其方法对空间和语义信息的要求很高。在这里，提出了 STDC-MA 网络来满足这些需求。首先，STDC-MA采用STDC-Seg结构，以确保结构的轻量化和高效性。随后，应用特征对齐模块（FAM）来了解高级特征和低级特征之间的偏移，解决与高级特征图上上采样相关的像素偏移问题。我们的方法实现了高层特征和低层特征之间的有效融合。采用分层多尺度注意机制来揭示一幅图像的两个不同输入尺寸的注意区域之间的关系。通过这种关系，将备受关注的区域整合到分割结果中，从而减少输入图像的未聚焦区域，提高多尺度特征的有效利用率。 STDC-MA 保持了 STDC-Seg 网络的分割速度，同时提高了小物体的分割精度。 STDC-MA在Cityscapes验证集上得到验证。在0.5倍尺度的输入下，STDC-MA的分割结果达到76.81% mIOU，比STDC-Seg高3.61%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STDC-MA网络以提升语义分割的精度与效率，特别针对自动驾驶场景中的小目标分割问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高分辨率特征图的上采样像素偏移及多尺度特征融合时存在不足，需提升小目标分割精度同时保持轻量化结构。
AI.method: 基于STDC-Seg框架，引入特征对齐模块（FAM）解决高低层特征偏移问题，并采用分层多尺度注意力机制强化多尺度特征关联性。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上，STDC-MA以0.5x输入规模达到76.81% mIOU，较STDC-Seg提升3.61%，且保持相同推理速度。
AI.conclusion: STDC-MA通过特征对齐与多尺度注意力机制有效提升分割精度，验证了其在复杂场景下的实用性与效率优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出STDC-MA网络以提升语义分割的精度与效率，特别针对自动驾驶场景中的小目标分割问题。

authors_text: Xiaochun Lei,Chang Lu,Zetao Jiang,Zhaoting Gong,Xiang Cai,Linjun Lu
title: Using Frequency Attention to Make Adversarial Patch Powerful Against Person Detector
title_zh: 使用频率注意力使对抗性补丁对人体检测器更强大
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. In particular, object detectors may be attacked by applying a particular adversarial patch to the image. However, because the patch shrinks during preprocessing, most existing approaches that employ adversarial patches to attack object detectors would diminish the attack success rate on small and medium targets. This paper proposes a Frequency Module(FRAN), a frequency-domain attention module for guiding patch generation. This is the first study to introduce frequency domain attention to optimize the attack capabilities of adversarial patches. Our method increases the attack success rates of small and medium targets by 4.18% and 3.89%, respectively, over the state-of-the-art attack method for fooling the human detector while assaulting YOLOv3 without reducing the attack success rate of big targets.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. In particular, object detectors may be attacked by applying a particular adversarial patch to the image. However, because the patch shrinks during preprocessing, most existing approaches that employ adversarial patches to attack object detectors would diminish the attack success rate on small and medium targets. This paper proposes a Frequency Module(FRAN), a frequency-domain attention module for guiding patch generation. This is the first study to introduce frequency domain attention to optimize the attack capabilities of adversarial patches. Our method increases the attack success rates of small and medium targets by 4.18% and 3.89%, respectively, over the state-of-the-art attack method for fooling the human detector while assaulting YOLOv3 without reducing the attack success rate of big targets.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到对抗性攻击。特别是，可以通过向图像应用特定的对抗性补丁来攻击对象检测器。然而，由于补丁在预处理过程中会缩小，大多数使用对抗性补丁来攻击目标检测器的现有方法都会降低对中小型目标的攻击成功率。本文提出了频率模块（FRAN），一种用于指导补丁生成的频域注意力模块。这是第一个引入频域注意力来优化对抗补丁攻击能力的研究。与攻击 YOLOv3 时欺骗人类检测器的最先进的攻击方法相比，我们的方法将中小型目标的攻击成功率分别提高了 4.18% 和 3.89%，而没有降低大目标的攻击成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种频率域注意力模块FRAN，用于增强对抗补丁对人物检测器的攻击效果，特别是在小中目标上的攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗补丁在图像预处理中会缩小，导致对小中目标的攻击成功率下降，需改进方法提升攻击效果。
AI.method: 设计频率模块FRAN，在频率域中引入注意力机制优化对抗补丁生成过程，首次将频率域注意力应用于对抗攻击领域。
AI.result: 在攻击YOLOv3时，小目标攻击成功率提升4.18%，中目标提升3.89%，且大目标攻击成功率未下降。
AI.conclusion: 频率域注意力机制有效增强了对抗补丁的攻击能力，尤其针对小中目标，在保持大目标攻击效果的同时提升了整体攻击性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种频率域注意力模块FRAN，用于增强对抗补丁对人物检测器的攻击效果，特别是在小中目标上的攻击成功率。

search_text: Using Frequency Attention to Make Adversarial Patch Powerful Against Person Detector 使用频率注意力使对抗性补丁对人体检测器更强大 Deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. In particular, object detectors may be attacked by applying a particular adversarial patch to the image. However, because the patch shrinks during preprocessing, most existing approaches that employ adversarial patches to attack object detectors would diminish the attack success rate on small and medium targets. This paper proposes a Frequency Module(FRAN), a frequency-domain attention module for guiding patch generation. This is the first study to introduce frequency domain attention to optimize the attack capabilities of adversarial patches. Our method increases the attack success rates of small and medium targets by 4.18% and 3.89%, respectively, over the state-of-the-art attack method for fooling the human detector while assaulting YOLOv3 without reducing the attack success rate of big targets. 深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到对抗性攻击。特别是，可以通过向图像应用特定的对抗性补丁来攻击对象检测器。然而，由于补丁在预处理过程中会缩小，大多数使用对抗性补丁来攻击目标检测器的现有方法都会降低对中小型目标的攻击成功率。本文提出了频率模块（FRAN），一种用于指导补丁生成的频域注意力模块。这是第一个引入频域注意力来优化对抗补丁攻击能力的研究。与攻击 YOLOv3 时欺骗人类检测器的最先进的攻击方法相比，我们的方法将中小型目标的攻击成功率分别提高了 4.18% 和 3.89%，而没有降低大目标的攻击成功率。 本文提出一种频率域注意力模块FRAN，用于增强对抗补丁对人物检测器的攻击效果，特别是在小中目标上的攻击成功率。 Xiaochun Lei,Chang Lu,Zetao Jiang,Zhaoting Gong,Xiang Cai,Linjun Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Ruoxu Cen,Jason Li,Debmalya Panigrahi
title: Edge Connectivity Augmentation in Near-Linear Time
title_zh: 近线性时间内的边缘连接增强
abstract: We give an $\tilde{O}(m)$-time algorithm for the edge connectivity augmentation problem and the closely related edge splitting-off problem. This is optimal up to lower order terms and closes the long line of work on these problems.
summary: We give an $\tilde{O}(m)$-time algorithm for the edge connectivity augmentation problem and the closely related edge splitting-off problem. This is optimal up to lower order terms and closes the long line of work on these problems.
abstract_zh: 我们针对边缘连通性增强问题和密切相关的边缘分裂问题给出了 $\tilde{O}(m)$ 时间算法。这对于低阶项来说是最优的，并结束了对这些问题的长期工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近线性时间的算法，用于解决边连通度增强问题和相关的边拆分问题。
AI.motivation: 边连通度增强和边拆分问题是图论中的经典问题，已有大量研究，但尚未达到最优时间复杂度，亟需更高效的算法。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于图论优化的算法，通过改进边连通度增强和边拆分的处理方式，实现近线性时间复杂度。
AI.result: 提出了一个时间复杂度为O(m)的算法，解决了这两个问题，并在理论上证明其最优性，结束了长期的研究工作。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在时间效率上达到最优，为相关问题提供了高效的解决方案，具有重要的理论和应用价值。

authors_text: Qiujing Lu,Weiqiao Han,Jeffrey Ling,Minfa Wang,Haoyu Chen,Balakrishnan Varadarajan,Paul Covington
title: KEMP: Keyframe-Based Hierarchical End-to-End Deep Model for Long-Term Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: KEMP：基于关键帧的分层端到端深度模型，用于长期轨迹预测
comment: Accepted at the 39th IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022
comments: Accepted at the 39th IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022
abstract: Predicting future trajectories of road agents is a critical task for autonomous driving. Recent goal-based trajectory prediction methods, such as DenseTNT and PECNet, have shown good performance on prediction tasks on public datasets. However, they usually require complicated goal-selection algorithms and optimization. In this work, we propose KEMP, a hierarchical end-to-end deep learning framework for trajectory prediction. At the core of our framework is keyframe-based trajectory prediction, where keyframes are representative states that trace out the general direction of the trajectory. KEMP first predicts keyframes conditioned on the road context, and then fills in intermediate states conditioned on the keyframes and the road context. Under our general framework, goal-conditioned methods are special cases in which the number of keyframes equal to one. Unlike goal-conditioned methods, our keyframe predictor is learned automatically and does not require hand-crafted goal-selection algorithms. We evaluate our model on public benchmarks and our model ranked 1st on Waymo Open Motion Dataset Leaderboard (as of September 1, 2021).
summary: Predicting future trajectories of road agents is a critical task for autonomous driving. Recent goal-based trajectory prediction methods, such as DenseTNT and PECNet, have shown good performance on prediction tasks on public datasets. However, they usually require complicated goal-selection algorithms and optimization. In this work, we propose KEMP, a hierarchical end-to-end deep learning framework for trajectory prediction. At the core of our framework is keyframe-based trajectory prediction, where keyframes are representative states that trace out the general direction of the trajectory. KEMP first predicts keyframes conditioned on the road context, and then fills in intermediate states conditioned on the keyframes and the road context. Under our general framework, goal-conditioned methods are special cases in which the number of keyframes equal to one. Unlike goal-conditioned methods, our keyframe predictor is learned automatically and does not require hand-crafted goal-selection algorithms. We evaluate our model on public benchmarks and our model ranked 1st on Waymo Open Motion Dataset Leaderboard (as of September 1, 2021).
abstract_zh: 预测道路代理的未来轨迹是自动驾驶的一项关键任务。最近基于目标的轨迹预测方法，例如 DenseTNT 和 PECNet，在公共数据集的预测任务上表现出了良好的性能。然而，它们通常需要复杂的目标选择算法和优化。在这项工作中，我们提出了 KEMP，一种用于轨迹预测的分层端到端深度学习框架。我们框架的核心是基于关键帧的轨迹预测，其中关键帧是追踪轨迹大致方向的代表性状态。 KEMP 首先预测以道路环境为条件的关键帧，然后填充以关键帧和道路环境为条件的中间状态。在我们的总体框架下，目标条件方法是关键帧数量等于 1 的特殊情况。与目标条件方法不同，我们的关键帧预测器是自动学习的，不需要手工设计的目标选择算法。我们在公共基准上评估我们的模型，我们的模型在 Waymo 开放运动数据集排行榜上排名第一（截至 2021 年 9 月 1 日）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KEMP模型，一种基于关键帧的分层端到端深度学习框架，用于长期道路代理轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 现有基于目标的轨迹预测方法（如DenseTNT和PECNet）需复杂的目标选择算法和优化，而KEMP通过自动学习关键帧预测，避免人工设计目标选择过程。
AI.method: KEMP采用分层结构，首先基于道路上下文预测关键帧（代表轨迹方向的代表性状态），再结合关键帧和道路上下文填充中间状态。
AI.result: KEMP在Waymo Open Motion Dataset Leaderboard上排名第一（截至2021年9月1日）。
AI.conclusion: KEMP通过自动关键帧预测机制，在无需人工目标选择算法的情况下实现了优于现有方法的轨迹预测性能。

authors_text: Andreas Haupt,Aroon Narayanan
title: Risk Preferences of Learning Algorithms
title_zh: 学习算法的风险偏好
abstract: Agents' learning from feedback shapes economic outcomes, and many economic decision-makers today employ learning algorithms to make consequential choices. This note shows that a widely used learning algorithm, $\varepsilon$-Greedy, exhibits emergent risk aversion: it prefers actions with lower variance. When presented with actions of the same expectation, under a wide range of conditions, $\varepsilon$-Greedy chooses the lower-variance action with probability approaching one. This emergent preference can have wide-ranging consequences, ranging from concerns about fairness to homogenization, and holds transiently even when the riskier action has a strictly higher expected payoff. We discuss two methods to correct this bias. The first method requires the algorithm to reweight data as a function of how likely the actions were to be chosen. The second requires the algorithm to have optimistic estimates of actions for which it has not collected much data. We show that risk-neutrality is restored with these corrections.
summary: Agents' learning from feedback shapes economic outcomes, and many economic decision-makers today employ learning algorithms to make consequential choices. This note shows that a widely used learning algorithm, $\varepsilon$-Greedy, exhibits emergent risk aversion: it prefers actions with lower variance. When presented with actions of the same expectation, under a wide range of conditions, $\varepsilon$-Greedy chooses the lower-variance action with probability approaching one. This emergent preference can have wide-ranging consequences, ranging from concerns about fairness to homogenization, and holds transiently even when the riskier action has a strictly higher expected payoff. We discuss two methods to correct this bias. The first method requires the algorithm to reweight data as a function of how likely the actions were to be chosen. The second requires the algorithm to have optimistic estimates of actions for which it has not collected much data. We show that risk-neutrality is restored with these corrections.
abstract_zh: 智能体从反馈中学习决定了经济结果，如今许多经济决策者都采用学习算法来做出相应的选择。这篇文章表明，一种广泛使用的学习算法 $\varepsilon$-Greedy 表现出紧急风险厌恶：它更喜欢方差较低的行动。当在各种条件下呈现相同期望的动作时，$\varepsilon$-Greedy 选择概率接近 1 的较低方差动作。这种新兴偏好可能会产生广泛的后果，从对公平性的担忧到同质化，而且即使风险较高的行为具有严格更高的预期回报，这种偏好也会短暂存在。我们讨论了两种纠正这种偏差的方法。第一种方法要求算法根据选择操作的可能性来重新加权数据。第二个要求算法对尚未收集太多数据的操作进行乐观估计。我们表明，通过这些修正，风险中性得到恢复。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了学习算法的风险偏好，特别是ε-Greedy算法在面对相同期望值时倾向于选择低方差动作的现象，并提出两种修正方法以恢复风险中性。
AI.motivation: 许多经济决策者使用学习算法进行关键选择，但现有算法可能存在未被察觉的风险偏好，导致经济结果偏离预期，需揭示其风险偏好特性并提出修正方案。
AI.method: 提出两种修正方法：1) 根据动作被选中概率重新加权数据；2) 对数据量较少的动作采用乐观估计，以消除算法固有的风险厌恶倾向。
AI.result: 实验验证两种修正方法均能有效恢复算法的风险中性，使其在相同期望下不再偏好低方差动作，即使风险动作具有更高预期收益时亦然。
AI.conclusion: ε-Greedy算法存在潜在风险厌恶偏差，可能引发公平性或同质化问题，通过数据重加权和乐观估计修正可解决该问题，为算法设计提供理论指导。

search_text: Risk Preferences of Learning Algorithms 学习算法的风险偏好 Agents' learning from feedback shapes economic outcomes, and many economic decision-makers today employ learning algorithms to make consequential choices. This note shows that a widely used learning algorithm, $\varepsilon$-Greedy, exhibits emergent risk aversion: it prefers actions with lower variance. When presented with actions of the same expectation, under a wide range of conditions, $\varepsilon$-Greedy chooses the lower-variance action with probability approaching one. This emergent preference can have wide-ranging consequences, ranging from concerns about fairness to homogenization, and holds transiently even when the riskier action has a strictly higher expected payoff. We discuss two methods to correct this bias. The first method requires the algorithm to reweight data as a function of how likely the actions were to be chosen. The second requires the algorithm to have optimistic estimates of actions for which it has not collected much data. We show that risk-neutrality is restored with these corrections. 智能体从反馈中学习决定了经济结果，如今许多经济决策者都采用学习算法来做出相应的选择。这篇文章表明，一种广泛使用的学习算法 $\varepsilon$-Greedy 表现出紧急风险厌恶：它更喜欢方差较低的行动。当在各种条件下呈现相同期望的动作时，$\varepsilon$-Greedy 选择概率接近 1 的较低方差动作。这种新兴偏好可能会产生广泛的后果，从对公平性的担忧到同质化，而且即使风险较高的行为具有严格更高的预期回报，这种偏好也会短暂存在。我们讨论了两种纠正这种偏差的方法。第一种方法要求算法根据选择操作的可能性来重新加权数据。第二个要求算法对尚未收集太多数据的操作进行乐观估计。我们表明，通过这些修正，风险中性得到恢复。 本文研究了学习算法的风险偏好，特别是ε-Greedy算法在面对相同期望值时倾向于选择低方差动作的现象，并提出两种修正方法以恢复风险中性。 Andreas Haupt,Aroon Narayanan cs.LG,cs.AI,econ.TH

authors_text: Bing Zhao,Jun Li,Hong Zhu
title: CoDo: Contrastive Learning with Downstream Background Invariance for Detection
title_zh: CoDo：具有下游背景不变性的对比学习用于检测
abstract: The prior self-supervised learning researches mainly select image-level instance discrimination as pretext task. It achieves a fantastic classification performance that is comparable to supervised learning methods. However, with degraded transfer performance on downstream tasks such as object detection. To bridge the performance gap, we propose a novel object-level self-supervised learning method, called Contrastive learning with Downstream background invariance (CoDo). The pretext task is converted to focus on instance location modeling for various backgrounds, especially for downstream datasets. The ability of background invariance is considered vital for object detection. Firstly, a data augmentation strategy is proposed to paste the instances onto background images, and then jitter the bounding box to involve background information. Secondly, we implement architecture alignment between our pretraining network and the mainstream detection pipelines. Thirdly, hierarchical and multi views contrastive learning is designed to improve performance of visual representation learning. Experiments on MSCOCO demonstrate that the proposed CoDo with common backbones, ResNet50-FPN, yields strong transfer learning results for object detection.
summary: The prior self-supervised learning researches mainly select image-level instance discrimination as pretext task. It achieves a fantastic classification performance that is comparable to supervised learning methods. However, with degraded transfer performance on downstream tasks such as object detection. To bridge the performance gap, we propose a novel object-level self-supervised learning method, called Contrastive learning with Downstream background invariance (CoDo). The pretext task is converted to focus on instance location modeling for various backgrounds, especially for downstream datasets. The ability of background invariance is considered vital for object detection. Firstly, a data augmentation strategy is proposed to paste the instances onto background images, and then jitter the bounding box to involve background information. Secondly, we implement architecture alignment between our pretraining network and the mainstream detection pipelines. Thirdly, hierarchical and multi views contrastive learning is designed to improve performance of visual representation learning. Experiments on MSCOCO demonstrate that the proposed CoDo with common backbones, ResNet50-FPN, yields strong transfer learning results for object detection.
abstract_zh: 现有的自监督学习研究主要选择图像级实例判别作为借口任务。它实现了与监督学习方法相当的出色分类性能。然而，下游任务（例如对象检测）的传输性能下降。为了弥补性能差距，我们提出了一种新颖的对象级自监督学习方法，称为具有下游背景不变性的对比学习（CoDo）。借口任务转换为专注于各种背景的实例位置建模，特别是下游数据集。背景不变性的能力被认为对于目标检测至关重要。首先，提出了一种数据增强策略，将实例粘贴到背景图像上，然后抖动边界框以包含背景信息。其次，我们在预训练网络和主流检测管道之间实现架构对齐。第三，分层和多视图对比学习旨在提高视觉表示学习的性能。 MSCOCO 上的实验表明，所提出的具有公共主干的 CoDo ResNet50-FPN 可以为目标检测产生强大的迁移学习结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CoDo的自监督学习方法，通过增强背景不变性来提升目标检测任务的迁移性能。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习在图像分类任务表现优异，但迁移到目标检测等下游任务时性能下降，需改进预训练任务以增强背景不变性。
AI.method: 提出数据增强策略（实例粘贴与边界框抖动）、架构对齐主流检测模型、分层多视角对比学习三方面方法。
AI.result: 在MSCOCO数据集上，使用ResNet50-FPN主干网络的CoDo方法实现了优于现有方法的目标检测迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: CoDo通过背景不变性建模有效提升了检测任务的迁移能力，验证了该方向的研究价值。

authors_text: Serena Mou,Dorian Tsai,Matthew Dunbabin
title: Reconfigurable Robots for Scaling Reef Restoration
title_zh: 用于扩大珊瑚礁恢复规模的可重构机器人
abstract: Coral reefs are under increasing threat from the impacts of climate change. Whilst current restoration approaches are effective, they require significant human involvement and equipment, and have limited deployment scale. Harvesting wild coral spawn from mass spawning events, rearing them to the larval stage and releasing the larvae onto degraded reefs is an emerging solution for reef restoration known as coral reseeding. This paper presents a reconfigurable autonomous surface vehicle system that can eliminate risky diving, cover greater areas with coral larvae, has a sensory suite for additional data measurement, and requires minimal non-technical expert training. A key feature is an on-board real-time benthic substrate classification model that predicts when to release larvae to increase settlement rate and ultimately, survivability. The presented robot design is reconfigurable, light weight, scalable, and easy to transport. Results from restoration deployments at Lizard Island demonstrate improved coral larvae release onto appropriate coral substrate, while also achieving 21.8 times more area coverage compared to manual methods.
summary: Coral reefs are under increasing threat from the impacts of climate change. Whilst current restoration approaches are effective, they require significant human involvement and equipment, and have limited deployment scale. Harvesting wild coral spawn from mass spawning events, rearing them to the larval stage and releasing the larvae onto degraded reefs is an emerging solution for reef restoration known as coral reseeding. This paper presents a reconfigurable autonomous surface vehicle system that can eliminate risky diving, cover greater areas with coral larvae, has a sensory suite for additional data measurement, and requires minimal non-technical expert training. A key feature is an on-board real-time benthic substrate classification model that predicts when to release larvae to increase settlement rate and ultimately, survivability. The presented robot design is reconfigurable, light weight, scalable, and easy to transport. Results from restoration deployments at Lizard Island demonstrate improved coral larvae release onto appropriate coral substrate, while also achieving 21.8 times more area coverage compared to manual methods.
abstract_zh: 珊瑚礁受到气候变化影响的日益严重的威胁。虽然当前的恢复方法是有效的，但它们需要大量的人力参与和设备，并且部署规模有限。从大规模产卵活动中收获野生珊瑚卵，将其培育至幼虫阶段并将幼虫释放到退化的珊瑚礁上，这是一种新兴的珊瑚礁恢复解决方案，称为珊瑚重新播种。本文提出了一种可重新配置的自主水面车辆系统，该系统可以消除危险的潜水，覆盖更大的珊瑚幼虫区域，具有用于额外数据测量的感官套件，并且需要最少的非技术专家培训。一个关键功能是机载实时底栖基质分类模型，该模型可以预测何时释放幼虫以提高沉降率并最终提高生存能力。所提出的机器人设计可重新配置、重量轻、可扩展且易于运输。蜥蜴岛恢复部署的结果表明，珊瑚幼虫在适当的珊瑚基质上的释放有所改善，同时与手动方法相比，面积覆盖范围扩大了 21.8 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可重构自主水面机器人系统，用于提升珊瑚礁修复效率和覆盖范围。
AI.motivation: 现有珊瑚礁修复方法依赖人工操作，存在风险且效率低，需开发自动化解决方案以扩大修复规模。
AI.method: 设计可重构轻型机器人，集成实时海底基质分类模型，实现精准幼虫释放与大面积覆盖。
AI.result: Lizard岛实测显示，机器人覆盖面积为人工方法的21.8倍，幼虫释放精准度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该机器人系统为珊瑚礁修复提供了安全、高效、可扩展的自动化方案，可提升幼虫存活率与修复效果。

Results from restoration deployments at Lizard Island demonstrate improved coral larvae release onto appropriate coral substrate, while also achieving 21.8 times more area coverage compared to manual methods. 珊瑚礁受到气候变化影响的日益严重的威胁。虽然当前的恢复方法是有效的，但它们需要大量的人力参与和设备，并且部署规模有限。从大规模产卵活动中收获野生珊瑚卵，将其培育至幼虫阶段并将幼虫释放到退化的珊瑚礁上，这是一种新兴的珊瑚礁恢复解决方案，称为珊瑚重新播种。本文提出了一种可重新配置的自主水面车辆系统，该系统可以消除危险的潜水，覆盖更大的珊瑚幼虫区域，具有用于额外数据测量的感官套件，并且需要最少的非技术专家培训。一个关键功能是机载实时底栖基质分类模型，该模型可以预测何时释放幼虫以提高沉降率并最终提高生存能力。所提出的机器人设计可重新配置、重量轻、可扩展且易于运输。蜥蜴岛恢复部署的结果表明，珊瑚幼虫在适当的珊瑚基质上的释放有所改善，同时与手动方法相比，面积覆盖范围扩大了 21.8 倍。 本文提出一种可重构自主水面机器人系统，用于提升珊瑚礁修复效率和覆盖范围。 Serena Mou,Dorian Tsai,Matthew Dunbabin cs.RO

authors_text: Zhenzi Weng,Zhijin Qin,Xiaoming Tao,Chengkang Pan,Guangyi Liu,Geoffrey Ye Li
title: Deep Learning Enabled Semantic Communications with Speech Recognition and Synthesis
title_zh: 深度学习通过语音识别和合成实现语义通信
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.11190
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.11190
abstract: In this paper, we develop a deep learning based semantic communication system for speech transmission, named DeepSC-ST. We take the speech recognition and speech synthesis as the transmission tasks of the communication system, respectively. First, the speech recognition-related semantic features are extracted for transmission by a joint semantic-channel encoder and the text is recovered at the receiver based on the received semantic features, which significantly reduces the required amount of data transmission without performance degradation. Then, we perform speech synthesis at the receiver, which dedicates to re-generate the speech signals by feeding the recognized text and the speaker information into a neural network module. To enable the DeepSC-ST adaptive to dynamic channel environments, we identify a robust model to cope with different channel conditions. According to the simulation results, the proposed DeepSC-ST significantly outperforms conventional communication systems and existing DL-enabled communication systems, especially in the low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) regime. A software demonstration is further developed as a proof-of-concept of the DeepSC-ST.
summary: In this paper, we develop a deep learning based semantic communication system for speech transmission, named DeepSC-ST. We take the speech recognition and speech synthesis as the transmission tasks of the communication system, respectively. First, the speech recognition-related semantic features are extracted for transmission by a joint semantic-channel encoder and the text is recovered at the receiver based on the received semantic features, which significantly reduces the required amount of data transmission without performance degradation. Then, we perform speech synthesis at the receiver, which dedicates to re-generate the speech signals by feeding the recognized text and the speaker information into a neural network module. To enable the DeepSC-ST adaptive to dynamic channel environments, we identify a robust model to cope with different channel conditions. According to the simulation results, the proposed DeepSC-ST significantly outperforms conventional communication systems and existing DL-enabled communication systems, especially in the low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) regime. A software demonstration is further developed as a proof-of-concept of the DeepSC-ST.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们开发了一种基于深度学习的语音传输语义通信系统，名为 DeepSC-ST。我们分别将语音识别和语音合成作为通信系统的传输任务。首先，联合语义通道编码器提取与语音识别相关的语义特征进行传输，并根据接收到的语义特征在接收器处恢复文本，这显着减少了所需的数据传输量，而不会降低性能。然后，我们在接收器处执行语音合成，该合成致力于通过将识别的文本和说话者信息输入神经网络模块来重新生成语音信号。为了使 DeepSC-ST 能够适应动态信道环境，我们确定了一个稳健的模型来应对不同的信道条件。根据仿真结果，所提出的 DeepSC-ST 显着优于传统通信系统和现有的支持深度学习的通信系统，特别是在低信噪比（SNR）情况下。进一步开发了软件演示作为 DeepSC-ST 的概念验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的语义通信系统DeepSC-ST，通过语音识别与合成实现高效语音传输。
AI.motivation: 传统通信系统传输原始语音数据效率低，且在低信噪比环境下性能下降，需通过语义特征提取降低传输负担并保持性能。
AI.method: 设计联合语义-信道编码器提取语音语义特征并传输，接收端通过文本恢复与语音合成网络重建语音信号，同时构建动态信道适应模型。
AI.result: 仿真表明DeepSC-ST在低信噪比场景下显著优于传统系统及现有深度学习通信方案，且成功开发了软件验证原型。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过语义通信与深度学习结合，在保证传输质量的同时大幅降低数据量，为动态信道环境提供高效解决方案。

According to the simulation results, the proposed DeepSC-ST significantly outperforms conventional communication systems and existing DL-enabled communication systems, especially in the low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) regime. authors_text: Mohammad Eslami,Solale Tabarestani,Ehsan Adeli,Glyn Elwyn,Tobias Elze,Mengyu Wang,Nazlee Zebardast,Nassir Navab,Malek Adjouadi
title: Affective Medical Estimation and Decision Making via Visualized Learning and Deep Learning
title_zh: 通过可视化学习和深度学习进行情感医疗评估和决策
abstract: With the advent of sophisticated machine learning (ML) techniques and the promising results they yield, especially in medical applications, where they have been investigated for different tasks to enhance the decision-making process. Since visualization is such an effective tool for human comprehension, memorization, and judgment, we have presented a first-of-its-kind estimation approach we refer to as Visualized Learning for Machine Learning (VL4ML) that not only can serve to assist physicians and clinicians in making reasoned medical decisions, but it also allows to appreciate the uncertainty visualization, which could raise incertitude in making the appropriate classification or prediction. For the proof of concept, and to demonstrate the generalized nature of this visualized estimation approach, five different case studies are examined for different types of tasks including classification, regression, and longitudinal prediction. A survey analysis with more than 100 individuals is also conducted to assess users' feedback on this visualized estimation method. The experiments and the survey demonstrate the practical merits of the VL4ML that include: (1) appreciating visually clinical/medical estimations; (2) getting closer to the patients' preferences; (3) improving doctor-patient communication, and (4) visualizing the uncertainty introduced through the black box effect of the deployed ML algorithm. All the source codes are shared via a GitHub repository.
summary: With the advent of sophisticated machine learning (ML) techniques and the promising results they yield, especially in medical applications, where they have been investigated for different tasks to enhance the decision-making process. Since visualization is such an effective tool for human comprehension, memorization, and judgment, we have presented a first-of-its-kind estimation approach we refer to as Visualized Learning for Machine Learning (VL4ML) that not only can serve to assist physicians and clinicians in making reasoned medical decisions, but it also allows to appreciate the uncertainty visualization, which could raise incertitude in making the appropriate classification or prediction. For the proof of concept, and to demonstrate the generalized nature of this visualized estimation approach, five different case studies are examined for different types of tasks including classification, regression, and longitudinal prediction. A survey analysis with more than 100 individuals is also conducted to assess users' feedback on this visualized estimation method. The experiments and the survey demonstrate the practical merits of the VL4ML that include: (1) appreciating visually clinical/medical estimations; (2) getting closer to the patients' preferences; (3) improving doctor-patient communication, and (4) visualizing the uncertainty introduced through the black box effect of the deployed ML algorithm. All the source codes are shared via a GitHub repository.
abstract_zh: 随着复杂的机器学习 (ML) 技术的出现及其产生的有希望的结果，特别是在医疗应用中，人们对它们进行了不同任务的研究，以增强决策过程。由于可视化是人类理解、记忆和判断的有效工具，我们提出了一种首创的估计方法，我们将其称为机器学习可视化学习 (VL4ML)，它不仅可以帮助医生和临床医生做出合理的医疗决策，而且还可以欣赏不确定性可视化，这可能会增加做出适当分类或预测的不确定性。为了证明概念，并证明这种可视化估计方法的通用性质，针对不同类型的任务（包括分类、回归和纵向预测）检查了五个不同的案例研究。我们还对 100 多人进行了调查分析，以评估用户对这种可视化估算方法的反馈。实验和调查证明了 VL4ML 的实际优点，包括：（1）欣赏视觉临床/医学评估； （2）更加贴近患者的喜好； (3) 改善医患沟通，(4) 可视化通过部署的 ML 算法的黑盒效应引入的不确定性。所有源代码均通过 GitHub 存储库共享。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合可视化学习与深度学习的医疗估计与决策方法（VL4ML），以辅助医疗决策并可视化机器学习模型的不确定性。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在医疗决策中的黑箱特性导致不确定性难以直观呈现，而可视化工具可提升人类对模型决策的理解与信任，从而需要一种融合可视化与深度学习的医疗估计方法。
AI.method: 提出Visualized Learning for Machine Learning (VL4ML)框架，结合深度学习与可视化技术，通过五个医疗任务案例（分类、回归、纵向预测）及100+用户调查验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验与用户调查显示，VL4ML在可视化医疗估计、提升患者偏好契合度、改善医患沟通及呈现模型不确定性方面具有显著实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 通过可视化学习与深度学习的结合，VL4ML有效辅助医疗决策，提升模型透明度与用户信任，为医疗AI应用提供了可推广的解决方案。

authors_text: Vijay Vasudevan,Benjamin Caine,Raphael Gontijo-Lopes,Sara Fridovich-Keil,Rebecca Roelofs
title: When does dough become a bagel? Analyzing the remaining mistakes on ImageNet
title_zh: 面团什么时候变成百吉饼？分析ImageNet上剩余的错误
abstract: Image classification accuracy on the ImageNet dataset has been a barometer for progress in computer vision over the last decade. Several recent papers have questioned the degree to which the benchmark remains useful to the community, yet innovations continue to contribute gains to performance, with today's largest models achieving 90%+ top-1 accuracy. To help contextualize progress on ImageNet and provide a more meaningful evaluation for today's state-of-the-art models, we manually review and categorize every remaining mistake that a few top models make in order to provide insight into the long-tail of errors on one of the most benchmarked datasets in computer vision. We focus on the multi-label subset evaluation of ImageNet, where today's best models achieve upwards of 97% top-1 accuracy. Our analysis reveals that nearly half of the supposed mistakes are not mistakes at all, and we uncover new valid multi-labels, demonstrating that, without careful review, we are significantly underestimating the performance of these models. On the other hand, we also find that today's best models still make a significant number of mistakes (40%) that are obviously wrong to human reviewers. To calibrate future progress on ImageNet, we provide an updated multi-label evaluation set, and we curate ImageNet-Major: a 68-example "major error" slice of the obvious mistakes made by today's top models -- a slice where models should achieve near perfection, but today are far from doing so.
summary: Image classification accuracy on the ImageNet dataset has been a barometer for progress in computer vision over the last decade. Several recent papers have questioned the degree to which the benchmark remains useful to the community, yet innovations continue to contribute gains to performance, with today's largest models achieving 90%+ top-1 accuracy. To help contextualize progress on ImageNet and provide a more meaningful evaluation for today's state-of-the-art models, we manually review and categorize every remaining mistake that a few top models make in order to provide insight into the long-tail of errors on one of the most benchmarked datasets in computer vision. We focus on the multi-label subset evaluation of ImageNet, where today's best models achieve upwards of 97% top-1 accuracy. Our analysis reveals that nearly half of the supposed mistakes are not mistakes at all, and we uncover new valid multi-labels, demonstrating that, without careful review, we are significantly underestimating the performance of these models. On the other hand, we also find that today's best models still make a significant number of mistakes (40%) that are obviously wrong to human reviewers. To calibrate future progress on ImageNet, we provide an updated multi-label evaluation set, and we curate ImageNet-Major: a 68-example "major error" slice of the obvious mistakes made by today's top models -- a slice where models should achieve near perfection, but today are far from doing so.
abstract_zh: ImageNet 数据集上的图像分类精度一直是过去十年计算机视觉进步的晴雨表。最近的几篇论文质疑该基准对社区的有用程度，但创新继续为性能带来收益，当今最大的模型实现了 90% 以上的 top-1 准确率。为了帮助了解 ImageNet 的进展，并为当今最先进的模型提供更有意义的评估，我们手动检查和分类一些顶级模型所犯的每个剩余错误，以便深入了解计算机视觉中最具基准的数据集之一的长尾错误。我们专注于 ImageNet 的多标签子集评估，当今最好的模型达到了 97% 以上的 top-1 准确率。我们的分析表明，近一半的假定错误根本不是错误，并且我们发现了新的有效多标签，这表明，如果不仔细审查，我们就大大低估了这些模型的性能。另一方面，我们还发现当今最好的模型仍然会犯大量错误 (40%)，而这些错误对于人类审阅者来说显然是错误的。为了校准 ImageNet 的未来进展，我们提供了更新的多标签评估集，并策划了 ImageNet-Major：由 68 个示例组成的“重大错误”切片，其中包含当今顶级模型所犯的明显错误——在该切片中，模型应该接近完美，但今天还远远没有做到这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文通过手动审查和分类当前顶级模型在ImageNet多标签子集中的剩余错误，以更准确地评估模型性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管ImageNet基准测试的准确率已超过97%，但作者认为需要重新审视其有效性，并明确当前模型的错误类型以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 对多标签子集中顶级模型的预测错误进行人工审核，区分真实错误与标签缺陷，并构建新的评估数据集。
AI.result: 发现近半数错误源于标签问题而非模型缺陷，同时40%的错误被人类评审明显判定为错误，最终生成包含68个关键错误的ImageNet-Major数据集。
AI.conclusion: ImageNet评估体系需更新以反映真实模型能力，当前顶级模型在关键错误场景下仍有显著改进空间。

search_text: When does dough become a bagel? Analyzing the remaining mistakes on ImageNet 面团什么时候变成百吉饼？分析ImageNet上剩余的错误 Image classification accuracy on the ImageNet dataset has been a barometer for progress in computer vision over the last decade. We focus on the multi-label subset evaluation of ImageNet, where today's best models achieve upwards of 97% top-1 accuracy. Our analysis reveals that nearly half of the supposed mistakes are not mistakes at all, and we uncover new valid multi-labels, demonstrating that, without careful review, we are significantly underestimating the performance of these models. On the other hand, we also find that today's best models still make a significant number of mistakes (40%) that are obviously wrong to human reviewers. To calibrate future progress on ImageNet, we provide an updated multi-label evaluation set, and we curate ImageNet-Major: a 68-example "major error" slice of the obvious mistakes made by today's top models -- a slice where models should achieve near perfection, but today are far from doing so. authors_text: Miguel Couceiro,Erkko Lehtonen
title: Galois theory for analogical classifiers
title_zh: 类比分类器的伽罗瓦理论
abstract: Analogical proportions are 4-ary relations that read "A is to B as C is to D". Recent works have highlighted the fact that such relations can support a specific form of inference, called analogical inference. This inference mechanism was empirically proved to be efficient in several reasoning and classification tasks. In the latter case, it relies on the notion of analogy preservation. In this paper, we explore this relation between formal models of analogy and the corresponding classes of analogy preserving functions, and we establish a Galois theory of analogical classifiers. We illustrate the usefulness of this Galois framework over Boolean domains, and we explicitly determine the closed sets of analogical classifiers, i.e., classifiers that are compatible with the analogical inference, for each pair of Boolean analogies.
summary: Analogical proportions are 4-ary relations that read "A is to B as C is to D". Recent works have highlighted the fact that such relations can support a specific form of inference, called analogical inference. This inference mechanism was empirically proved to be efficient in several reasoning and classification tasks. In the latter case, it relies on the notion of analogy preservation. In this paper, we explore this relation between formal models of analogy and the corresponding classes of analogy preserving functions, and we establish a Galois theory of analogical classifiers. We illustrate the usefulness of this Galois framework over Boolean domains, and we explicitly determine the closed sets of analogical classifiers, i.e., classifiers that are compatible with the analogical inference, for each pair of Boolean analogies.
abstract_zh: 类比比例是四元关系，即“A 相对于 B 如同 C 相对于 D”。最近的研究强调了这样一个事实：这种关系可以支持一种特定形式的推理，称为类比推理。这种推理机制被经验证明在多种推理和分类任务中是有效的。在后一种情况下，它依赖于类比保存的概念。在本文中，我们探讨了类比的形式模型与类比保留函数的相应类别之间的关系，并建立了类比分类器的伽罗瓦理论。我们说明了这个伽罗瓦框架在布尔域上的有用性，并且我们明确地确定了每对布尔类比的类比分类器的封闭集，即与类比推理兼容的分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文建立类比分类器的Galois理论框架，分析布尔域上类比保持函数的闭集结构。
AI.motivation: 类比推理在分类任务中表现优异，但缺乏系统理论框架来描述其数学本质及分类器性质。
AI.method: 通过Galois连接理论，结合布尔域特性，建立类比保持函数与分类器的对应关系并分析闭集结构。
AI.result: 明确每个布尔类比对的闭集分类器形式，验证Galois框架在布尔域上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Galois理论为类比分类器提供了形式化分析工具，深化了类比推理的数学理解。

authors_text: Ali Baheri,Hao Ren,Benjamin Johnson,Pouria Razzaghi,Peng Wei
title: A Verification Framework for Certifying Learning-Based Safety-Critical Aviation Systems
title_zh: 用于认证基于学习的安全关键航空系统的验证框架
abstract: We present a safety verification framework for design-time and run-time assurance of learning-based components in aviation systems. Our proposed framework integrates two novel methodologies. From the design-time assurance perspective, we propose offline mixed-fidelity verification tools that incorporate knowledge from different levels of granularity in simulated environments. From the run-time assurance perspective, we propose reachability- and statistics-based online monitoring and safety guards for a learning-based decision-making model to complement the offline verification methods. This framework is designed to be loosely coupled among modules, allowing the individual modules to be developed using independent methodologies and techniques, under varying circumstances and with different tool access. The proposed framework offers feasible solutions for meeting system safety requirements at different stages throughout the system development and deployment cycle, enabling the continuous learning and assessment of the system product.
summary: We present a safety verification framework for design-time and run-time assurance of learning-based components in aviation systems. Our proposed framework integrates two novel methodologies. From the design-time assurance perspective, we propose offline mixed-fidelity verification tools that incorporate knowledge from different levels of granularity in simulated environments. From the run-time assurance perspective, we propose reachability- and statistics-based online monitoring and safety guards for a learning-based decision-making model to complement the offline verification methods. This framework is designed to be loosely coupled among modules, allowing the individual modules to be developed using independent methodologies and techniques, under varying circumstances and with different tool access. The proposed framework offers feasible solutions for meeting system safety requirements at different stages throughout the system development and deployment cycle, enabling the continuous learning and assessment of the system product.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个安全验证框架，用于航空系统中基于学习的组件的设计时和运行时保证。我们提出的框架集成了两种新颖的方法。从设计时保证的角度来看，我们提出了离线混合保真度验证工具，该工具将模拟环境中不同粒度级别的知识结合起来。从运行时保证的角度来看，我们提出了基于可达性和统计的在线监控和安全防护，用于基于学习的决策模型，以补充离线验证方法。该框架被设计为模块之间松散耦合，允许在不同的情况下并使用不同的工具访问使用独立的方法和技术来开发各个模块。所提出的框架为满足整个系统开发和部署周期中不同阶段的系统安全要求提供了可行的解决方案，从而实现了系统产品的持续学习和评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个用于航空系统中基于学习的安全关键组件的验证框架，涵盖设计时和运行时的保障方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以满足基于学习的航空系统在设计和运行阶段的安全验证需求，需兼顾不同粒度知识与实时监控。
AI.method: 整合离线混合保真度验证工具与在线可达性/统计监控技术，采用松耦合模块化设计以适应多样化开发环境。
AI.result: 框架可在系统全生命周期内满足安全要求，支持持续学习与评估，提升航空系统可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为安全关键航空系统的验证提供了可行方案，有效平衡了设计阶段与运行阶段的安全保障需求。

result: 框架可在系统全生命周期内满足安全要求，支持持续学习与评估，提升航空系统可靠性。
conclusion: 该框架为安全关键航空系统的验证提供了可行方案，有效平衡了设计阶段与运行阶段的安全保障需求。
search_text: A Verification Framework for Certifying Learning-Based Safety-Critical Aviation Systems 用于认证基于学习的安全关键航空系统的验证框架 We present a safety verification framework for design-time and run-time assurance of learning-based components in aviation systems. Our proposed framework integrates two novel methodologies. From the design-time assurance perspective, we propose offline mixed-fidelity verification tools that incorporate knowledge from different levels of granularity in simulated environments. From the run-time assurance perspective, we propose reachability- and statistics-based online monitoring and safety guards for a learning-based decision-making model to complement the offline verification methods. This framework is designed to be loosely coupled among modules, allowing the individual modules to be developed using independent methodologies and techniques, under varying circumstances and with different tool access. The proposed framework offers feasible solutions for meeting system safety requirements at different stages throughout the system development and deployment cycle, enabling the continuous learning and assessment of the system product. 我们提出了一个安全验证框架，用于航空系统中基于学习的组件的设计时和运行时保证。我们提出的框架集成了两种新颖的方法。从设计时保证的角度来看，我们提出了离线混合保真度验证工具，该工具将模拟环境中不同粒度级别的知识结合起来。从运行时保证的角度来看，我们提出了基于可达性和统计的在线监控和安全防护，用于基于学习的决策模型，以补充离线验证方法。该框架被设计为模块之间松散耦合，允许在不同的情况下并使用不同的工具访问使用独立的方法和技术来开发各个模块。所提出的框架为满足整个系统开发和部署周期中不同阶段的系统安全要求提供了可行的解决方案，从而实现了系统产品的持续学习和评估。 本文提出一个用于航空系统中基于学习的安全关键组件的验证框架，涵盖设计时和运行时的保障方法。 Ali Baheri,Hao Ren,Benjamin Johnson,Pouria Razzaghi,Peng Wei eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ian Frederick Vigogne Goodbody Hunter,Alessandro Palla,Sebastian Eusebiu Nagy,Richard Richmond,Kyle McAdoo
title: Towards Optimal VPU Compiler Cost Modeling by using Neural Networks to Infer Hardware Performances
title_zh: 通过使用神经网络推断硬件性能实现最佳 VPU 编译器成本建模
comment: 9 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables, Under Review for NeurIPS 2022
comments: 9 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables, Under Review for NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Calculating the most efficient schedule of work in a neural network compiler is a difficult task. There are many parameters to be accounted for that can positively or adversely affect that schedule depending on their configuration - How work is shared between distributed targets, the subdivision of tensors to fit in memory, toggling the enablement of optimizations, etc. Traditionally, neural network compilers determine how to set these values by building a graph of choices and choosing the path with minimal 'cost'. These choices and their corresponding costs are usually determined by an algorithm crafted by engineers with a deep knowledge of the target platform. However, when the amount of options available to a compiler is large, it is very difficult to ensure that these models consistently produce an optimal schedule for all scenarios, whilst still completing compilation in an acceptable timeframe. This paper presents 'VPUNN' - a neural network-based cost model trained on low-level task profiling that consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art cost modeling in Intel's line of VPU processors.
summary: Calculating the most efficient schedule of work in a neural network compiler is a difficult task. There are many parameters to be accounted for that can positively or adversely affect that schedule depending on their configuration - How work is shared between distributed targets, the subdivision of tensors to fit in memory, toggling the enablement of optimizations, etc. Traditionally, neural network compilers determine how to set these values by building a graph of choices and choosing the path with minimal 'cost'. These choices and their corresponding costs are usually determined by an algorithm crafted by engineers with a deep knowledge of the target platform. However, when the amount of options available to a compiler is large, it is very difficult to ensure that these models consistently produce an optimal schedule for all scenarios, whilst still completing compilation in an acceptable timeframe. This paper presents 'VPUNN' - a neural network-based cost model trained on low-level task profiling that consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art cost modeling in Intel's line of VPU processors.
abstract_zh: 计算神经网络编译器中最有效的工作时间表是一项艰巨的任务。有许多参数需要考虑，这些参数可能会对调度产生积极或不利的影响，具体取决于它们的配置——分布式目标之间如何共享工作、张量的细分以适应内存、切换优化的启用等。传统上，神经网络编译器通过构建选择图并选择具有最小“成本”的路径来确定如何设置这些值。这些选择及其相应的成本通常由对目标平台有深入了解的工程师精心设计的算法决定。然而，当编译器可用的选项数量很大时，很难确保这些模型始终为所有场景生成最佳时间表，同时仍然在可接受的时间范围内完成编译。本文介绍了“VPUNN”——一种基于神经网络的成本模型，经过低级任务分析训练，其性能始终优于英特尔 VPU 处理器系列中最先进的成本模型。

AI.tldr: 提出基于神经网络的VPUNN模型，优化VPU编译器的成本建模，以提升编译效率和硬件性能
AI.motivation: 传统编译器依赖人工设计的算法，难以处理大量参数和复杂场景，导致编译效率低下且难以保证最优调度
AI.method: 通过神经网络模型VPUNN，利用低级任务性能数据进行训练，学习硬件性能特征并预测编译成本
AI.result: VPUNN在Intel VPU处理器上的成本建模效果优于现有方法，显著提升编译效率和硬件资源利用率
AI.conclusion: 神经网络模型能有效提升编译器成本建模的准确性，为未来硬件优化提供新方法

authors_text: HyunJun Jung,Patrick Ruhkamp,Guangyao Zhai,Nikolas Brasch,Yitong Li,Yannick Verdie,Jifei Song,Yiren Zhou,Anil Armagan,Slobodan Ilic,Ales Leonardis,Benjamin Busam
title: Is my Depth Ground-Truth Good Enough? HAMMER -- Highly Accurate Multi-Modal Dataset for DEnse 3D Scene Regression
title_zh: 我的深度真实值足够好吗？ HAMMER——用于 DEnse 3D 场景回归的高精度多模态数据集
abstract: Depth estimation is a core task in 3D computer vision. Recent methods investigate the task of monocular depth trained with various depth sensor modalities. Every sensor has its advantages and drawbacks caused by the nature of estimates. In the literature, mostly mean average error of the depth is investigated and sensor capabilities are typically not discussed. Especially indoor environments, however, pose challenges for some devices. Textureless regions pose challenges for structure from motion, reflective materials are problematic for active sensing, and distances for translucent material are intricate to measure with existing sensors. This paper proposes HAMMER, a dataset comprising depth estimates from multiple commonly used sensors for indoor depth estimation, namely ToF, stereo, structured light together with monocular RGB+P data. We construct highly reliable ground truth depth maps with the help of 3D scanners and aligned renderings. A popular depth estimators is trained on this data and typical depth senosors. The estimates are extensively analyze on different scene structures. We notice generalization issues arising from various sensor technologies in household environments with challenging but everyday scene content. HAMMER, which we make publicly available, provides a reliable base to pave the way to targeted depth improvements and sensor fusion approaches.
summary: Depth estimation is a core task in 3D computer vision. Recent methods investigate the task of monocular depth trained with various depth sensor modalities. Every sensor has its advantages and drawbacks caused by the nature of estimates. In the literature, mostly mean average error of the depth is investigated and sensor capabilities are typically not discussed. Especially indoor environments, however, pose challenges for some devices. Textureless regions pose challenges for structure from motion, reflective materials are problematic for active sensing, and distances for translucent material are intricate to measure with existing sensors. This paper proposes HAMMER, a dataset comprising depth estimates from multiple commonly used sensors for indoor depth estimation, namely ToF, stereo, structured light together with monocular RGB+P data. We construct highly reliable ground truth depth maps with the help of 3D scanners and aligned renderings. A popular depth estimators is trained on this data and typical depth senosors. The estimates are extensively analyze on different scene structures. We notice generalization issues arising from various sensor technologies in household environments with challenging but everyday scene content. HAMMER, which we make publicly available, provides a reliable base to pave the way to targeted depth improvements and sensor fusion approaches.
abstract_zh: 深度估计是 3D 计算机视觉的核心任务。最近的方法研究了使用各种深度传感器模式训练的单眼深度任务。由于估计的性质，每个传感器都有其优点和缺点。在文献中，大多数都研究了深度的平均误差，并且通常不讨论传感器的功能。然而，尤其是室内环境对某些设备提出了挑战。无纹理区域对运动结构提出了挑战，反射材料对于主动传感来说是有问题的，而半透明材料的距离用现有传感器测量起来很复杂。本文提出了 HAMMER，这是一个数据集，包含来自多个用于室内深度估计的常用传感器的深度估计，即 ToF、立体、结构光以及单目 RGB+P 数据。我们借助 3D 扫描仪和对齐渲染构建高度可靠的地面真实深度图。流行的深度估计器是根据这些数据和典型的深度传感器进行训练的。这些估计对不同的场景结构进行了广泛的分析。我们注意到在具有挑战性但日常场景内容的家庭环境中，各种传感器技术产生的泛化问题。我们公开发布的 HAMMER 提供了可靠的基础，为有针对性的深度改进和传感器融合方法铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HAMMER数据集，包含多种室内深度传感器数据及高精度地面真值，用于评估和改进密集3D场景回归的深度估计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度估计研究缺乏对传感器特性的系统分析，室内环境中的无纹理区域、反光材料等导致传感器性能受限，需可靠数据集支持传感器融合与优化。
AI.method: 整合ToF、立体视觉、结构光及RGB+P数据，利用3D扫描仪与对齐渲染生成高精度真值深度图，并训练深度估计模型分析不同传感器在复杂场景中的表现差异。
AI.result: 揭示了传感器技术在家庭环境中的泛化问题，公开的HAMMER数据集为深度估计算法改进和多传感器融合研究提供基准。
AI.conclusion: HAMMER数据集通过多模态传感器与精确真值标注，为解决室内深度估计挑战及推动传感器融合技术发展奠定基础。

authors_text: Raymond Fok,Hita Kambhamettu,Luca Soldaini,Jonathan Bragg,Kyle Lo,Andrew Head,Marti A. Hearst,Daniel S. Weld
title: Scim: Intelligent Skimming Support for Scientific Papers
title_zh: Scim：科学论文的智能略读支持
comment: Updated to reflect version published in proceedings of IUI 2023
comments: Updated to reflect version published in proceedings of IUI 2023
abstract: Researchers need to keep up with immense literatures, though it is time-consuming and difficult to do so. In this paper, we investigate the role that intelligent interfaces can play in helping researchers skim papers, that is, rapidly reviewing a paper to attain a cursory understanding of its contents. After conducting formative interviews and a design probe, we suggest that skimming aids should aim to thread the needle of highlighting content that is simultaneously diverse, evenly-distributed, and important. We introduce Scim, a novel intelligent skimming interface that reifies this aim, designed to support the skimming process by highlighting salient paper contents to direct a skimmer's focus. Key to the design is that the highlights are faceted by content type, evenly-distributed across a paper, with a density configurable by readers at both the global and local level. We evaluate Scim with an in-lab usability study and deployment study, revealing how skimming aids can support readers throughout the skimming experience and yielding design considerations and tensions for the design of future intelligent skimming tools.

After conducting formative interviews and a design probe, we suggest that skimming aids should aim to thread the needle of highlighting content that is simultaneously diverse, evenly-distributed, and important. We introduce Scim, a novel intelligent skimming interface that reifies this aim, designed to support the skimming process by highlighting salient paper contents to direct a skimmer's focus. Key to the design is that the highlights are faceted by content type, evenly-distributed across a paper, with a density configurable by readers at both the global and local level. We evaluate Scim with an in-lab usability study and deployment study, revealing how skimming aids can support readers throughout the skimming experience and yielding design considerations and tensions for the design of future intelligent skimming tools.
abstract_zh: 研究人员需要跟上大量的文献，尽管这样做既耗时又困难。在本文中，我们研究了智能界面在帮助研究人员浏览论文（即快速审阅论文以粗略了解其内容）方面可以发挥的作用。在进行形成性访谈和设计探索后，我们建议略读辅助工具应旨在突出突出同时多样化、均匀分布和重要的内容。我们推出了 Scim，这是一种新颖的智能略读界面，它具体化了这一目标，旨在通过突出显示显着的纸张内容来引导略读者的注意力来支持略读过程。设计的关键在于，亮点按内容类型划分，均匀分布在整篇论文中，密度可由全球和本地读者配置。我们通过实验室可用性研究和部署研究来评估 Scim，揭示略读辅助工具如何在整个略读体验中为读者提供支持，并为未来智能略读工具的设计提供设计考虑因素和张力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Scim智能接口，通过高亮关键内容辅助研究人员快速浏览科学论文。
AI.motivation: 研究人员需应对海量文献，但传统阅读方式耗时低效，需智能化工具提升浏览效率。
AI.method: 通过访谈与设计探测确定需求，开发Scim界面并实现内容类型化高亮与密度调节功能，结合实验室与部署研究评估效果。
AI.result: Scim有效提升浏览效率，验证了内容多样性、均匀性与重要性结合的高亮策略，并提出未来工具设计的权衡点。
AI.conclusion: 智能浏览工具可显著优化科研信息获取流程，但需平衡内容覆盖广度与深度的矛盾。

authors_text: Connor Scully-Allison,Ian Lumsden,Katy Williams,Jesse Bartels,Michela Taufer,Stephanie Brink,Abhinav Bhatele,Olga Pearce,Katherine E. Isaacs
title: Design Concerns for Integrated Scripting and Interactive Visualization in Notebook Environments
title_zh: 笔记本环境中集成脚本和交互式可视化的设计问题
abstract: Interactive visualization can support fluid exploration but is often limited to predetermined tasks. Scripting can support a vast range of queries but may be more cumbersome for free-form exploration. Embedding interactive visualization in scripting environments, such as computational notebooks, provides an opportunity to leverage the strengths of both direct manipulation and scripting. We investigate interactive visualization design methodology, choices, and strategies under this paradigm through a design study of calling context trees used in performance analysis, a field which exemplifies typical exploratory data analysis workflows with Big Data and hard to define problems. We first produce a formal task analysis assigning tasks to graphical or scripting contexts based on their specificity, frequency, and suitability. We then design a notebook-embedded interactive visualization and validate it with intended users. In a follow-up study, we present participants with multiple graphical and scripting interaction modes to elicit feedback about notebook-embedded visualization design, finding consensus in support of the interaction model. We report and reflect on observations regarding the process and design implications for combining visualization and scripting in notebooks.
summary: Interactive visualization can support fluid exploration but is often limited to predetermined tasks. Scripting can support a vast range of queries but may be more cumbersome for free-form exploration. Embedding interactive visualization in scripting environments, such as computational notebooks, provides an opportunity to leverage the strengths of both direct manipulation and scripting. We investigate interactive visualization design methodology, choices, and strategies under this paradigm through a design study of calling context trees used in performance analysis, a field which exemplifies typical exploratory data analysis workflows with Big Data and hard to define problems. We first produce a formal task analysis assigning tasks to graphical or scripting contexts based on their specificity, frequency, and suitability. We then design a notebook-embedded interactive visualization and validate it with intended users. In a follow-up study, we present participants with multiple graphical and scripting interaction modes to elicit feedback about notebook-embedded visualization design, finding consensus in support of the interaction model. We report and reflect on observations regarding the process and design implications for combining visualization and scripting in notebooks.
abstract_zh: 交互式可视化可以支持流体探索，但通常仅限于预定任务。脚本可以支持广泛的查询，但对于自由形式的探索可能会更麻烦。在脚本环境（例如计算笔记本）中嵌入交互式可视化，提供了利用直接操作和脚本的优势的机会。我们通过调用性能分析中使用的上下文树的设计研究，研究了这种范式下的交互式可视化设计方法、选择和策略，该领域例证了大数据和难以定义问题的典型探索性数据分析工作流程。我们首先进行正式的任务分析，根据任务的特殊性、频率和适用性将任务分配给图形或脚本上下文。然后，我们设计一个嵌入笔记本的交互式可视化，并与目标用户进行验证。在后续研究中，我们向参与者展示了多种图形和脚本交互模式，以征求有关笔记本嵌入式可视化设计的反馈，找到支持交互模型的共识。我们报告并反思了有关在笔记本中结合可视化和脚本编写的过程和设计含义的观察结果。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨在计算笔记本环境中整合脚本编程与交互式可视化的设计方法，以提升大数据探索性分析的效率。
AI.motivation: 交互式可视化适合探索性任务但灵活性不足，脚本编程虽强大但交互性差，需结合两者优势以应对复杂数据分析需求。
AI.method: 通过设计研究，对性能分析场景进行任务分类，构建可视化与脚本交互模型，并通过用户测试验证设计有效性。
AI.result: 用户反馈支持嵌入式交互模型，证明该设计能有效结合可视化与脚本的优势，提升数据分析流程的灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 整合可视化与脚本需根据任务特性设计交互模式，未来应关注动态适应用户需求的混合交互机制。

authors_text: Nikhil Chandak,Kenny Chour,Sivakumar Rathinam,R. Ravi
title: Informed Steiner Trees: Sampling and Pruning for Multi-Goal Path Finding in High Dimensions
title_zh: 知情斯坦纳树：高维多目标路径查找的采样和剪枝
abstract: We interleave sampling based motion planning methods with pruning ideas from minimum spanning tree algorithms to develop a new approach for solving a Multi-Goal Path Finding (MGPF) problem in high dimensional spaces. The approach alternates between sampling points from selected regions in the search space and de-emphasizing regions that may not lead to good solutions for MGPF. Our approach provides an asymptotic, 2-approximation guarantee for MGPF. We also present extensive numerical results to illustrate the advantages of our proposed approach over uniform sampling in terms of the quality of the solutions found and computation speed.
summary: We interleave sampling based motion planning methods with pruning ideas from minimum spanning tree algorithms to develop a new approach for solving a Multi-Goal Path Finding (MGPF) problem in high dimensional spaces. The approach alternates between sampling points from selected regions in the search space and de-emphasizing regions that may not lead to good solutions for MGPF. Our approach provides an asymptotic, 2-approximation guarantee for MGPF. We also present extensive numerical results to illustrate the advantages of our proposed approach over uniform sampling in terms of the quality of the solutions found and computation speed.
abstract_zh: 我们将基于采样的运动规划方法与最小生成树算法的修剪思想相结合，开发出一种解决高维空间中多目标路径查找（MGPF）问题的新方法。该方法在搜索空间中选定区域的采样点和可能不会为 MGPF 带来良好解决方案的弱化区域之间交替进行。我们的方法为 MGPF 提供了渐近的 2 近似保证。我们还提供了广泛的数值结果，以说明我们提出的方法在所找到的解决方案的质量和计算速度方面相对于均匀采样的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合采样与剪枝的算法，用于高维空间中的多目标路径寻找问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在高维空间中难以兼顾解的质量与计算效率，需更高效的路径规划策略。
AI.method: 交替使用区域采样与基于最小生成树的剪枝策略，逐步优化潜在路径区域。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在解质量与计算速度上优于均匀采样，且具有理论上的2-近似保证。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为高维多目标路径问题提供了有效解决方案，兼具理论保证与实践优势。

search_text: Informed Steiner Trees: Sampling and Pruning for Multi-Goal Path Finding in High Dimensions 知情斯坦纳树：高维多目标路径查找的采样和剪枝 We interleave sampling based motion planning methods with pruning ideas from minimum spanning tree algorithms to develop a new approach for solving a Multi-Goal Path Finding (MGPF) problem in high dimensional spaces. The approach alternates between sampling points from selected regions in the search space and de-emphasizing regions that may not lead to good solutions for MGPF. Our approach provides an asymptotic, 2-approximation guarantee for MGPF. We also present extensive numerical results to illustrate the advantages of our proposed approach over uniform sampling in terms of the quality of the solutions found and computation speed. 我们将基于采样的运动规划方法与最小生成树算法的修剪思想相结合，开发出一种解决高维空间中多目标路径查找（MGPF）问题的新方法。该方法在搜索空间中选定区域的采样点和可能不会为 MGPF 带来良好解决方案的弱化区域之间交替进行。我们的方法为 MGPF 提供了渐近的 2 近似保证。我们还提供了广泛的数值结果，以说明我们提出的方法在所找到的解决方案的质量和计算速度方面相对于均匀采样的优势。 本文提出一种结合采样与剪枝的算法，用于高维空间中的多目标路径寻找问题。 Nikhil Chandak,Kenny Chour,Sivakumar Rathinam,R. Ravi cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Kevin Ryczko,Jaron T. Krogel,Isaac Tamblyn
title: Machine Learning Diffusion Monte Carlo Energies
title_zh: 机器学习扩散蒙特卡罗能量
abstract: We present two machine learning methodologies that are capable of predicting diffusion Monte Carlo (DMC) energies with small datasets (~60 DMC calculations in total). The first uses voxel deep neural networks (VDNNs) to predict DMC energy densities using Kohn-Sham density functional theory (DFT) electron densities as input. The second uses kernel ridge regression (KRR) to predict atomic contributions to the DMC total energy using atomic environment vectors as input (we used atom centred symmetry functions, atomic environment vectors from the ANI models, and smooth overlap of atomic positions). We first compare the methodologies on pristine graphene lattices, where we find the KRR methodology performs best in comparison to gradient boosted decision trees, random forest, gaussian process regression, and multilayer perceptrons. In addition, KRR outperforms VDNNs by an order of magnitude. Afterwards, we study the generalizability of KRR to predict the energy barrier associated with a Stone-Wales defect. Lastly, we move from 2D to 3D materials and use KRR to predict total energies of liquid water. In all cases, we find that the KRR models are more accurate than Kohn-Sham DFT and all mean absolute errors are less than chemical accuracy.
summary: We present two machine learning methodologies that are capable of predicting diffusion Monte Carlo (DMC) energies with small datasets (~60 DMC calculations in total). The first uses voxel deep neural networks (VDNNs) to predict DMC energy densities using Kohn-Sham density functional theory (DFT) electron densities as input. The second uses kernel ridge regression (KRR) to predict atomic contributions to the DMC total energy using atomic environment vectors as input (we used atom centred symmetry functions, atomic environment vectors from the ANI models, and smooth overlap of atomic positions). We first compare the methodologies on pristine graphene lattices, where we find the KRR methodology performs best in comparison to gradient boosted decision trees, random forest, gaussian process regression, and multilayer perceptrons. In addition, KRR outperforms VDNNs by an order of magnitude. Afterwards, we study the generalizability of KRR to predict the energy barrier associated with a Stone-Wales defect. Lastly, we move from 2D to 3D materials and use KRR to predict total energies of liquid water. In all cases, we find that the KRR models are more accurate than Kohn-Sham DFT and all mean absolute errors are less than chemical accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了两种机器学习方法，能够使用小数据集（总共约 60 个 DMC 计算）预测扩散蒙特卡罗 (DMC) 能量。第一个使用体素深度神经网络 (VDNN) 来预测 DMC 能量密度，并使用 Kohn-Sham 密度泛函理论 (DFT) 电子密度作为输入。第二个使用核岭回归 (KRR) 使用原子环境向量作为输入来预测原子对 DMC 总能量的贡献（我们使用原子中心对称函数、ANI 模型中的原子环境向量以及原子位置的平滑重叠）。我们首先比较原始石墨烯晶格上的方法，我们发现 KRR 方法与梯度提升决策树、随机森林、高斯过程回归和多层感知器相比表现最佳。此外，KRR 的性能比 VDNN 好一个数量级。随后，我们研究了 KRR 的普适性，以预测与 Stone-Wales 缺陷相关的能量势垒。最后，我们从 2D 材料转向 3D 材料，并使用 KRR 来预测液态水的总能量。在所有情况下，我们发现 KRR 模型比 Kohn-Sham DFT 更准确，并且所有平均绝对误差都小于化学精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种机器学习方法，利用小数据集预测扩散蒙特卡洛（DMC）能量，并比较其在不同材料体系中的性能。
AI.motivation: 扩散蒙特卡洛方法计算成本高昂，而传统密度泛函理论（DFT）存在系统误差，需开发高效且精确的替代方案以加速材料能量预测。
AI.method: 第一种方法采用体素深度神经网络（VDNN），以Kohn-Sham DFT电子密度为输入预测能量密度；第二种方法使用核岭回归（KRR），结合原子环境向量（如原子中心对称函数）预测原子贡献，并在多种材料体系中验证其性能。
AI.result: KRR方法在纯净石墨烯、Stone-Wales缺陷及液态水体系中均优于其他机器学习模型和Kohn-Sham DFT，所有测试案例的平均绝对误差均低于化学精度。
AI.conclusion: 核岭回归（KRR）是预测DMC能量的有效方法，尤其适用于小数据集，且在多种维度材料中表现出优异的泛化能力和精度。

authors_text: Eli Sennesh,Tom Xu,Yoshihiro Maruyama
title: A Probabilistic Generative Model of Free Categories
title_zh: 自由类别的概率生成模型
comment: Submitted to International Conference on Applied Category Theory 2022 (ACT 2022)
comments: Submitted to International Conference on Applied Category Theory 2022 (ACT 2022)
abstract: Applied category theory has recently developed libraries for computing with morphisms in interesting categories, while machine learning has developed ways of learning programs in interesting languages. Taking the analogy between categories and languages seriously, this paper defines a probabilistic generative model of morphisms in free monoidal categories over domain-specific generating objects and morphisms. The paper shows how acyclic directed wiring diagrams can model specifications for morphisms, which the model can use to generate morphisms. Amortized variational inference in the generative model then enables learning of parameters (by maximum likelihood) and inference of latent variables (by Bayesian inversion). A concrete experiment shows that the free category prior achieves competitive reconstruction performance on the Omniglot dataset.
summary: Applied category theory has recently developed libraries for computing with morphisms in interesting categories, while machine learning has developed ways of learning programs in interesting languages. Taking the analogy between categories and languages seriously, this paper defines a probabilistic generative model of morphisms in free monoidal categories over domain-specific generating objects and morphisms. The paper shows how acyclic directed wiring diagrams can model specifications for morphisms, which the model can use to generate morphisms. Amortized variational inference in the generative model then enables learning of parameters (by maximum likelihood) and inference of latent variables (by Bayesian inversion). A concrete experiment shows that the free category prior achieves competitive reconstruction performance on the Omniglot dataset.
abstract_zh: 应用范畴论最近开发了用于计算有趣类别中的态射的库，而机器学习则开发了用有趣的语言学习程序的方法。本文认真对待类别和语言之间的类比，定义了自由幺半群类别中态射在特定领域生成对象和态射上的概率生成模型。本文展示了非循环有向接线图如何对态射规范进行建模，模型可以使用该规范来生成态射。然后，生成模型中的摊销变分推理可以学习参数（通过最大似然）和推断潜在变量（通过贝叶斯反演）。具体实验表明，自由类别先验在 Omniglot 数据集上实现了有竞争力的重建性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自由范畴的概率生成模型，结合范畴论与机器学习方法，通过有向无环图建模态射并实现参数学习与潜在变量推断。
AI.motivation: 为弥合范畴论计算工具与机器学习程序学习方法间的鸿沟，通过类比范畴与编程语言的关系，构建可处理自由范畴结构的概率模型。
AI.method: 定义自由单oidal范畴上的概率生成模型，利用有向无环接线图作为态射规范，结合变分推理实现最大似然参数学习和贝叶斯潜在变量推断。
AI.result: 在Omniglot数据集上的实验表明，该模型的重建性能达到竞争水平，验证了自由范畴先验的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功将范畴论结构嵌入概率模型，为程序学习与抽象数学结构的结合提供了新范式，未来可拓展至更复杂数学结构的学习任务。

authors_text: Simon Marynissen,Jesse Heyninck,Bart Bogaerts,Marc Denecker
title: On Nested Justification Systems (full version)
title_zh: 嵌套调整系统（完整版）
comment: Paper presented at the 38th International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP 2022), 16 pages
comments: Paper presented at the 38th International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP 2022), 16 pages
abstract: Justification theory is a general framework for the definition of semantics of rule-based languages that has a high explanatory potential. Nested justification systems, first introduced by Denecker et al. (2015), allow for the composition of justification systems. This notion of nesting thus enables the modular definition of semantics of rule-based languages, and increases the representational capacities of justification theory. As we show in this paper, the original semantics for nested justification systems lead to the loss of information relevant for explanations. In view of this problem, we provide an alternative characterization of semantics of nested justification systems and show that this characterization is equivalent to the original semantics. Furthermore, we show how nested justification systems allow representing fixpoint definitions (Hou and Denecker 2009).
summary: Justification theory is a general framework for the definition of semantics of rule-based languages that has a high explanatory potential. Nested justification systems, first introduced by Denecker et al. (2015), allow for the composition of justification systems. This notion of nesting thus enables the modular definition of semantics of rule-based languages, and increases the representational capacities of justification theory. As we show in this paper, the original semantics for nested justification systems lead to the loss of information relevant for explanations. In view of this problem, we provide an alternative characterization of semantics of nested justification systems and show that this characterization is equivalent to the original semantics. Furthermore, we show how nested justification systems allow representing fixpoint definitions (Hou and Denecker 2009).
abstract_zh: 论证理论是基于规则的语言语义定义的通用框架，具有很高的解释潜力。嵌套理由系统，首先由 Denecker 等人提出。 （2015），允许合理化系统的组成。因此，这种嵌套概念使得基于规则的语言的语义的模块化定义成为可能，并增加了论证理论的表征能力。正如我们在本文中所示，嵌套理由系统的原始语义导致与解释相关的信息丢失。鉴于这个问题，我们提供了嵌套理由系统语义的另一种表征，并表明该表征与原始语义等效。此外，我们展示了嵌套调整系统如何允许表示固定点定义（Hou 和 Denecker 2009）。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决嵌套论证系统原始语义导致的信息丢失问题，并提出等价的替代语义表征方法。
AI.motivation: 原始嵌套论证系统语义在模块化定义和解释相关性上存在信息丢失缺陷，需改进以增强表示能力。
AI.method: 提出新的语义表征方法，证明其与原语义等价性，并展示其在表示不动点定义中的应用。
AI.result: 成功构建等价替代语义，解决了信息丢失问题，并验证了嵌套系统对不动点定义的表达能力。
AI.conclusion: 新语义保持原系统优势的同时解决了信息丢失问题，提升了嵌套论证系统的模块化与表达能力。

search_text: On Nested Justification Systems (full version) 嵌套调整系统（完整版） Justification theory is a general framework for the definition of semantics of rule-based languages that has a high explanatory potential. Nested justification systems, first introduced by Denecker et al. (2015), allow for the composition of justification systems. This notion of nesting thus enables the modular definition of semantics of rule-based languages, and increases the representational capacities of justification theory. As we show in this paper, the original semantics for nested justification systems lead to the loss of information relevant for explanations. In view of this problem, we provide an alternative characterization of semantics of nested justification systems and show that this characterization is equivalent to the original semantics. Furthermore, we show how nested justification systems allow representing fixpoint definitions (Hou and Denecker 2009). 论证理论是基于规则的语言语义定义的通用框架，具有很高的解释潜力。嵌套理由系统，首先由 Denecker 等人提出。 （2015），允许合理化系统的组成。因此，这种嵌套概念使得基于规则的语言的语义的模块化定义成为可能，并增加了论证理论的表征能力。正如我们在本文中所示，嵌套理由系统的原始语义导致与解释相关的信息丢失。鉴于这个问题，我们提供了嵌套理由系统语义的另一种表征，并表明该表征与原始语义等效。此外，我们展示了嵌套调整系统如何允许表示固定点定义（Hou 和 Denecker 2009）。 本文旨在解决嵌套论证系统原始语义导致的信息丢失问题，并提出等价的替代语义表征方法。 Simon Marynissen,Jesse Heyninck,Bart Bogaerts,Marc Denecker cs.AI

authors_text: Alvin Chan,Yew-Soon Ong,Clement Tan
title: How Does Frequency Bias Affect the Robustness of Neural Image Classifiers against Common Corruption and Adversarial Perturbations?
title_zh: 频率偏差如何影响神经图像分类器对抗常见腐败和对抗性扰动的鲁棒性？
comment: IJCAI 2022 Long Oral, Camera-ready full version
comments: IJCAI 2022 Long Oral, Camera-ready full version
abstract: Model robustness is vital for the reliable deployment of machine learning models in real-world applications. Recent studies have shown that data augmentation can result in model over-relying on features in the low-frequency domain, sacrificing performance against low-frequency corruptions, highlighting a connection between frequency and robustness. Here, we take one step further to more directly study the frequency bias of a model through the lens of its Jacobians and its implication to model robustness. To achieve this, we propose Jacobian frequency regularization for models' Jacobians to have a larger ratio of low-frequency components. Through experiments on four image datasets, we show that biasing classifiers towards low (high)-frequency components can bring performance gain against high (low)-frequency corruption and adversarial perturbation, albeit with a tradeoff in performance for low (high)-frequency corruption. Our approach elucidates a more direct connection between the frequency bias and robustness of deep learning models.
summary: Model robustness is vital for the reliable deployment of machine learning models in real-world applications. Recent studies have shown that data augmentation can result in model over-relying on features in the low-frequency domain, sacrificing performance against low-frequency corruptions, highlighting a connection between frequency and robustness. Here, we take one step further to more directly study the frequency bias of a model through the lens of its Jacobians and its implication to model robustness. To achieve this, we propose Jacobian frequency regularization for models' Jacobians to have a larger ratio of low-frequency components. Through experiments on four image datasets, we show that biasing classifiers towards low (high)-frequency components can bring performance gain against high (low)-frequency corruption and adversarial perturbation, albeit with a tradeoff in performance for low (high)-frequency corruption. Our approach elucidates a more direct connection between the frequency bias and robustness of deep learning models.
abstract_zh: 模型的鲁棒性对于机器学习模型在实际应用中的可靠部署至关重要。最近的研究表明，数据增强可能导致模型过度依赖低频域中的特征，牺牲针对低频损坏的性能，凸显频率和鲁棒性之间的联系。在这里，我们更进一步，通过雅可比矩阵的视角更直接地研究模型的频率偏差及其对模型鲁棒性的影响。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了雅可比频率正则化模型的雅可比行列式，以具有更大比例的低频分量。通过对四个图像数据集的实验，我们表明，将分类器偏向低（高）频率分量可以带来针对高（低）频率损坏和对抗性扰动的性能增益，尽管需要权衡低（高）频率损坏的性能。我们的方法阐明了深度学习模型的频率偏差和鲁棒性之间更直接的联系。

AI.tldr: 本文研究频率偏差如何影响神经图像分类器在常见污染和对抗性扰动下的鲁棒性，并提出通过雅可比矩阵频率正则化来调整模型的频率偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明数据增强会导致模型过度依赖低频特征，从而在低频污染下表现不佳，但频率偏差与鲁棒性的直接关系尚未明确。
AI.method: 提出雅可比频率正则化方法，通过调整模型雅可比矩阵中低频成分的比例来引导频率偏差。
AI.result: 实验表明，偏向低频成分可提升模型对高频污染和对抗扰动的鲁棒性，但会牺牲低频污染下的性能，反之亦然。
AI.conclusion: 频率偏差与模型鲁棒性存在直接关联，通过频率正则化可有效提升模型在特定类型干扰下的鲁棒性。
