authors_text: Yiannis Kantaros
title: Accelerated Reinforcement Learning for Temporal Logic Control Objectives
title_zh: 时间逻辑控制目标的加速强化学习
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of learning control policies for mobile robots, modeled as unknown Markov Decision Processes (MDPs), that are tasked with temporal logic missions, such as sequencing, coverage, or surveillance. The MDP captures uncertainty in the workspace structure and the outcomes of control decisions. The control objective is to synthesize a control policy that maximizes the probability of accomplishing a high-level task, specified as a Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formula. To address this problem, we propose a novel accelerated model-based reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm for LTL control objectives that is capable of learning control policies significantly faster than related approaches. Its sample-efficiency relies on biasing exploration towards directions that may contribute to task satisfaction. This is accomplished by leveraging an automaton representation of the LTL task as well as a continuously learned MDP model. Finally, we provide comparative experiments that demonstrate the sample efficiency of the proposed method against recent RL methods for LTL objectives.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of learning control policies for mobile robots, modeled as unknown Markov Decision Processes (MDPs), that are tasked with temporal logic missions, such as sequencing, coverage, or surveillance. The MDP captures uncertainty in the workspace structure and the outcomes of control decisions. The control objective is to synthesize a control policy that maximizes the probability of accomplishing a high-level task, specified as a Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formula. To address this problem, we propose a novel accelerated model-based reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm for LTL control objectives that is capable of learning control policies significantly faster than related approaches. Its sample-efficiency relies on biasing exploration towards directions that may contribute to task satisfaction. This is accomplished by leveraging an automaton representation of the LTL task as well as a continuously learned MDP model. Finally, we provide comparative experiments that demonstrate the sample efficiency of the proposed method against recent RL methods for LTL objectives.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了移动机器人的学习控制策略问题，建模为未知马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），其任务是执行时序逻辑任务，例如排序、覆盖或监视。 MDP 捕捉工作空间结构和控制决策结果的不确定性。控制目标是综合一个控制策略，最大化完成高级任务的概率，指定为线性时序逻辑 (LTL) 公式。为了解决这个问题，我们针对 LTL 控制目标提出了一种基于加速模型的强化学习 (RL) 算法，该算法能够比相关方法更快地学习控制策略。它的样本效率依赖于对可能有助于任务满意度的方向的偏向探索。这是通过利用 LTL 任务的自动机表示以及持续学习的 MDP 模型来实现的。最后，我们提供了比较实验，证明了所提出的方法与针对 LTL 目标的最新 RL 方法的样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种加速的基于模型的强化学习算法，用于为移动机器人学习满足时间逻辑控制任务的高效策略。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理时间逻辑任务时样本效率不足，难以应对移动机器人工作空间的不确定性及复杂任务需求。
AI.method: 设计结合LTL任务自动机与持续学习MDP模型的强化学习框架，通过有偏向的探索策略加速任务满足方向的样本收集。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在样本效率上显著优于现有针对LTL目标的强化学习算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法有效解决了时间逻辑控制任务下的高效策略学习问题，为复杂机器人控制提供了新思路。

search_text: Accelerated Reinforcement Learning for Temporal Logic Control Objectives 时间逻辑控制目标的加速强化学习 This paper addresses the problem of learning control policies for mobile robots, modeled as unknown Markov Decision Processes (MDPs), that are tasked with temporal logic missions, such as sequencing, coverage, or surveillance. The MDP captures uncertainty in the workspace structure and the outcomes of control decisions. The control objective is to synthesize a control policy that maximizes the probability of accomplishing a high-level task, specified as a Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formula. To address this problem, we propose a novel accelerated model-based reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm for LTL control objectives that is capable of learning control policies significantly faster than related approaches. Its sample-efficiency relies on biasing exploration towards directions that may contribute to task satisfaction. This is accomplished by leveraging an automaton representation of the LTL task as well as a continuously learned MDP model. Finally, we provide comparative experiments that demonstrate the sample efficiency of the proposed method against recent RL methods for LTL objectives. 本文解决了移动机器人的学习控制策略问题，建模为未知马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），其任务是执行时序逻辑任务，例如排序、覆盖或监视。 MDP 捕捉工作空间结构和控制决策结果的不确定性。控制目标是综合一个控制策略，最大化完成高级任务的概率，指定为线性时序逻辑 (LTL) 公式。为了解决这个问题，我们针对 LTL 控制目标提出了一种基于加速模型的强化学习 (RL) 算法，该算法能够比相关方法更快地学习控制策略。它的样本效率依赖于对可能有助于任务满意度的方向的偏向探索。这是通过利用 LTL 任务的自动机表示以及持续学习的 MDP 模型来实现的。最后，我们提供了比较实验，证明了所提出的方法与针对 LTL 目标的最新 RL 方法的样本效率。 本文提出了一种加速的基于模型的强化学习算法，用于为移动机器人学习满足时间逻辑控制任务的高效策略。 Yiannis Kantaros cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Gaia Saveri,Luca Bortolussi
title: Graph Neural Networks for Propositional Model Counting
title_zh: 用于命题模型计数的图神经网络
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been recently leveraged to solve several logical reasoning tasks. Nevertheless, counting problems such as propositional model counting (#SAT) are still mostly approached with traditional solvers. Here we tackle this gap by presenting an architecture based on the GNN framework for belief propagation (BP) of Kuch et al., extended with self-attentive GNN and trained to approximately solve the #SAT problem. We ran a thorough experimental investigation, showing that our model, trained on a small set of random Boolean formulae, is able to scale effectively to much larger problem sizes, with comparable or better performances of state of the art approximate solvers. Moreover, we show that it can be efficiently fine-tuned to provide good generalization results on different formulae distributions, such as those coming from SAT-encoded combinatorial problems.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been recently leveraged to solve several logical reasoning tasks. Nevertheless, counting problems such as propositional model counting (#SAT) are still mostly approached with traditional solvers. Here we tackle this gap by presenting an architecture based on the GNN framework for belief propagation (BP) of Kuch et al., extended with self-attentive GNN and trained to approximately solve the #SAT problem. We ran a thorough experimental investigation, showing that our model, trained on a small set of random Boolean formulae, is able to scale effectively to much larger problem sizes, with comparable or better performances of state of the art approximate solvers. Moreover, we show that it can be efficiently fine-tuned to provide good generalization results on different formulae distributions, such as those coming from SAT-encoded combinatorial problems.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）最近被用来解决一些逻辑推理任务。尽管如此，诸如命题模型计数（#SAT）之类的计数问题仍然主要使用传统求解器来解决。在这里，我们通过提出一种基于 Kuch 等人的信念传播 (BP) GNN 框架的架构来解决这一差距，该架构通过自注意力 GNN 进行扩展，并经过训练来近似解决 #SAT 问题。我们进行了彻底的实验调查，表明我们的模型经过一小组随机布尔公式的训练，能够有效地扩展到更大的问题规模，并且具有与最先进的近似求解器相当或更好的性能。此外，我们表明它可以有效地进行微调，以在不同的公式分布上提供良好的泛化结果，例如来自 SAT 编码组合问题的公式分布。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的架构，用于近似求解命题模型计数（#SAT）问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管图神经网络在逻辑推理任务中取得进展，但#SAT等计数问题仍主要依赖传统求解器，存在效率和扩展性不足的问题。
AI.method: 扩展了基于信念传播（BP）的GNN框架，结合自注意力机制，并通过随机布尔公式训练模型以近似解决#SAT问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在较大规模问题上表现与先进近似求解器相当或更优，并能通过微调适应不同公式分布（如组合优化问题编码的SAT实例）。
AI.conclusion: GNN框架为#SAT问题提供了有效的近似求解方法，且具备良好的泛化能力，展示了神经网络在组合优化领域的潜力。

authors_text: Tobia Marcucci,Mark Petersen,David von Wrangel,Russ Tedrake
title: Motion Planning around Obstacles with Convex Optimization
title_zh: 使用凸优化围绕障碍物进行运动规划
abstract: Trajectory optimization offers mature tools for motion planning in high-dimensional spaces under dynamic constraints. However, when facing complex configuration spaces, cluttered with obstacles, roboticists typically fall back to sampling-based planners that struggle in very high dimensions and with continuous differential constraints. Indeed, obstacles are the source of many textbook examples of problematic nonconvexities in the trajectory-optimization problem. Here we show that convex optimization can, in fact, be used to reliably plan trajectories around obstacles. Specifically, we consider planning problems with collision-avoidance constraints, as well as cost penalties and hard constraints on the shape, the duration, and the velocity of the trajectory. Combining the properties of Bézier curves with a recently-proposed framework for finding shortest paths in Graphs of Convex Sets (GCS), we formulate the planning problem as a compact mixed-integer optimization. In stark contrast with existing mixed-integer planners, the convex relaxation of our programs is very tight, and a cheap rounding of its solution is typically sufficient to design globally-optimal trajectories. This reduces the mixed-integer program back to a simple convex optimization, and automatically provides optimality bounds for the planned trajectories. We name the proposed planner GCS, after its underlying optimization framework. We demonstrate GCS in simulation on a variety of robotic platforms, including a quadrotor flying through buildings and a dual-arm manipulator (with fourteen degrees of freedom) moving in a confined space. Using numerical experiments on a seven-degree-of-freedom manipulator, we show that GCS can outperform widely-used sampling-based planners by finding higher-quality trajectories in less time.
summary: Trajectory optimization offers mature tools for motion planning in high-dimensional spaces under dynamic constraints. However, when facing complex configuration spaces, cluttered with obstacles, roboticists typically fall back to sampling-based planners that struggle in very high dimensions and with continuous differential constraints. Indeed, obstacles are the source of many textbook examples of problematic nonconvexities in the trajectory-optimization problem. Here we show that convex optimization can, in fact, be used to reliably plan trajectories around obstacles. Specifically, we consider planning problems with collision-avoidance constraints, as well as cost penalties and hard constraints on the shape, the duration, and the velocity of the trajectory. Combining the properties of Bézier curves with a recently-proposed framework for finding shortest paths in Graphs of Convex Sets (GCS), we formulate the planning problem as a compact mixed-integer optimization. In stark contrast with existing mixed-integer planners, the convex relaxation of our programs is very tight, and a cheap rounding of its solution is typically sufficient to design globally-optimal trajectories. This reduces the mixed-integer program back to a simple convex optimization, and automatically provides optimality bounds for the planned trajectories. We name the proposed planner GCS, after its underlying optimization framework. We demonstrate GCS in simulation on a variety of robotic platforms, including a quadrotor flying through buildings and a dual-arm manipulator (with fourteen degrees of freedom) moving in a confined space. Using numerical experiments on a seven-degree-of-freedom manipulator, we show that GCS can outperform widely-used sampling-based planners by finding higher-quality trajectories in less time.
abstract_zh: 轨迹优化为动态约束下的高维空间运动规划提供了成熟的工具。然而，当面对充满障碍物的复杂配置空间时，机器人专家通常会求助于基于采样的规划器，这些规划器在非常高的维度和连续的微分约束下挣扎。事实上，障碍是轨迹优化问题中许多有问题的非凸性教科书示例的根源。在这里，我们展示了凸优化实际上可以用于可靠地规划围绕障碍物的轨迹。具体来说，我们考虑具有防撞约束的规划问题，以及成本惩罚和轨迹形状、持续时间和速度的硬约束。将贝塞尔曲线的属性与最近提出的用于在凸集图（GCS）中查找最短路径的框架相结合，我们将规划问题表述为紧凑的混合整数优化。与现有的混合整数规划器形成鲜明对比，我们的程序的凸松弛非常严格，并且其解决方案的廉价舍入通常足以设计全局最优轨迹。这将混合整数程序简化回简单的凸优化，并自动提供计划轨迹的最优性界限。我们根据其底层优化框架将提议的规划器命名为 GCS。我们在各种机器人平台上进行模拟演示 GCS，包括飞越建筑物的四旋翼飞行器和在有限空间中移动的双臂机械臂（具有十四个自由度）。通过在七自由度机械臂上进行数值实验，我们表明 GCS 可以在更短的时间内找到更高质量的轨迹，从而优于广泛使用的基于采样的规划器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于凸优化的运动规划方法，用于在复杂障碍环境中生成满足约束的轨迹。
AI.motivation: 传统轨迹优化在高维空间和动态约束下表现良好，但面对障碍物时需依赖采样规划器，后者在高维和连续微分约束下效率低下且难以保证最优性。
AI.method: 结合Bézier曲线与凸集图框架（GCS），将避障约束、轨迹形状及速度约束转化为紧致的混合整数优化问题，并通过凸松弛和快速近似求解实现全局最优轨迹生成。
AI.result: 在四旋翼飞行器和双臂机械臂等多平台仿真中验证了GCS方法，相比传统采样规划器在轨迹质量与计算时间上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: GCS方法通过凸优化框架有效解决了障碍避让中的非凸性问题，为高维复杂环境下的运动规划提供了高效且具有理论保证的解决方案。

We name the proposed planner GCS, after its underlying optimization framework. Using numerical experiments on a seven-degree-of-freedom manipulator, we show that GCS can outperform widely-used sampling-based planners by finding higher-quality trajectories in less time. 轨迹优化为动态约束下的高维空间运动规划提供了成熟的工具。然而，当面对充满障碍物的复杂配置空间时，机器人专家通常会求助于基于采样的规划器，这些规划器在非常高的维度和连续的微分约束下挣扎。事实上，障碍是轨迹优化问题中许多有问题的非凸性教科书示例的根源。在这里，我们展示了凸优化实际上可以用于可靠地规划围绕障碍物的轨迹。具体来说，我们考虑具有防撞约束的规划问题，以及成本惩罚和轨迹形状、持续时间和速度的硬约束。将贝塞尔曲线的属性与最近提出的用于在凸集图（GCS）中查找最短路径的框架相结合，我们将规划问题表述为紧凑的混合整数优化。与现有的混合整数规划器形成鲜明对比，我们的程序的凸松弛非常严格，并且其解决方案的廉价舍入通常足以设计全局最优轨迹。这将混合整数程序简化回简单的凸优化，并自动提供计划轨迹的最优性界限。我们根据其底层优化框架将提议的规划器命名为 GCS。我们在各种机器人平台上进行模拟演示 GCS，包括飞越建筑物的四旋翼飞行器和在有限空间中移动的双臂机械臂（具有十四个自由度）。通过在七自由度机械臂上进行数值实验，我们表明 GCS 可以在更短的时间内找到更高质量的轨迹，从而优于广泛使用的基于采样的规划器。 本文提出一种基于凸优化的运动规划方法，用于在复杂障碍环境中生成满足约束的轨迹。 Tobia Marcucci,Mark Petersen,David von Wrangel,Russ Tedrake cs.RO

authors_text: Xu Tan,Jiawei Chen,Haohe Liu,Jian Cong,Chen Zhang,Yanqing Liu,Xi Wang,Yichong Leng,Yuanhao Yi,Lei He,Frank Soong,Tao Qin,Sheng Zhao,Tie-Yan Liu
title: NaturalSpeech: End-to-End Text to Speech Synthesis with Human-Level Quality
title_zh: NaturalSpeech：具有人类水平质量的端到端文本到语音合成
abstract: Text to speech (TTS) has made rapid progress in both academia and industry in recent years. Some questions naturally arise that whether a TTS system can achieve human-level quality, how to define/judge that quality and how to achieve it. In this paper, we answer these questions by first defining the human-level quality based on the statistical significance of subjective measure and introducing appropriate guidelines to judge it, and then developing a TTS system called NaturalSpeech that achieves human-level quality on a benchmark dataset. Specifically, we leverage a variational autoencoder (VAE) for end-to-end text to waveform generation, with several key modules to enhance the capacity of the prior from text and reduce the complexity of the posterior from speech, including phoneme pre-training, differentiable duration modeling, bidirectional prior/posterior modeling, and a memory mechanism in VAE. Experiment evaluations on popular LJSpeech dataset show that our proposed NaturalSpeech achieves -0.01 CMOS (comparative mean opinion score) to human recordings at the sentence level, with Wilcoxon signed rank test at p-level p >> 0.05, which demonstrates no statistically significant difference from human recordings for the first time on this dataset.
summary: Text to speech (TTS) has made rapid progress in both academia and industry in recent years. Some questions naturally arise that whether a TTS system can achieve human-level quality, how to define/judge that quality and how to achieve it. In this paper, we answer these questions by first defining the human-level quality based on the statistical significance of subjective measure and introducing appropriate guidelines to judge it, and then developing a TTS system called NaturalSpeech that achieves human-level quality on a benchmark dataset. Specifically, we leverage a variational autoencoder (VAE) for end-to-end text to waveform generation, with several key modules to enhance the capacity of the prior from text and reduce the complexity of the posterior from speech, including phoneme pre-training, differentiable duration modeling, bidirectional prior/posterior modeling, and a memory mechanism in VAE. Experiment evaluations on popular LJSpeech dataset show that our proposed NaturalSpeech achieves -0.01 CMOS (comparative mean opinion score) to human recordings at the sentence level, with Wilcoxon signed rank test at p-level p >> 0.05, which demonstrates no statistically significant difference from human recordings for the first time on this dataset.
abstract_zh: 近年来，文本转语音（TTS）在学术界和工业界都取得了快速进展。自然会出现一些问题：TTS 系统是否可以达到人类水平的质量、如何定义/判断该质量以及如何实现它。在本文中，我们首先根据主观测量的统计显着性定义人类水平的质量，并引入适当的准则来判断它，然后开发一个名为 NaturalSpeech 的 TTS 系统，在基准数据集上实现人类水平的质量，从而回答这些问题。具体来说，我们利用变分自动编码器（VAE）进行端到端文本到波形生成，并使用几个关键模块来增强文本先验的能力并降低语音后验的复杂性，包括音素预训练、可微持续时间建模、双向先验/后验建模以及 VAE 中的记忆机制。对流行的 LJSpeech 数据集的实验评估表明，我们提出的 NaturalSpeech 在句子级别与人类录音相比达到了 -0.01 CMOS（比较平均意见得分），Wilcoxon 符号秩检验在 p 级 p >> 0.05，这首次表明在该数据集上与人类录音没有统计上的显着差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的文本到语音合成系统NaturalSpeech，实现了接近人类水平的语音合成质量。
AI.motivation: 尽管文本到语音技术发展迅速，但如何定义和实现人类水平的语音质量仍是未解难题，亟需建立评估标准并开发相应技术。
AI.method: 基于变分自编码器（VAE）框架，引入音素预训练、可微分时长建模、双向先验/后验建模及记忆机制等模块，优化文本先验信息提取与语音后验复杂度降低。
AI.result: 在LJSpeech数据集上，NaturalSpeech在句子级别达到-0.01 CMOS分（与人类录音无显著差异，Wilcoxon检验p>>0.05），首次实现该数据集上与人类语音无统计学差异。
AI.conclusion: NaturalSpeech通过创新架构和评估体系，首次实现基准数据集上人类水平语音合成，为TTS领域树立新标杆。

authors_text: Rabindra Nath Nandi,Firoj Alam,Preslav Nakov
title: TeamX@DravidianLangTech-ACL2022: A Comparative Analysis for Troll-Based Meme Classification
title_zh: TeamX@DravidianLangTech-ACL2022：基于 Troll 的模因分类的比较分析
comment: Accepted at DravidianLangTech-ACL2022 (Colocated with ACL-2022). disinformation, misinformation, factuality, harmfulness, fake news, propaganda, multimodality, text, images, videos, network structure, temporality
comments: Accepted at DravidianLangTech-ACL2022 (Colocated with ACL-2022). disinformation, misinformation, factuality, harmfulness, fake news, propaganda, multimodality, text, images, videos, network structure, temporality
abstract: The spread of fake news, propaganda, misinformation, disinformation, and harmful content online raised concerns among social media platforms, government agencies, policymakers, and society as a whole. This is because such harmful or abusive content leads to several consequences to people such as physical, emotional, relational, and financial. Among different harmful content \textit{trolling-based} online content is one of them, where the idea is to post a message that is provocative, offensive, or menacing with an intent to mislead the audience. The content can be textual, visual, a combination of both, or a meme. In this study, we provide a comparative analysis of troll-based memes classification using the textual, visual, and multimodal content. We report several interesting findings in terms of code-mixed text, multimodal setting, and combining an additional dataset, which shows improvements over the majority baseline.
summary: The spread of fake news, propaganda, misinformation, disinformation, and harmful content online raised concerns among social media platforms, government agencies, policymakers, and society as a whole. This is because such harmful or abusive content leads to several consequences to people such as physical, emotional, relational, and financial. Among different harmful content \textit{trolling-based} online content is one of them, where the idea is to post a message that is provocative, offensive, or menacing with an intent to mislead the audience. The content can be textual, visual, a combination of both, or a meme. In this study, we provide a comparative analysis of troll-based memes classification using the textual, visual, and multimodal content. We report several interesting findings in terms of code-mixed text, multimodal setting, and combining an additional dataset, which shows improvements over the majority baseline.
abstract_zh: 假新闻、宣传、错误信息、虚假信息和有害内容在网上的传播引起了社交媒体平台、政府机构、政策制定者和整个社会的担忧。这是因为此类有害或辱骂性内容会给人们带来多种后果，例如身体、情感、关系和财务。在不同的有害内容中，\textit{基于恶意攻击的}在线内容就是其中之一，其想法是发布挑衅性、冒犯性或威胁性的消息，意图误导观众。内容可以是文本的、视觉的、两者的组合或模因。在这项研究中，我们使用文本、视觉和多模式内容对基于巨魔的模因分类进行了比较分析。我们报告了在代码混合文本、多模式设置和组合附加数据集方面的一些有趣的发现，这些发现显示了对大多数基线的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是比较文本、视觉和多模态方法在基于网络欺凌的meme分类中的效果
AI.motivation: 由于网络上虚假信息和有害内容（如挑衅性内容）的传播，需要有效分类方法以减少其负面影响
AI.method: 采用文本、视觉和多模态分析方法，并结合额外数据集进行分类模型的比较实验
AI.result: 实验结果显示，多模态方法和结合额外数据集的模型在分类准确率上优于单一模态方法
AI.conclusion: 多模态方法结合额外数据集能有效提升基于troll的meme分类性能，为有害内容检测提供新思路

authors_text: Rabindra Nath Nandi,Firoj Alam,Preslav Nakov
title: Detecting the Role of an Entity in Harmful Memes: Techniques and Their Limitations
title_zh: 检测实体在有害模因中的角色：技术及其局限性
comment: Accepted at CONSTRAINT 2022 (Colocated with ACL-2022), disinformation, misinformation, factuality, harmfulness, fake news, propaganda, multimodality, text, images, videos, network structure, temporality
comments: Accepted at CONSTRAINT 2022 (Colocated with ACL-2022), disinformation, misinformation, factuality, harmfulness, fake news, propaganda, multimodality, text, images, videos, network structure, temporality
abstract: Harmful or abusive online content has been increasing over time, raising concerns for social media platforms, government agencies, and policymakers. Such harmful or abusive content can have major negative impact on society, e.g., cyberbullying can lead to suicides, rumors about COVID-19 can cause vaccine hesitance, promotion of fake cures for COVID-19 can cause health harms and deaths. The content that is posted and shared online can be textual, visual, or a combination of both, e.g., in a meme. Here, we describe our experiments in detecting the roles of the entities (hero, villain, victim) in harmful memes, which is part of the CONSTRAINT-2022 shared task, as well as our system for the task. We further provide a comparative analysis of different experimental settings (i.e., unimodal, multimodal, attention, and augmentation). For reproducibility, we make our experimental code publicly available. \url{https://github.com/robi56/harmful_memes_block_fusion}
summary: Harmful or abusive online content has been increasing over time, raising concerns for social media platforms, government agencies, and policymakers. Such harmful or abusive content can have major negative impact on society, e.g., cyberbullying can lead to suicides, rumors about COVID-19 can cause vaccine hesitance, promotion of fake cures for COVID-19 can cause health harms and deaths. The content that is posted and shared online can be textual, visual, or a combination of both, e.g., in a meme. Here, we describe our experiments in detecting the roles of the entities (hero, villain, victim) in harmful memes, which is part of the CONSTRAINT-2022 shared task, as well as our system for the task. We further provide a comparative analysis of different experimental settings (i.e., unimodal, multimodal, attention, and augmentation). For reproducibility, we make our experimental code publicly available. \url{https://github.com/robi56/harmful_memes_block_fusion}
abstract_zh: 随着时间的推移，有害或辱骂性的在线内容不断增加，引发了社交媒体平台、政府机构和政策制定者的担忧。此类有害或辱骂性内容可能会对社会产生重大负面影响，例如，网络欺凌可能导致自杀，有关 COVID-19 的谣言可能会导致疫苗犹豫，宣传虚假的 COVID-19 疗法可能会导致健康伤害和死亡。在线发布和共享的内容可以是文本、视觉或两者的组合，例如在模因中。在这里，我们描述了检测有害模因中实体（英雄、恶棍、受害者）角色的实验，这是 CONSTRAINT-2022 共享任务的一部分，以及我们用于该任务的系统。我们进一步提供了不同实验设置（即单模态、多模态、注意力和增强）的比较分析。为了可重复性，我们公开了我们的实验代码。 \url{https://github.com/robi56/harmful_memes_block_fusion}

AI.motivation: 有害网络内容（如网络欺凌、虚假信息）对社会造成严重负面影响，需通过技术手段识别其内容角色以有效管控。
AI.method: 基于CONSTRAINT-2022任务，采用多模态模型结合注意力机制与数据增强技术，对比单模态、多模态等实验设置。
AI.result: 提出系统参与共享任务，公开代码并分析不同方法性能差异，但未明确具体准确率指标。
AI.conclusion: 多模态方法优于单模态，但实体角色检测仍面临语境复杂性等挑战，需进一步优化技术手段。

search_text: Detecting the Role of an Entity in Harmful Memes: Techniques and Their Limitations 检测实体在有害模因中的角色：技术及其局限性 Harmful or abusive online content has been increasing over time, raising concerns for social media platforms, government agencies, and policymakers. Such harmful or abusive content can have major negative impact on society, e.g., cyberbullying can lead to suicides, rumors about COVID-19 can cause vaccine hesitance, promotion of fake cures for COVID-19 can cause health harms and deaths. The content that is posted and shared online can be textual, visual, or a combination of both, e.g., in a meme. Here, we describe our experiments in detecting the roles of the entities (hero, villain, victim) in harmful memes, which is part of the CONSTRAINT-2022 shared task, as well as our system for the task. We further provide a comparative analysis of different experimental settings (i.e., unimodal, multimodal, attention, and augmentation). For reproducibility, we make our experimental code publicly available. \url{https://github.com/robi56/harmful_memes_block_fusion} 随着时间的推移，有害或辱骂性的在线内容不断增加，引发了社交媒体平台、政府机构和政策制定者的担忧。此类有害或辱骂性内容可能会对社会产生重大负面影响，例如，网络欺凌可能导致自杀，有关 COVID-19 的谣言可能会导致疫苗犹豫，宣传虚假的 COVID-19 疗法可能会导致健康伤害和死亡。在线发布和共享的内容可以是文本、视觉或两者的组合，例如在模因中。在这里，我们描述了检测有害模因中实体（英雄、恶棍、受害者）角色的实验，这是 CONSTRAINT-2022 共享任务的一部分，以及我们用于该任务的系统。我们进一步提供了不同实验设置（即单模态、多模态、注意力和增强）的比较分析。为了可重复性，我们公开了我们的实验代码。 \url{https://github.com/robi56/harmful_memes_block_fusion} 本文旨在检测有害表情包中实体的角色（如英雄、反派、受害者），并比较不同技术方法的效果。 Rabindra Nath Nandi,Firoj Alam,Preslav Nakov cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.MM,cs.SI

authors_text: Hamza Rami,Matthieu Ospici,Stéphane Lathuilière
title: Online Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于人员重新识别的在线无监督域适应
comment: To appear in the IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshop (CVPR-W) on Continual Learning in Computer Vision (CLVision) 2022
comments: To appear in the IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshop (CVPR-W) on Continual Learning in Computer Vision (CLVision) 2022
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation for person re-identification (Person Re-ID) is the task of transferring the learned knowledge on the labeled source domain to the unlabeled target domain. Most of the recent papers that address this problem adopt an offline training setting. More precisely, the training of the Re-ID model is done assuming that we have access to the complete training target domain data set. In this paper, we argue that the target domain generally consists of a stream of data in a practical real-world application, where data is continuously increasing from the different network's cameras. The Re-ID solutions are also constrained by confidentiality regulations stating that the collected data can be stored for only a limited period, hence the model can no longer get access to previously seen target images. Therefore, we present a new yet practical online setting for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for person Re-ID with two main constraints: Online Adaptation and Privacy Protection. We then adapt and evaluate the state-of-the-art UDA algorithms on this new online setting using the well-known Market-1501, Duke, and MSMT17 benchmarks.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation for person re-identification (Person Re-ID) is the task of transferring the learned knowledge on the labeled source domain to the unlabeled target domain. Most of the recent papers that address this problem adopt an offline training setting. More precisely, the training of the Re-ID model is done assuming that we have access to the complete training target domain data set. In this paper, we argue that the target domain generally consists of a stream of data in a practical real-world application, where data is continuously increasing from the different network's cameras. The Re-ID solutions are also constrained by confidentiality regulations stating that the collected data can be stored for only a limited period, hence the model can no longer get access to previously seen target images. Therefore, we present a new yet practical online setting for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for person Re-ID with two main constraints: Online Adaptation and Privacy Protection. We then adapt and evaluate the state-of-the-art UDA algorithms on this new online setting using the well-known Market-1501, Duke, and MSMT17 benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 用于人员重新识别的无监督域适应（Person Re-ID）是将标记源域上学到的知识转移到未标记目标域的任务。最近解决这个问题的论文大多采用离线训练设置。更准确地说，Re-ID 模型的训练是在假设我们可以访问完整的训练目标域数据集的情况下完成的。在本文中，我们认为目标域通常由实际应用中的数据流组成，其中来自不同网络摄像机的数据不断增加。 Re-ID 解决方案还受到保密法规的限制，规定收集的数据只能存储有限的时间，因此模型无法再访问以前看到的目标图像。因此，我们提出了一种新的但实用的在线设置，用于人员重识别的无监督域适应，具有两个主要约束：在线适应和隐私保护。然后，我们使用著名的 Market-1501、Duke 和 MSMT17 基准测试在这个新的在线设置上调整和评估最先进的 UDA 算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线无监督领域自适应方法，用于解决实际场景中隐私保护约束下的行人重识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多采用离线训练设置，假设可访问完整的目标域数据集，但实际应用中目标域数据是持续流式输入且受隐私法规限制，无法长期存储历史数据。
AI.method: 设计了在线自适应与隐私保护双重约束的新框架，将主流UDA算法适配到该设置，并在Market-1501、Duke和MSMT17基准上进行验证。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提框架在流式数据和隐私限制下的有效性，证明了其在实际场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为行人重识别的在线无监督领域自适应提供了符合现实约束的解决方案，推动了该技术在实际安防场景中的应用。

authors_text: Ben Eisner,Harry Zhang,David Held
title: FlowBot3D: Learning 3D Articulation Flow to Manipulate Articulated Objects
title_zh: FlowBot3D：学习 3D 关节流来操纵关节对象
comment: Accepted to Robotics Science and Systems (RSS) 2022, Best Paper Finalist
comments: Accepted to Robotics Science and Systems (RSS) 2022, Best Paper Finalist
abstract: We explore a novel method to perceive and manipulate 3D articulated objects that generalizes to enable a robot to articulate unseen classes of objects. We propose a vision-based system that learns to predict the potential motions of the parts of a variety of articulated objects to guide downstream motion planning of the system to articulate the objects. To predict the object motions, we train a neural network to output a dense vector field representing the point-wise motion direction of the points in the point cloud under articulation. We then deploy an analytical motion planner based on this vector field to achieve a policy that yields maximum articulation. We train the vision system entirely in simulation, and we demonstrate the capability of our system to generalize to unseen object instances and novel categories in both simulation and the real world, deploying our policy on a Sawyer robot with no finetuning. Results show that our system achieves state-of-the-art performance in both simulated and real-world experiments.
summary: We explore a novel method to perceive and manipulate 3D articulated objects that generalizes to enable a robot to articulate unseen classes of objects. We propose a vision-based system that learns to predict the potential motions of the parts of a variety of articulated objects to guide downstream motion planning of the system to articulate the objects. To predict the object motions, we train a neural network to output a dense vector field representing the point-wise motion direction of the points in the point cloud under articulation. We then deploy an analytical motion planner based on this vector field to achieve a policy that yields maximum articulation. We train the vision system entirely in simulation, and we demonstrate the capability of our system to generalize to unseen object instances and novel categories in both simulation and the real world, deploying our policy on a Sawyer robot with no finetuning. Results show that our system achieves state-of-the-art performance in both simulated and real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们探索了一种感知和操纵 3D 铰接物体的新颖方法，该方法可以概括为使机器人能够铰接看不见的物体类别。我们提出了一种基于视觉的系统，该系统学习预测各种铰接物体各部分的潜在运动，以指导系统的下游运动规划来铰接物体。为了预测物体运动，我们训练一个神经网络来输出一个密集矢量场，表示关节点云中点的逐点运动方向。然后，我们基于该矢量场部署一个分析运动规划器，以实现产生最大清晰度的策略。我们完全在模拟中训练视觉系统，并展示了我们的系统泛化到模拟和现实世界中未见过的对象实例和新颖类别的能力，将我们的策略部署在 Sawyer 机器人上，无需进行微调。结果表明，我们的系统在模拟和现实实验中都实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlowBot3D系统，通过学习3D关节物体的运动流场，使机器人能够泛化操作未见过的物体类别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以泛化到新物体类别且依赖精确3D模型，需开发无需微调即可操作未知物体的通用方案。
AI.method: 训练神经网络预测点云中各点的运动方向向量场，结合解析运动规划器生成最大关节策略，完全在仿真中训练后直接部署到实物机器人。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界实验中均达到SOTA性能，成功操作多种未见过的物体实例和新类别。
AI.conclusion: 基于运动流场的学习方法有效实现了机器人对未知3D关节物体的通用操作，验证了仿真到现实的泛化能力。

conclusion: 基于运动流场的学习方法有效实现了机器人对未知3D关节物体的通用操作，验证了仿真到现实的泛化能力。
search_text: FlowBot3D: Learning 3D Articulation Flow to Manipulate Articulated Objects FlowBot3D：学习 3D 关节流来操纵关节对象 We explore a novel method to perceive and manipulate 3D articulated objects that generalizes to enable a robot to articulate unseen classes of objects. We propose a vision-based system that learns to predict the potential motions of the parts of a variety of articulated objects to guide downstream motion planning of the system to articulate the objects. To predict the object motions, we train a neural network to output a dense vector field representing the point-wise motion direction of the points in the point cloud under articulation. We then deploy an analytical motion planner based on this vector field to achieve a policy that yields maximum articulation. We train the vision system entirely in simulation, and we demonstrate the capability of our system to generalize to unseen object instances and novel categories in both simulation and the real world, deploying our policy on a Sawyer robot with no finetuning. Results show that our system achieves state-of-the-art performance in both simulated and real-world experiments. 我们探索了一种感知和操纵 3D 铰接物体的新颖方法，该方法可以概括为使机器人能够铰接看不见的物体类别。我们提出了一种基于视觉的系统，该系统学习预测各种铰接物体各部分的潜在运动，以指导系统的下游运动规划来铰接物体。为了预测物体运动，我们训练一个神经网络来输出一个密集矢量场，表示关节点云中点的逐点运动方向。然后，我们基于该矢量场部署一个分析运动规划器，以实现产生最大清晰度的策略。我们完全在模拟中训练视觉系统，并展示了我们的系统泛化到模拟和现实世界中未见过的对象实例和新颖类别的能力，将我们的策略部署在 Sawyer 机器人上，无需进行微调。结果表明，我们的系统在模拟和现实实验中都实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出FlowBot3D系统，通过学习3D关节物体的运动流场，使机器人能够泛化操作未见过的物体类别。 Ben Eisner,Harry Zhang,David Held cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Zeeshan Nisar,Jelica Vasiljević,Pierre Gançarski,Thomas Lampert
title: Towards Measuring Domain Shift in Histopathological Stain Translation in an Unsupervised Manner
title_zh: 以无监督的方式测量组织病理学染色翻译中的域转移
abstract: Domain shift in digital histopathology can occur when different stains or scanners are used, during stain translation, etc. A deep neural network trained on source data may not generalise well to data that has undergone some domain shift. An important step towards being robust to domain shift is the ability to detect and measure it. This article demonstrates that the PixelCNN and domain shift metric can be used to detect and quantify domain shift in digital histopathology, and they demonstrate a strong correlation with generalisation performance. These findings pave the way for a mechanism to infer the average performance of a model (trained on source data) on unseen and unlabelled target data.
summary: Domain shift in digital histopathology can occur when different stains or scanners are used, during stain translation, etc. A deep neural network trained on source data may not generalise well to data that has undergone some domain shift. An important step towards being robust to domain shift is the ability to detect and measure it. This article demonstrates that the PixelCNN and domain shift metric can be used to detect and quantify domain shift in digital histopathology, and they demonstrate a strong correlation with generalisation performance. These findings pave the way for a mechanism to infer the average performance of a model (trained on source data) on unseen and unlabelled target data.
abstract_zh: 当使用不同的染色剂或扫描仪、染色剂翻译等过程中，数字组织病理学中的域转移可能会发生。在源数据上训练的深度神经网络可能无法很好地推广到经历了某些域转移的数据。对域转移具有鲁棒性的一个重要步骤是能够检测和测量它。本文证明 PixelCNN 和域移位度量可用于检测和量化数字组织病理学中的域移位，并且它们与泛化性能具有很强的相关性。这些发现为推断模型（在源数据上训练）在未见和未标记的目标数据上的平均性能的机制铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在无监督地测量组织病理学染色转换中的领域偏移，以评估模型在目标数据上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 不同染色或扫描设备导致的领域偏移会影响模型泛化能力，检测和量化该偏移对提升模型鲁棒性至关重要。
AI.method: 采用PixelCNN模型结合领域偏移度量指标，通过无监督学习检测和量化染色转换过程中的领域偏移。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法能有效检测领域偏移，并与模型在目标数据上的泛化性能呈现显著相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为无监督评估模型在未知目标数据上的性能提供了可行方法，有助于提升数字病理学中模型的适应性。

authors_text: Chia-Wen Kuo,Zsolt Kira
title: Beyond a Pre-Trained Object Detector: Cross-Modal Textual and Visual Context for Image Captioning
title_zh: 超越预先训练的目标检测器：用于图像字幕的跨模式文本和视觉上下文
abstract: Significant progress has been made on visual captioning, largely relying on pre-trained features and later fixed object detectors that serve as rich inputs to auto-regressive models. A key limitation of such methods, however, is that the output of the model is conditioned only on the object detector's outputs. The assumption that such outputs can represent all necessary information is unrealistic, especially when the detector is transferred across datasets. In this work, we reason about the graphical model induced by this assumption, and propose to add an auxiliary input to represent missing information such as object relationships. We specifically propose to mine attributes and relationships from the Visual Genome dataset and condition the captioning model on them. Crucially, we propose (and show to be important) the use of a multi-modal pre-trained model (CLIP) to retrieve such contextual descriptions. Further, object detector models are frozen and do not have sufficient richness to allow the captioning model to properly ground them. As a result, we propose to condition both the detector and description outputs on the image, and show qualitatively and quantitatively that this can improve grounding. We validate our method on image captioning, perform thorough analyses of each component and importance of the pre-trained multi-modal model, and demonstrate significant improvements over the current state of the art, specifically +7.5% in CIDEr and +1.3% in BLEU-4 metrics.
summary: Significant progress has been made on visual captioning, largely relying on pre-trained features and later fixed object detectors that serve as rich inputs to auto-regressive models. A key limitation of such methods, however, is that the output of the model is conditioned only on the object detector's outputs. The assumption that such outputs can represent all necessary information is unrealistic, especially when the detector is transferred across datasets. In this work, we reason about the graphical model induced by this assumption, and propose to add an auxiliary input to represent missing information such as object relationships. We specifically propose to mine attributes and relationships from the Visual Genome dataset and condition the captioning model on them. Crucially, we propose (and show to be important) the use of a multi-modal pre-trained model (CLIP) to retrieve such contextual descriptions. Further, object detector models are frozen and do not have sufficient richness to allow the captioning model to properly ground them. As a result, we propose to condition both the detector and description outputs on the image, and show qualitatively and quantitatively that this can improve grounding. We validate our method on image captioning, perform thorough analyses of each component and importance of the pre-trained multi-modal model, and demonstrate significant improvements over the current state of the art, specifically +7.5% in CIDEr and +1.3% in BLEU-4 metrics.
abstract_zh: 视觉字幕方面已经取得了重大进展，很大程度上依赖于预先训练的特征和后来的固定对象检测器，这些检测器可以作为自回归模型的丰富输入。然而，此类方法的一个关键限制是模型的输出仅取决于对象检测器的输出。假设这样的输出可以代表所有必要的信息是不现实的，特别是当检测器跨数据集传输时。在这项工作中，我们对由该假设引发的图形模型进行推理，并建议添加辅助输入来表示缺失的信息（例如对象关系）。我们特别建议从视觉基因组数据集中挖掘属性和关系，并根据它们来调整字幕模型。至关重要的是，我们建议（并且表明很重要）使用多模态预训练模型（CLIP）来检索此类上下文描述。此外，对象检测器模型被冻结，并且没有足够的丰富性来允许字幕模型正确地接地它们。因此，我们建议在图像上调节检测器和描述输出，并定性和定量地表明这可以改善接地。我们验证了我们的图像字幕方法，对每个组件和预训练多模态模型的重要性进行了全面分析，并展示了相对于当前技术水平的显着改进，特别是 CIDEr 指标提高了 7.5%，BLEU-4 指标指标提高了 1.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种超越预训练目标检测器的图像字幕生成方法，通过引入跨模态文本和视觉上下文信息提升模型表现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖固定目标检测器输出作为输入，但其无法完整表征场景信息，尤其在跨数据集迁移时存在信息缺失问题。
AI.method: 从Visual Genome挖掘属性与关系信息，结合CLIP多模态预训练模型提取上下文描述，并联合条件化目标检测器与描述输出以增强 grounding 效果。
AI.result: 在图像字幕任务中实现CIDEr+7.5%、BLEU-4+1.3%的显著提升，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入跨模态上下文信息与CLIP模型，可有效补充目标检测器的局限性，推动图像字幕生成技术发展。

search_text: Beyond a Pre-Trained Object Detector: Cross-Modal Textual and Visual Context for Image Captioning 超越预先训练的目标检测器：用于图像字幕的跨模式文本和视觉上下文 Significant progress has been made on visual captioning, largely relying on pre-trained features and later fixed object detectors that serve as rich inputs to auto-regressive models. A key limitation of such methods, however, is that the output of the model is conditioned only on the object detector's outputs. The assumption that such outputs can represent all necessary information is unrealistic, especially when the detector is transferred across datasets. In this work, we reason about the graphical model induced by this assumption, and propose to add an auxiliary input to represent missing information such as object relationships. We specifically propose to mine attributes and relationships from the Visual Genome dataset and condition the captioning model on them. Crucially, we propose (and show to be important) the use of a multi-modal pre-trained model (CLIP) to retrieve such contextual descriptions. Further, object detector models are frozen and do not have sufficient richness to allow the captioning model to properly ground them. As a result, we propose to condition both the detector and description outputs on the image, and show qualitatively and quantitatively that this can improve grounding. We validate our method on image captioning, perform thorough analyses of each component and importance of the pre-trained multi-modal model, and demonstrate significant improvements over the current state of the art, specifically +7.5% in CIDEr and +1.3% in BLEU-4 metrics. 视觉字幕方面已经取得了重大进展，很大程度上依赖于预先训练的特征和后来的固定对象检测器，这些检测器可以作为自回归模型的丰富输入。然而，此类方法的一个关键限制是模型的输出仅取决于对象检测器的输出。假设这样的输出可以代表所有必要的信息是不现实的，特别是当检测器跨数据集传输时。在这项工作中，我们对由该假设引发的图形模型进行推理，并建议添加辅助输入来表示缺失的信息（例如对象关系）。我们特别建议从视觉基因组数据集中挖掘属性和关系，并根据它们来调整字幕模型。至关重要的是，我们建议（并且表明很重要）使用多模态预训练模型（CLIP）来检索此类上下文描述。此外，对象检测器模型被冻结，并且没有足够的丰富性来允许字幕模型正确地接地它们。因此，我们建议在图像上调节检测器和描述输出，并定性和定量地表明这可以改善接地。我们验证了我们的图像字幕方法，对每个组件和预训练多模态模型的重要性进行了全面分析，并展示了相对于当前技术水平的显着改进，特别是 CIDEr 指标提高了 7.5%，BLEU-4 指标指标提高了 1.3%。 本文提出一种超越预训练目标检测器的图像字幕生成方法，通过引入跨模态文本和视觉上下文信息提升模型表现。 Chia-Wen Kuo,Zsolt Kira cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jason Harris,Danny Driess,Marc Toussaint
title: FC$^3$: Feasibility-Based Control Chain Coordination
title_zh: FC$^3$：基于可行性的控制链协调
abstract: Hierarchical coordination of controllers often uses symbolic state representations that fully abstract their underlying low-level controllers, treating them as "black boxes" to the symbolic action abstraction. This paper proposes a framework to realize robust behavior, which we call Feasibility-based Control Chain Coordination (FC$^3$). Our controllers expose the geometric features and constraints they operate on. Based on this, FC$^3$ can reason over the controllers' feasibility and their sequence feasibility. For a given task, FC$^3$ first automatically constructs a library of potential controller chains using a symbolic action tree, which is then used to coordinate controllers in a chain, evaluate task feasibility, as well as switching between controller chains if necessary. In several real-world experiments we demonstrate FC$^3$'s robustness and awareness of the task's feasibility through its own actions and gradual responses to different interferences.
summary: Hierarchical coordination of controllers often uses symbolic state representations that fully abstract their underlying low-level controllers, treating them as "black boxes" to the symbolic action abstraction. This paper proposes a framework to realize robust behavior, which we call Feasibility-based Control Chain Coordination (FC$^3$). Our controllers expose the geometric features and constraints they operate on. Based on this, FC$^3$ can reason over the controllers' feasibility and their sequence feasibility. For a given task, FC$^3$ first automatically constructs a library of potential controller chains using a symbolic action tree, which is then used to coordinate controllers in a chain, evaluate task feasibility, as well as switching between controller chains if necessary. In several real-world experiments we demonstrate FC$^3$'s robustness and awareness of the task's feasibility through its own actions and gradual responses to different interferences.
abstract_zh: 控制器的层次协调通常使用符号状态表示，完全抽象其底层低级控制器，将它们视为符号动作抽象的“黑匣子”。本文提出了一个实现鲁棒行为的框架，我们称之为基于可行性的控制链协调（FC$^3$）。我们的控制器公开了它们操作的几何特征和约束。在此基础上，FC$^3$可以推理出控制器的可行性及其序列的可行性。对于给定的任务，FC$^3$ 首先使用符号动作树自动构建潜在控制器链库，然后使用该库协调链中的控制器，评估任务可行性，以及在必要时在控制器链之间进行切换。在几个现实世界的实验中，我们通过自身的行动和对不同干扰的逐步响应来证明 FC$^3$ 的鲁棒性和对任务可行性的认识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可行性的控制链协调框架FC³，通过分析控制器的几何特征和约束，实现任务规划与控制器切换的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统分层控制器协调方法将底层控制器视为黑箱，难以有效处理任务可行性与动态干扰问题，导致协调效率与鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 构建符号动作树生成潜在控制器链库，基于控制器几何特征与约束进行可行性推理，并通过动态切换控制器链实现任务适应性调整。
AI.result: 在多个现实场景实验中验证了FC³对任务可行性的感知能力及鲁棒性，展示了其在应对干扰时的渐进响应与自适应协调效果。
AI.conclusion: FC³通过暴露控制器几何信息实现更精准的可行性评估与协调决策，为复杂任务控制提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: FC$^3$: Feasibility-Based Control Chain Coordination FC$^3$：基于可行性的控制链协调 Hierarchical coordination of controllers often uses symbolic state representations that fully abstract their underlying low-level controllers, treating them as "black boxes" to the symbolic action abstraction. This paper proposes a framework to realize robust behavior, which we call Feasibility-based Control Chain Coordination (FC$^3$). Our controllers expose the geometric features and constraints they operate on. Based on this, FC$^3$ can reason over the controllers' feasibility and their sequence feasibility. For a given task, FC$^3$ first automatically constructs a library of potential controller chains using a symbolic action tree, which is then used to coordinate controllers in a chain, evaluate task feasibility, as well as switching between controller chains if necessary. In several real-world experiments we demonstrate FC$^3$'s robustness and awareness of the task's feasibility through its own actions and gradual responses to different interferences. 控制器的层次协调通常使用符号状态表示，完全抽象其底层低级控制器，将它们视为符号动作抽象的“黑匣子”。本文提出了一个实现鲁棒行为的框架，我们称之为基于可行性的控制链协调（FC$^3$）。我们的控制器公开了它们操作的几何特征和约束。在此基础上，FC$^3$可以推理出控制器的可行性及其序列的可行性。对于给定的任务，FC$^3$ 首先使用符号动作树自动构建潜在控制器链库，然后使用该库协调链中的控制器，评估任务可行性，以及在必要时在控制器链之间进行切换。在几个现实世界的实验中，我们通过自身的行动和对不同干扰的逐步响应来证明 FC$^3$ 的鲁棒性和对任务可行性的认识。 本文提出了一种基于可行性的控制链协调框架FC³，通过分析控制器的几何特征和约束，实现任务规划与控制器切换的鲁棒性。 Jason Harris,Danny Driess,Marc Toussaint cs.RO

authors_text: Matthew Ivory
title: The Soft Skills of Software Learning Development: the Psychological Dimensions of Computing and Security Behaviours
title_zh: 软件学习开发的软技能：计算和安全行为的心理维度
abstract: When writing software code, developers typically prioritise functionality over security, either consciously or unconsciously through biases and heuristics. This is often attributed to tangible pressures such as client requirements, but little is understood about the psychological dimensions affecting security behaviours. There is an increasing demand for understanding how psychological skills affect secure software development and to understand how these skills themselves are developed during the learning process. This doctoral research explores this research space, with aims to identify important workplace-based skills for software developers; to identify and empirically investigate the soft skills behind these workplace skills in order to understand how soft skills can influence security behaviours; and, to identify ways to introduce and teach soft skills to computer science students to prepare the future generation of software developers. The motivations behind this research are presented alongside the work plan. Three distinct phases are introduced, along with planned analyses. Phase one is currently in the data collection stage, with the second phase in planning. Prior relevant work is highlighted, and the paper concludes with a presentation of preliminary results and the planned next steps.
summary: When writing software code, developers typically prioritise functionality over security, either consciously or unconsciously through biases and heuristics. This is often attributed to tangible pressures such as client requirements, but little is understood about the psychological dimensions affecting security behaviours. There is an increasing demand for understanding how psychological skills affect secure software development and to understand how these skills themselves are developed during the learning process. This doctoral research explores this research space, with aims to identify important workplace-based skills for software developers; to identify and empirically investigate the soft skills behind these workplace skills in order to understand how soft skills can influence security behaviours; and, to identify ways to introduce and teach soft skills to computer science students to prepare the future generation of software developers. The motivations behind this research are presented alongside the work plan. Three distinct phases are introduced, along with planned analyses. Phase one is currently in the data collection stage, with the second phase in planning. Prior relevant work is highlighted, and the paper concludes with a presentation of preliminary results and the planned next steps.
abstract_zh: 在编写软件代码时，开发人员通常会通过偏见和启发法有意识或无意识地优先考虑功能而不是安全。这通常归因于客户要求等有形压力，但人​​们对影响安全行为的心理因素却知之甚少。人们越来越需要了解心理技能如何影响安全软件开发以及了解这些技能本身如何在学习过程中发展。这项博士研究探索了这一研究空间，旨在为软件开发人员确定重要的基于工作场所的技能；识别并实证研究这些工作场所技能背后的软技能，以了解软技能如何影响安全行为；并且确定向计算机科学学生介绍和教授软技能的方法，为下一代软件开发人员做好准备。这项研究背后的动机与工作计划一起提出。介绍了三个不同的阶段以及计划的分析。目前第一阶段正处于数据收集阶段，第二阶段正在规划中。强调了先前的相关工作，文件最后介绍了初步结果和计划的后续步骤。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在探讨软件开发中软技能的心理维度，分析其对安全行为的影响，并研究如何培养计算机科学学生的软技能以提升未来软件开发者的安全实践能力。
AI.motivation: 开发人员在编写代码时往往优先考虑功能而非安全，但心理因素对安全行为的影响尚未被充分理解。研究希望通过探索软技能与安全行为的关系，填补这一领域知识空白，并为教育实践提供依据。
AI.method: 采用三阶段研究方法：第一阶段进行数据收集，第二阶段规划分析框架，第三阶段通过实证研究验证软技能与安全行为的关联性，并设计教学策略。
AI.result: 目前处于第一阶段数据收集阶段，初步结果尚未完全呈现，后续将通过分析验证软技能对安全行为的影响机制。
AI.conclusion: 研究初步表明软技能在安全开发中的潜在作用，后续计划进一步分析数据并提出针对计算机教育的软技能培养方案，以提升开发者安全意识。

authors_text: Marco Buzzelli,Simone Bianco,Paolo Napoletano
title: Unified Framework for Identity and Imagined Action Recognition from EEG patterns
title_zh: 脑电图模式身份和想象动作识别的统一框架
abstract: We present a unified deep learning framework for the recognition of user identity and the recognition of imagined actions, based on electroencephalography (EEG) signals, for application as a brain-computer interface. Our solution exploits a novel shifted subsampling preprocessing step as a form of data augmentation, and a matrix representation to encode the inherent local spatial relationships of multi-electrode EEG signals. The resulting image-like data is then fed to a convolutional neural network to process the local spatial dependencies, and eventually analyzed through a bidirectional long-short term memory module to focus on temporal relationships. Our solution is compared against several methods in the state of the art, showing comparable or superior performance on different tasks. Specifically, we achieve accuracy levels above 90% both for action and user classification tasks. In terms of user identification, we reach 0.39% equal error rate in the case of known users and gestures, and 6.16% in the more challenging case of unknown users and gestures. Preliminary experiments are also conducted in order to direct future works towards everyday applications relying on a reduced set of EEG electrodes.
summary: We present a unified deep learning framework for the recognition of user identity and the recognition of imagined actions, based on electroencephalography (EEG) signals, for application as a brain-computer interface. Our solution exploits a novel shifted subsampling preprocessing step as a form of data augmentation, and a matrix representation to encode the inherent local spatial relationships of multi-electrode EEG signals. The resulting image-like data is then fed to a convolutional neural network to process the local spatial dependencies, and eventually analyzed through a bidirectional long-short term memory module to focus on temporal relationships. Our solution is compared against several methods in the state of the art, showing comparable or superior performance on different tasks. Specifically, we achieve accuracy levels above 90% both for action and user classification tasks. In terms of user identification, we reach 0.39% equal error rate in the case of known users and gestures, and 6.16% in the more challenging case of unknown users and gestures. Preliminary experiments are also conducted in order to direct future works towards everyday applications relying on a reduced set of EEG electrodes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个统一的深度学习框架，用于基于脑电图（EEG）信号来识别用户身份和识别想象的动作，作为脑机接口应用。我们的解决方案利用一种新颖的移位子采样预处理步骤作为数据增强的一种形式，并利用矩阵表示来编码多电极脑电图信号的固有局部空间关系。然后将所得的类似图像的数据输入卷积神经网络来处理局部空间依赖性，并最终通过双向长短期记忆模块进行分析，以重点关注时间关系。我们的解决方案与现有技术中的几种方法进行了比较，显示出在不同任务上可比或优越的性能。具体来说，我们的动作和用户分类任务的准确度都达到了 90% 以上。在用户识别方面，在已知用户和手势的情况下，我们达到了 0.39% 的同等错误率，而在更具挑战性的未知用户和手势的情况下，我们达到了 6.16% 的同等错误率。还进行了初步实验，以便将未来的工作导向依赖于减少的脑电图电极组的日常应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于脑电图（EEG）信号的深度学习统一框架，用于识别用户身份和想象动作，以应用于脑机接口。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理用户身份识别和想象动作识别任务时存在分离，难以同时高效完成两项任务，因此需要一种统一的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用移位子采样预处理步骤进行数据增强，利用矩阵表示编码多电极EEG信号的局部空间关系，通过卷积神经网络处理空间依赖性，并通过双向长短期记忆网络分析时间关系。
AI.result: 在动作和用户分类任务中均达到90%以上的准确率，已知用户和手势的等错误率为0.39%，未知情况下的错误率为6.16%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在两项任务上表现优异，未来研究可探索减少EEG电极数量以实现日常应用。

ai_content_json.method: 采用移位子采样预处理步骤进行数据增强，利用矩阵表示编码多电极EEG信号的局部空间关系，通过卷积神经网络处理空间依赖性，并通过双向长短期记忆网络分析时间关系。
ai_content_json.result: 在动作和用户分类任务中均达到90%以上的准确率，已知用户和手势的等错误率为0.39%，未知情况下的错误率为6.16%。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该框架在两项任务上表现优异，未来研究可探索减少EEG电极数量以实现日常应用。

search_text: Unified Framework for Identity and Imagined Action Recognition from EEG patterns 脑电图模式身份和想象动作识别的统一框架 We present a unified deep learning framework for the recognition of user identity and the recognition of imagined actions, based on electroencephalography (EEG) signals, for application as a brain-computer interface. Our solution exploits a novel shifted subsampling preprocessing step as a form of data augmentation, and a matrix representation to encode the inherent local spatial relationships of multi-electrode EEG signals. The resulting image-like data is then fed to a convolutional neural network to process the local spatial dependencies, and eventually analyzed through a bidirectional long-short term memory module to focus on temporal relationships. Our solution is compared against several methods in the state of the art, showing comparable or superior performance on different tasks. Specifically, we achieve accuracy levels above 90% both for action and user classification tasks. In terms of user identification, we reach 0.39% equal error rate in the case of known users and gestures, and 6.16% in the more challenging case of unknown users and gestures. Preliminary experiments are also conducted in order to direct future works towards everyday applications relying on a reduced set of EEG electrodes. 我们提出了一个统一的深度学习框架，用于基于脑电图（EEG）信号来识别用户身份和识别想象的动作，作为脑机接口应用。我们的解决方案利用一种新颖的移位子采样预处理步骤作为数据增强的一种形式，并利用矩阵表示来编码多电极脑电图信号的固有局部空间关系。然后将所得的类似图像的数据输入卷积神经网络来处理局部空间依赖性，并最终通过双向长短期记忆模块进行分析，以重点关注时间关系。我们的解决方案与现有技术中的几种方法进行了比较，显示出在不同任务上可比或优越的性能。具体来说，我们的动作和用户分类任务的准确度都达到了 90% 以上。在用户识别方面，在已知用户和手势的情况下，我们达到了 0.39% 的同等错误率，而在更具挑战性的未知用户和手势的情况下，我们达到了 6.16% 的同等错误率。还进行了初步实验，以便将未来的工作导向依赖于减少的脑电图电极组的日常应用。 本文提出了一种基于脑电图（EEG）信号的深度学习统一框架，用于识别用户身份和想象动作，以应用于脑机接口。 Marco Buzzelli,Simone Bianco,Paolo Napoletano cs.HC

authors_text: Yitian Zhou,Gaétan Lelu,Boris Labbé,Guillaume Pasquier,Pierre Le Gargasson,Albert Murienne,Laurent Launay
title: A Novel Augmented Reality Ultrasound Framework Using an RGB-D Camera and a 3D-printed Marker
title_zh: 使用 RGB-D 相机和 3D 打印标记的新型增强现实超声框架
abstract: Purpose. Ability to locate and track ultrasound images in the 3D operating space is of great benefit for multiple clinical applications. This is often accomplished by tracking the probe using a precise but expensive optical or electromagnetic tracking system. Our goal is to develop a simple and low cost augmented reality echography framework using a standard RGB-D Camera. Methods. A prototype system consisting of an Occipital Structure Core RGB-D camera, a specifically-designed 3D marker, and a fast point cloud registration algorithm FaVoR was developed and evaluated on an Ultrasonix ultrasound system. The probe was calibrated on a 3D-printed N-wire phantom using the software PLUS toolkit. The proposed calibration method is simplified, requiring no additional markers or sensors attached to the phantom. Also, a visualization software based on OpenGL was developed for the augmented reality application. Results. The calibrated probe was used to augment a real-world video in a simulated needle insertion scenario. The ultrasound images were rendered on the video, and visually-coherent results were observed. We evaluated the end-to-end accuracy of our AR US framework on localizing a cube of 5 cm size. From our two experiments, the target pose localization error ranges from 5.6 to 5.9 mm and from -3.9 to 4.2 degrees. Conclusion. We believe that with the potential democratization of RGB-D cameras integrated in mobile devices and AR glasses in the future, our prototype solution may facilitate the use of 3D freehand ultrasound in clinical routine. Future work should include a more rigorous and thorough evaluation, by comparing the calibration accuracy with those obtained by commercial tracking solutions in both simulated and real medical scenarios.

abstract_zh: 目的。在 3D 操作空间中定位和跟踪超声图像的能力对于多种临床应用有很大好处。这通常是通过使用精确但昂贵的光学或电磁跟踪系统跟踪探头来实现的。我们的目标是使用标准 RGB-D 相机开发一个简单且低成本的增强现实回波描记框架。方法。原型系统由枕骨结构核心 RGB-D 相机、专门设计的 3D 标记和快速点云配准算法 FaVoR 组成，并在 Ultrasonix 超声系统上开发和评估。使用软件 PLUS 工具包在 3D 打印的 N 线模型上校准探头。所提出的校准方法得到了简化，不需要在模型上附加额外的标记或传感器。此外，还为增强现实应用开发了基于OpenGL的可视化软件。结果。校准后的探头用于增强模拟针插入场景中的真实视频。超声图像呈现在视频上，并观察到视觉上一致的结果。我们评估了 AR US 框架在定位 5 厘米大小的立方体时的端到端准确性。从我们的两个实验来看，目标位姿定位误差范围为 5.6 至 5.9 毫米以及 -3.9 至 4.2 度。结论。我们相信，随着未来集成在移动设备和 AR 眼镜中的 RGB-D 相机的潜在大众化，我们的原型解决方案可能会促进 3D 徒手超声在临床常规中的使用。未来的工作应该包括通过将校准精度与商业跟踪解决方案在模拟和真实医疗场景中获得的精度进行比较来进行更严格和彻底的评估。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于RGB-D相机和3D打印标记的低成本增强现实超声框架，用于临床应用中的超声图像定位与跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统超声探头定位依赖昂贵的光学或电磁跟踪系统，本文旨在提供一种简单、低成本的替代方案，利用普及的RGB-D相机实现增强现实超声。
AI.method: 采用Occipital Structure Core RGB-D相机、定制3D标记及FaVoR点云配准算法，结合PLUS工具包校准探头，并开发基于OpenGL的可视化软件实现AR功能。
AI.result: 在模拟穿刺场景中实现超声图像叠加，5cm立方体定位误差为5.6-5.9mm（角度误差-3.9至4.2度），视觉效果一致。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有望通过普及的RGB-D设备推动三维自由手超声临床应用，未来需与商业跟踪系统对比验证精度。

authors_text: Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Sandra Ottl,Alexander Gebhard,Esther Rituerto-González,Mirko Jaumann,Steffen Hüttner,Valerie Dieter,Patrick Schneeweiß,Inga Krauß,Maurice Gerczuk,Shahin Amiriparian,Björn W. Schuller
title: Fatigue Prediction in Outdoor Running Conditions using Audio Data
title_zh: 使用音频数据预测户外跑步条件下的疲劳
comment: Paper accepted at IEEE EMBC 2022. Rights remain with IEEE
comments: Paper accepted at IEEE EMBC 2022. Rights remain with IEEE
abstract: Although running is a common leisure activity and a core training regiment for several athletes, between $29\%$ and $79\%$ of runners sustain an overuse injury each year. These injuries are linked to excessive fatigue, which alters how someone runs. In this work, we explore the feasibility of modelling the Borg received perception of exertion (RPE) scale (range: $[6-20]$), a well-validated subjective measure of fatigue, using audio data captured in realistic outdoor environments via smartphones attached to the runners' arms. Using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on log-Mel spectrograms, we obtain a mean absolute error of $2.35$ in subject-dependent experiments, demonstrating that audio can be effectively used to model fatigue, while being more easily and non-invasively acquired than by signals from other sensors.
summary: Although running is a common leisure activity and a core training regiment for several athletes, between $29\%$ and $79\%$ of runners sustain an overuse injury each year. These injuries are linked to excessive fatigue, which alters how someone runs. In this work, we explore the feasibility of modelling the Borg received perception of exertion (RPE) scale (range: $[6-20]$), a well-validated subjective measure of fatigue, using audio data captured in realistic outdoor environments via smartphones attached to the runners' arms. Using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on log-Mel spectrograms, we obtain a mean absolute error of $2.35$ in subject-dependent experiments, demonstrating that audio can be effectively used to model fatigue, while being more easily and non-invasively acquired than by signals from other sensors.
abstract_zh: 尽管跑步是一项常见的休闲活动，也是一些运动员的核心训练项目，但每年仍有 29\%$ 到 $79\%$ 的跑步者遭受过度使用损伤。这些伤害与过度疲劳有关，过度疲劳会改变人的跑步方式。在这项工作中，我们探索了对 Borg 劳累感知 (RPE) 量表（范围：$[6-20]$）进行建模的可行性，这是一种经过充分验证的疲劳主观测量方法，使用通过连接到跑步者手臂上的智能手机在现实户外环境中捕获的音频数据。在对数梅尔频谱图上使用卷积神经网络 (CNN)，我们在与受试者相关的实验中获得了 2.35 美元的平均绝对误差，这表明音频可以有效地用于模拟疲劳，同时比其他传感器的信号更容易且非侵入性地获取音频。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用音频数据预测户外跑步时的疲劳程度。
AI.motivation: 跑步相关过度使用伤害普遍，而疲劳是导致伤害的关键因素，传统监测方法存在侵入性或不便之处。
AI.method: 通过智能手机采集户外跑步音频数据，提取log-Mel频谱图并采用卷积神经网络（CNN）建模Borg主观疲劳评分。
AI.result: 在受试者依赖实验中，模型实现平均绝对误差2.35。
AI.conclusion: 音频数据可有效建模疲劳状态，且相比其他传感器信号更具非侵入性和易获取性。

ai_content.conclusion: 音频数据可有效建模疲劳状态，且相比其他传感器信号更具非侵入性和易获取性。

search_text: Fatigue Prediction in Outdoor Running Conditions using Audio Data 使用音频数据预测户外跑步条件下的疲劳 Although running is a common leisure activity and a core training regiment for several athletes, between $29\%$ and $79\%$ of runners sustain an overuse injury each year. These injuries are linked to excessive fatigue, which alters how someone runs. In this work, we explore the feasibility of modelling the Borg received perception of exertion (RPE) scale (range: $[6-20]$), a well-validated subjective measure of fatigue, using audio data captured in realistic outdoor environments via smartphones attached to the runners' arms. Using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on log-Mel spectrograms, we obtain a mean absolute error of $2.35$ in subject-dependent experiments, demonstrating that audio can be effectively used to model fatigue, while being more easily and non-invasively acquired than by signals from other sensors. 尽管跑步是一项常见的休闲活动，也是一些运动员的核心训练项目，但每年仍有 29\%$ 到 $79\%$ 的跑步者遭受过度使用损伤。这些伤害与过度疲劳有关，过度疲劳会改变人的跑步方式。在这项工作中，我们探索了对 Borg 劳累感知 (RPE) 量表（范围：$[6-20]$）进行建模的可行性，这是一种经过充分验证的疲劳主观测量方法，使用通过连接到跑步者手臂上的智能手机在现实户外环境中捕获的音频数据。在对数梅尔频谱图上使用卷积神经网络 (CNN)，我们在与受试者相关的实验中获得了 2.35 美元的平均绝对误差，这表明音频可以有效地用于模拟疲劳，同时比其他传感器的信号更容易且非侵入性地获取音频。 本文研究利用音频数据预测户外跑步时的疲劳程度。 Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Sandra Ottl,Alexander Gebhard,Esther Rituerto-González,Mirko Jaumann,Steffen Hüttner,Valerie Dieter,Patrick Schneeweiß,Inga Krauß,Maurice Gerczuk,Shahin Amiriparian,Björn W. Schuller cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Loïc Cordone,Benoît Miramond,Philippe Thierion
title: Object Detection with Spiking Neural Networks on Automotive Event Data
title_zh: 使用尖峰神经网络对汽车事件数据进行物体检测
comment: Accepted to the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
comments: Accepted to the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
abstract: Automotive embedded algorithms have very high constraints in terms of latency, accuracy and power consumption. In this work, we propose to train spiking neural networks (SNNs) directly on data coming from event cameras to design fast and efficient automotive embedded applications. Indeed, SNNs are more biologically realistic neural networks where neurons communicate using discrete and asynchronous spikes, a naturally energy-efficient and hardware friendly operating mode. Event data, which are binary and sparse in space and time, are therefore the ideal input for spiking neural networks. But to date, their performance was insufficient for automotive real-world problems, such as detecting complex objects in an uncontrolled environment. To address this issue, we took advantage of the latest advancements in matter of spike backpropagation - surrogate gradient learning, parametric LIF, SpikingJelly framework - and of our new \textit{voxel cube} event encoding to train 4 different SNNs based on popular deep learning networks: SqueezeNet, VGG, MobileNet, and DenseNet. As a result, we managed to increase the size and the complexity of SNNs usually considered in the literature. In this paper, we conducted experiments on two automotive event datasets, establishing new state-of-the-art classification results for spiking neural networks. Based on these results, we combined our SNNs with SSD to propose the first spiking neural networks capable of performing object detection on the complex GEN1 Automotive Detection event dataset.

In this work, we propose to train spiking neural networks (SNNs) directly on data coming from event cameras to design fast and efficient automotive embedded applications. Indeed, SNNs are more biologically realistic neural networks where neurons communicate using discrete and asynchronous spikes, a naturally energy-efficient and hardware friendly operating mode. Event data, which are binary and sparse in space and time, are therefore the ideal input for spiking neural networks. But to date, their performance was insufficient for automotive real-world problems, such as detecting complex objects in an uncontrolled environment. To address this issue, we took advantage of the latest advancements in matter of spike backpropagation - surrogate gradient learning, parametric LIF, SpikingJelly framework - and of our new \textit{voxel cube} event encoding to train 4 different SNNs based on popular deep learning networks: SqueezeNet, VGG, MobileNet, and DenseNet. As a result, we managed to increase the size and the complexity of SNNs usually considered in the literature. In this paper, we conducted experiments on two automotive event datasets, establishing new state-of-the-art classification results for spiking neural networks. Based on these results, we combined our SNNs with SSD to propose the first spiking neural networks capable of performing object detection on the complex GEN1 Automotive Detection event dataset.
abstract_zh: 汽车嵌入式算法在延迟、准确性和功耗方面具有非常高的限制。在这项工作中，我们建议直接根据来自事件摄像机的数据训练尖峰神经网络 (SNN)，以设计快速高效的汽车嵌入式应用。事实上，SNN 是更符合生物学现实的神经网络，其中神经元使用离散和异步尖峰进行通信，这是一种自然节能且硬件友好的操作模式。因此，事件数据在空间和时间上都是二进制且稀疏的，因此是尖峰神经网络的理想输入。但迄今为止，它们的性能不足以解决汽车现实世界的问题，例如在不受控制的环境中检测复杂的物体。为了解决这个问题，我们利用尖峰反向传播方面的最新进展 - 代理梯度学习、参数化 LIF、SpikingJelly 框架 - 以及我们新的 \textit{voxelcube} 事件编码来训练基于流行深度学习网络的 4 个不同的 SNN：SqueezeNet、VGG、MobileNet 和 DenseNet。因此，我们设法增加了文献中通常考虑的 SNN 的大小和复杂性。在本文中，我们对两个汽车事件数据集进行了实验，为尖峰神经网络建立了新的最先进的分类结果。基于这些结果，我们将 SNN 与 SSD 相结合，提出了第一个能够在复杂的 GEN1 汽车检测事件数据集上执行对象检测的尖峰神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在汽车事件数据上直接训练脉冲神经网络（SNN），以实现高效且快速的车载嵌入式应用。
AI.motivation: 车载算法对延迟、精度和功耗有严格要求，而传统SNN在复杂真实环境中的性能不足，需结合最新技术提升其能力。
AI.method: 利用代理梯度学习、参数化LIF模型和SpikingJelly框架，结合新提出的体素立方体事件编码，训练基于SqueezeNet、VGG、MobileNet和DenseNet的4种SNN，并与SSD结合实现目标检测。
AI.result: 在两个车载事件数据集上取得SNN分类新状态，首次实现基于SNN的GEN1数据集复杂场景目标检测。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了SNN的规模和复杂度，验证了其在车载事件数据处理中的潜力，为未来高效嵌入式应用提供新方向。

search_text: Object Detection with Spiking Neural Networks on Automotive Event Data 使用尖峰神经网络对汽车事件数据进行物体检测 Automotive embedded algorithms have very high constraints in terms of latency, accuracy and power consumption. In this work, we propose to train spiking neural networks (SNNs) directly on data coming from event cameras to design fast and efficient automotive embedded applications. Indeed, SNNs are more biologically realistic neural networks where neurons communicate using discrete and asynchronous spikes, a naturally energy-efficient and hardware friendly operating mode. Event data, which are binary and sparse in space and time, are therefore the ideal input for spiking neural networks. But to date, their performance was insufficient for automotive real-world problems, such as detecting complex objects in an uncontrolled environment. To address this issue, we took advantage of the latest advancements in matter of spike backpropagation - surrogate gradient learning, parametric LIF, SpikingJelly framework - and of our new \textit{voxel cube} event encoding to train 4 different SNNs based on popular deep learning networks: SqueezeNet, VGG, MobileNet, and DenseNet. As a result, we managed to increase the size and the complexity of SNNs usually considered in the literature. In this paper, we conducted experiments on two automotive event datasets, establishing new state-of-the-art classification results for spiking neural networks. Based on these results, we combined our SNNs with SSD to propose the first spiking neural networks capable of performing object detection on the complex GEN1 Automotive Detection event dataset. 汽车嵌入式算法在延迟、准确性和功耗方面具有非常高的限制。在这项工作中，我们建议直接根据来自事件摄像机的数据训练尖峰神经网络 (SNN)，以设计快速高效的汽车嵌入式应用。事实上，SNN 是更符合生物学现实的神经网络，其中神经元使用离散和异步尖峰进行通信，这是一种自然节能且硬件友好的操作模式。因此，事件数据在空间和时间上都是二进制且稀疏的，因此是尖峰神经网络的理想输入。但迄今为止，它们的性能不足以解决汽车现实世界的问题，例如在不受控制的环境中检测复杂的物体。为了解决这个问题，我们利用尖峰反向传播方面的最新进展 - 代理梯度学习、参数化 LIF、SpikingJelly 框架 - 以及我们新的 \textit{voxelcube} 事件编码来训练基于流行深度学习网络的 4 个不同的 SNN：SqueezeNet、VGG、MobileNet 和 DenseNet。因此，我们设法增加了文献中通常考虑的 SNN 的大小和复杂性。在本文中，我们对两个汽车事件数据集进行了实验，为尖峰神经网络建立了新的最先进的分类结果。基于这些结果，我们将 SNN 与 SSD 相结合，提出了第一个能够在复杂的 GEN1 汽车检测事件数据集上执行对象检测的尖峰神经网络。 本文提出在汽车事件数据上直接训练脉冲神经网络（SNN），以实现高效且快速的车载嵌入式应用。 Loïc Cordone,Benoît Miramond,Philippe Thierion cs.CV

authors_text: Abhijit Kundu,Kyle Genova,Xiaoqi Yin,Alireza Fathi,Caroline Pantofaru,Leonidas Guibas,Andrea Tagliasacchi,Frank Dellaert,Thomas Funkhouser
title: Panoptic Neural Fields: A Semantic Object-Aware Neural Scene Representation
title_zh: 全景神经场：语义对象感知神经场景表示
comment: CVPR 2022 paper. See project page at https://abhijitkundu.info/projects/pnf
comments: CVPR 2022 paper. See project page at https://abhijitkundu.info/projects/pnf
abstract: We present Panoptic Neural Fields (PNF), an object-aware neural scene representation that decomposes a scene into a set of objects (things) and background (stuff). Each object is represented by an oriented 3D bounding box and a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) that takes position, direction, and time and outputs density and radiance. The background stuff is represented by a similar MLP that additionally outputs semantic labels. Each object MLPs are instance-specific and thus can be smaller and faster than previous object-aware approaches, while still leveraging category-specific priors incorporated via meta-learned initialization. Our model builds a panoptic radiance field representation of any scene from just color images. We use off-the-shelf algorithms to predict camera poses, object tracks, and 2D image semantic segmentations. Then we jointly optimize the MLP weights and bounding box parameters using analysis-by-synthesis with self-supervision from color images and pseudo-supervision from predicted semantic segmentations. During experiments with real-world dynamic scenes, we find that our model can be used effectively for several tasks like novel view synthesis, 2D panoptic segmentation, 3D scene editing, and multiview depth prediction.
summary: We present Panoptic Neural Fields (PNF), an object-aware neural scene representation that decomposes a scene into a set of objects (things) and background (stuff). Each object is represented by an oriented 3D bounding box and a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) that takes position, direction, and time and outputs density and radiance. The background stuff is represented by a similar MLP that additionally outputs semantic labels. Each object MLPs are instance-specific and thus can be smaller and faster than previous object-aware approaches, while still leveraging category-specific priors incorporated via meta-learned initialization. Our model builds a panoptic radiance field representation of any scene from just color images. We use off-the-shelf algorithms to predict camera poses, object tracks, and 2D image semantic segmentations. Then we jointly optimize the MLP weights and bounding box parameters using analysis-by-synthesis with self-supervision from color images and pseudo-supervision from predicted semantic segmentations. During experiments with real-world dynamic scenes, we find that our model can be used effectively for several tasks like novel view synthesis, 2D panoptic segmentation, 3D scene editing, and multiview depth prediction.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了全景神经场（PNF），一种对象感知神经场景表示，它将场景分解为一组对象（事物）和背景（东西）。每个对象都由一个定向 3D 边界框和一个多层感知器 (MLP) 表示，该多层感知器获取位置、方向和时间并输出密度和辐射度。背景内容由类似的 MLP 表示，该 MLP 还输出语义标签。每个对象 MLP 都是特定于实例的，因此比以前的对象感知方法更小、更快，同时仍然利用通过元学习初始化合并的特定于类别的先验。我们的模型仅从彩色图像构建任何场景的全景辐射场表示。我们使用现成的算法来预测相机姿势、物体轨迹和 2D 图像语义分割。然后，我们使用彩色图像的自监督和预测语义分割的伪监督进行综合分析，联合优化 MLP 权重和边界框参数。在对现实世界动态场景进行实验时，我们发现我们的模型可以有效地用于多种任务，例如新颖的视图合成、2D 全景分割、3D 场景编辑和多视图深度预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语义对象感知的神经场景表示方法Panoptic Neural Fields（PNF），通过分解场景为对象和背景并结合多层感知机实现动态场景的建模。
AI.motivation: 现有神经渲染方法难以有效区分场景中的对象与背景，且动态场景建模缺乏对语义信息的充分利用，导致对象感知能力不足。
AI.method: 为每个对象分配3D包围盒和实例特定MLP，背景使用带语义标签的MLP；通过现成算法获取相机姿态和语义分割，联合优化MLP参数与包围盒，结合颜色图像自监督和伪监督训练。
AI.result: 在真实动态场景实验中，模型可有效完成新视角合成、2D全景分割、3D场景编辑和多视角深度预测等任务，验证了方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: PNF通过对象级建模与语义信息融合，实现了高效动态场景表示，在多个视觉任务中表现出色，为神经渲染领域提供了新的研究方向。

We use off-the-shelf algorithms to predict camera poses, object tracks, and 2D image semantic segmentations. During experiments with real-world dynamic scenes, we find that our model can be used effectively for several tasks like novel view synthesis, 2D panoptic segmentation, 3D scene editing, and multiview depth prediction. 我们提出了全景神经场（PNF），一种对象感知神经场景表示，它将场景分解为一组对象（事物）和背景（东西）。每个对象都由一个定向 3D 边界框和一个多层感知器 (MLP) 表示，该多层感知器获取位置、方向和时间并输出密度和辐射度。背景内容由类似的 MLP 表示，该 MLP 还输出语义标签。每个对象 MLP 都是特定于实例的，因此比以前的对象感知方法更小、更快，同时仍然利用通过元学习初始化合并的特定于类别的先验。我们的模型仅从彩色图像构建任何场景的全景辐射场表示。我们使用现成的算法来预测相机姿势、物体轨迹和 2D 图像语义分割。然后，我们使用彩色图像的自监督和预测语义分割的伪监督进行综合分析，联合优化 MLP 权重和边界框参数。在对现实世界动态场景进行实验时，我们发现我们的模型可以有效地用于多种任务，例如新颖的视图合成、2D 全景分割、3D 场景编辑和多视图深度预测。 本文提出一种语义对象感知的神经场景表示方法Panoptic Neural Fields（PNF），通过分解场景为对象和背景并结合多层感知机实现动态场景的建模。 Abhijit Kundu,Kyle Genova,Xiaoqi Yin,Alireza Fathi,Caroline Pantofaru,Leonidas Guibas,Andrea Tagliasacchi,Frank Dellaert,Thomas Funkhouser cs.CV

authors_text: Weiyi Yu,Zhizhong Huang,Junping Zhang,Hongming Shan
title: SAN-Net: Learning Generalization to Unseen Sites for Stroke Lesion Segmentation with Self-Adaptive Normalization
title_zh: SAN-Net：通过自适应归一化学习对未见过部位的中风病变分割的泛化
abstract: There are considerable interests in automatic stroke lesion segmentation on magnetic resonance (MR) images in the medical imaging field, as stroke is an important cerebrovascular disease. Although deep learning-based models have been proposed for this task, generalizing these models to unseen sites is difficult due to not only the large inter-site discrepancy among different scanners, imaging protocols, and populations, but also the variations in stroke lesion shape, size, and location. To tackle this issue, we introduce a self-adaptive normalization network, termed SAN-Net, to achieve adaptive generalization on unseen sites for stroke lesion segmentation. Motivated by traditional z-score normalization and dynamic network, we devise a masked adaptive instance normalization (MAIN) to minimize inter-site discrepancies, which standardizes input MR images from different sites into a site-unrelated style by dynamically learning affine parameters from the input; \ie, MAIN can affinely transform the intensity values. Then, we leverage a gradient reversal layer to force the U-net encoder to learn site-invariant representation with a site classifier, which further improves the model generalization in conjunction with MAIN. Finally, inspired by the ``pseudosymmetry'' of the human brain, we introduce a simple yet effective data augmentation technique, termed symmetry-inspired data augmentation (SIDA), that can be embedded within SAN-Net to double the sample size while halving memory consumption. Experimental results on the benchmark Anatomical Tracings of Lesions After Stroke (ATLAS) v1.2 dataset, which includes MR images from 9 different sites, demonstrate that under the ``leave-one-site-out'' setting, the proposed SAN-Net outperforms recently published methods in terms of quantitative metrics and qualitative comparisons.
summary: There are considerable interests in automatic stroke lesion segmentation on magnetic resonance (MR) images in the medical imaging field, as stroke is an important cerebrovascular disease. Although deep learning-based models have been proposed for this task, generalizing these models to unseen sites is difficult due to not only the large inter-site discrepancy among different scanners, imaging protocols, and populations, but also the variations in stroke lesion shape, size, and location. To tackle this issue, we introduce a self-adaptive normalization network, termed SAN-Net, to achieve adaptive generalization on unseen sites for stroke lesion segmentation. Motivated by traditional z-score normalization and dynamic network, we devise a masked adaptive instance normalization (MAIN) to minimize inter-site discrepancies, which standardizes input MR images from different sites into a site-unrelated style by dynamically learning affine parameters from the input; \ie, MAIN can affinely transform the intensity values. Then, we leverage a gradient reversal layer to force the U-net encoder to learn site-invariant representation with a site classifier, which further improves the model generalization in conjunction with MAIN. Finally, inspired by the ``pseudosymmetry'' of the human brain, we introduce a simple yet effective data augmentation technique, termed symmetry-inspired data augmentation (SIDA), that can be embedded within SAN-Net to double the sample size while halving memory consumption. Experimental results on the benchmark Anatomical Tracings of Lesions After Stroke (ATLAS) v1.2 dataset, which includes MR images from 9 different sites, demonstrate that under the ``leave-one-site-out'' setting, the proposed SAN-Net outperforms recently published methods in terms of quantitative metrics and qualitative comparisons.
abstract_zh: 由于中风是一种重要的脑血管疾病，因此医学成像领域对磁共振（MR）图像的自动中风病灶分割有着相当大的兴趣。尽管针对这项任务提出了基于深度学习的模型，但将这些模型推广到看不见的部位是很困难的，因为不仅不同扫描仪、成像协议和人群之间存在较大的部位间差异，而且中风病变形状、大小和位置也存在差异。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种自适应归一化网络，称为 SAN-Net，以实现对未见过的部位的自适应泛化，以进行中风病变分割。受传统 z 分数归一化和动态网络的启发，我们设计了一种掩码自适应实例归一化（MAIN），以最大限度地减少站点间差异，通过从输入中动态学习仿射参数，将来自不同站点的输入 MR 图像标准化为与站点无关的样式；即，MAIN 可以仿射变换强度值。然后，我们利用梯度反转层强制 U-net 编码器通过站点分类器学习站点不变表示，这进一步提高了与 MAIN 结合的模型泛化能力。最后，受人脑“伪对称”的启发，我们引入了一种简单而有效的数据增强技术，称为对称启发数据增强（SIDA），它可以嵌入到 SAN-Net 中，使样本大小加倍，同时将内存消耗减半。中风后病变解剖追踪 (ATLAS) v1.2 基准数据集（包括来自 9 个不同部位的 MR 图像）的实验结果表明，在“留一部位排除”设置下，所提出的 SAN-Net 在定量指标和定性比较方面优于最近发布的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAN-Net，通过自适应归一化网络解决不同医疗站点间脑卒中病变分割的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在跨站点脑卒中病变分割任务中因设备、协议和人群差异导致泛化能力不足，需提升模型对未见站点的适应性。
AI.method: 设计掩码自适应实例归一化（MAIN）模块动态标准化输入图像，结合梯度反转层与站点分类器学习站点不变特征，并引入对称性数据增强（SIDA）提升样本效率。
AI.result: 在包含9个站点的ATLAS数据集上，SAN-Net在留一站点验证设置下优于最新方法，定量指标和定性对比均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: SAN-Net通过自适应归一化与数据增强有效缓解跨站点差异，为多中心脑卒中分割提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Sandra Zänkert,Alice Baird,Julian Konzok,Brigitte M. Kudielka,Björn W. Schuller
title: Insights on Modelling Physiological, Appraisal, and Affective Indicators of Stress using Audio Features
title_zh: 使用音频特征对压力的生理、评估和情感指标进行建模的见解
comment: Paper accepted for publication at IEEE EMBC 2022. Rights remain with IEEE
comments: Paper accepted for publication at IEEE EMBC 2022. Rights remain with IEEE
abstract: Stress is a major threat to well-being that manifests in a variety of physiological and mental symptoms. Utilising speech samples collected while the subject is undergoing an induced stress episode has recently shown promising results for the automatic characterisation of individual stress responses. In this work, we introduce new findings that shed light onto whether speech signals are suited to model physiological biomarkers, as obtained via cortisol measurements, or self-assessed appraisal and affect measurements. Our results show that different indicators impact acoustic features in a diverse way, but that their complimentary information can nevertheless be effectively harnessed by a multi-tasking architecture to improve prediction performance for all of them.
summary: Stress is a major threat to well-being that manifests in a variety of physiological and mental symptoms. Utilising speech samples collected while the subject is undergoing an induced stress episode has recently shown promising results for the automatic characterisation of individual stress responses. In this work, we introduce new findings that shed light onto whether speech signals are suited to model physiological biomarkers, as obtained via cortisol measurements, or self-assessed appraisal and affect measurements. Our results show that different indicators impact acoustic features in a diverse way, but that their complimentary information can nevertheless be effectively harnessed by a multi-tasking architecture to improve prediction performance for all of them.
abstract_zh: 压力是对健康的主要威胁，表现为各种生理和精神症状。最近，利用受试者经历诱发应激事件时收集的语音样本，在自动表征个体应激反应方面显示出有希望的结果。在这项工作中，我们介绍了新的发现，阐明语音信号是否适合模拟生理生物标志物（通过皮质醇测量或自我评估和影响测量获得）。我们的结果表明，不同的指标以不同的方式影响声学特征，但多任务架构仍然可以有效地利用它们的补充信息来提高所有指标的预测性能。

AI.tldr: 研究语音信号是否能有效建模生理和情感压力指标，并探索多任务架构的效果。
AI.motivation: 压力对健康危害大，现有方法难以全面捕捉其多维特征，需寻找更有效的自动识别手段。
AI.method: 采用多任务学习框架，结合语音声学特征与生理/情感指标数据进行联合建模。
AI.result: 不同压力指标影响声学特征的方式各异，但多任务架构能整合互补信息提升整体预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 语音信号可有效表征压力相关指标，多任务方法通过信息融合显著优化预测效果。
