authors_text: Ruitao Zhang,Xueying Han,Ijaz Gul,Shiyao Zhai,Ying Liu,Yongbing Zhang,Yuhan Dong,Lan Ma,Dongmei Yu,Jin Zhou,Peiwu Qin
title: RCMNet: A deep learning model assists CAR-T therapy for leukemia
title_zh: RCMNet：深度学习模型辅助白血病CAR-T治疗
abstract: Acute leukemia is a type of blood cancer with a high mortality rate. Current therapeutic methods include bone marrow transplantation, supportive therapy, and chemotherapy. Although a satisfactory remission of the disease can be achieved, the risk of recurrence is still high. Therefore, novel treatments are demanding. Chimeric antigen receptor-T (CAR-T) therapy has emerged as a promising approach to treat and cure acute leukemia. To harness the therapeutic potential of CAR-T cell therapy for blood diseases, reliable cell morphological identification is crucial. Nevertheless, the identification of CAR-T cells is a big challenge posed by their phenotypic similarity with other blood cells. To address this substantial clinical challenge, herein we first construct a CAR-T dataset with 500 original microscopy images after staining. Following that, we create a novel integrated model called RCMNet (ResNet18 with CBAM and MHSA) that combines the convolutional neural network (CNN) and Transformer. The model shows 99.63% top-1 accuracy on the public dataset. Compared with previous reports, our model obtains satisfactory results for image classification. Although testing on the CAR-T cells dataset, a decent performance is observed, which is attributed to the limited size of the dataset. Transfer learning is adapted for RCMNet and a maximum of 83.36% accuracy has been achieved, which is higher than other SOTA models. The study evaluates the effectiveness of RCMNet on a big public dataset and translates it to a clinical dataset for diagnostic applications.
summary: Acute leukemia is a type of blood cancer with a high mortality rate. Current therapeutic methods include bone marrow transplantation, supportive therapy, and chemotherapy. Although a satisfactory remission of the disease can be achieved, the risk of recurrence is still high. Therefore, novel treatments are demanding. Chimeric antigen receptor-T (CAR-T) therapy has emerged as a promising approach to treat and cure acute leukemia. To harness the therapeutic potential of CAR-T cell therapy for blood diseases, reliable cell morphological identification is crucial. Nevertheless, the identification of CAR-T cells is a big challenge posed by their phenotypic similarity with other blood cells. To address this substantial clinical challenge, herein we first construct a CAR-T dataset with 500 original microscopy images after staining. Following that, we create a novel integrated model called RCMNet (ResNet18 with CBAM and MHSA) that combines the convolutional neural network (CNN) and Transformer. The model shows 99.63% top-1 accuracy on the public dataset. Compared with previous reports, our model obtains satisfactory results for image classification. Although testing on the CAR-T cells dataset, a decent performance is observed, which is attributed to the limited size of the dataset. Transfer learning is adapted for RCMNet and a maximum of 83.36% accuracy has been achieved, which is higher than other SOTA models. The study evaluates the effectiveness of RCMNet on a big public dataset and translates it to a clinical dataset for diagnostic applications.
abstract_zh: 急性白血病是一种死亡率很高的血癌。目前的治疗方法包括骨髓移植、支持疗法和化疗。虽然疾病可以得到满意的缓解，但复发的风险仍然很高。因此，需要新的治疗方法。嵌合抗原受体-T (CAR-T) 疗法已成为治疗和治愈急性白血病的一种有前途的方法。为了发挥 CAR-T 细胞疗法治疗血液疾病的潜力，可靠的细胞形态学鉴定至关重要。然而，由于CAR-T细胞与其他血细胞的表型相似，其鉴定是一个巨大的挑战。为了解决这一重大临床挑战，我们首先构建了一个 CAR-T 数据集，其中包含 500 张染色后的原始显微镜图像。接下来，我们创建了一个新颖的集成模型，称为 RCMNet（带有 CBAM 和 MHSA 的 ResNet18），它结合了卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和 Transformer。该模型在公共数据集上显示出 99.63% 的 top-1 准确率。与之前的报告相比，我们的模型在图像分类方面获得了令人满意的结果。尽管在 CAR-T 细胞数据集上进行测试，但由于数据集大小有限，观察到了不错的性能。迁移学习针对 RCMNet 进行了适配，最高达到 83.36% 的准确率，高于其他 SOTA 模型。该研究评估了 RCMNet 在大型公共数据集上的有效性，并将其转换为用于诊断应用的临床数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度学习模型RCMNet，用于辅助CAR-T疗法在白血病治疗中的细胞形态识别。
AI.motivation: CAR-T细胞因表型与其它血细胞相似，导致形态识别困难，影响治疗效果，亟需可靠识别方法。
AI.method: 构建包含500张显微图像的CAR-T数据集，设计融合ResNet18、CBAM和MHSA的RCMNet模型，并采用迁移学习优化性能。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上达到99.63%的分类准确率，迁移学习后在CAR-T数据集上实现83.36%的准确率，优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: RCMNet在图像分类和临床诊断中表现优异，为CAR-T疗法提供有效辅助工具。

search_text: RCMNet: A deep learning model assists CAR-T therapy for leukemia RCMNet：深度学习模型辅助白血病CAR-T治疗 Acute leukemia is a type of blood cancer with a high mortality rate. Current therapeutic methods include bone marrow transplantation, supportive therapy, and chemotherapy. Although a satisfactory remission of the disease can be achieved, the risk of recurrence is still high. Therefore, novel treatments are demanding. Chimeric antigen receptor-T (CAR-T) therapy has emerged as a promising approach to treat and cure acute leukemia. To harness the therapeutic potential of CAR-T cell therapy for blood diseases, reliable cell morphological identification is crucial. Nevertheless, the identification of CAR-T cells is a big challenge posed by their phenotypic similarity with other blood cells. To address this substantial clinical challenge, herein we first construct a CAR-T dataset with 500 original microscopy images after staining. Following that, we create a novel integrated model called RCMNet (ResNet18 with CBAM and MHSA) that combines the convolutional neural network (CNN) and Transformer. The model shows 99.63% top-1 accuracy on the public dataset. Compared with previous reports, our model obtains satisfactory results for image classification. Although testing on the CAR-T cells dataset, a decent performance is observed, which is attributed to the limited size of the dataset. Transfer learning is adapted for RCMNet and a maximum of 83.36% accuracy has been achieved, which is higher than other SOTA models. The study evaluates the effectiveness of RCMNet on a big public dataset and translates it to a clinical dataset for diagnostic applications. 急性白血病是一种死亡率很高的血癌。目前的治疗方法包括骨髓移植、支持疗法和化疗。虽然疾病可以得到满意的缓解，但复发的风险仍然很高。因此，需要新的治疗方法。嵌合抗原受体-T (CAR-T) 疗法已成为治疗和治愈急性白血病的一种有前途的方法。为了发挥 CAR-T 细胞疗法治疗血液疾病的潜力，可靠的细胞形态学鉴定至关重要。然而，由于CAR-T细胞与其他血细胞的表型相似，其鉴定是一个巨大的挑战。为了解决这一重大临床挑战，我们首先构建了一个 CAR-T 数据集，其中包含 500 张染色后的原始显微镜图像。接下来，我们创建了一个新颖的集成模型，称为 RCMNet（带有 CBAM 和 MHSA 的 ResNet18），它结合了卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和 Transformer。该模型在公共数据集上显示出 99.63% 的 top-1 准确率。与之前的报告相比，我们的模型在图像分类方面获得了令人满意的结果。尽管在 CAR-T 细胞数据集上进行测试，但由于数据集大小有限，观察到了不错的性能。迁移学习针对 RCMNet 进行了适配，最高达到 83.36% 的准确率，高于其他 SOTA 模型。该研究评估了 RCMNet 在大型公共数据集上的有效性，并将其转换为用于诊断应用的临床数据集。 本文提出一种深度学习模型RCMNet，用于辅助CAR-T疗法在白血病治疗中的细胞形态识别。 Ruitao Zhang,Xueying Han,Ijaz Gul,Shiyao Zhai,Ying Liu,Yongbing Zhang,Yuhan Dong,Lan Ma,Dongmei Yu,Jin Zhou,Peiwu Qin eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Yang Liu,Ersi Zhang,Lulu Xu,Chufan Xiao,Xiaoyun Zhong,Lijin Lian,Fang Li,Bin Jiang,Yuhan Dong,Lan Ma,Qiming Huang,Ming Xu,Yongbing Zhang,Dongmei Yu,Chenggang Yan,Peiwu Qin
title: Mixed-UNet: Refined Class Activation Mapping for Weakly-Supervised Semantic Segmentation with Multi-scale Inference
title_zh: Mixed-UNet：通过多尺度推理进行弱监督语义分割的细化类激活映射
abstract: Deep learning techniques have shown great potential in medical image processing, particularly through accurate and reliable image segmentation on magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) scans or computed tomography (CT) scans, which allow the localization and diagnosis of lesions. However, training these segmentation models requires a large number of manually annotated pixel-level labels, which are time-consuming and labor-intensive, in contrast to image-level labels that are easier to obtain. It is imperative to resolve this problem through weakly-supervised semantic segmentation models using image-level labels as supervision since it can significantly reduce human annotation efforts. Most of the advanced solutions exploit class activation mapping (CAM). However, the original CAMs rarely capture the precise boundaries of lesions. In this study, we propose the strategy of multi-scale inference to refine CAMs by reducing the detail loss in single-scale reasoning. For segmentation, we develop a novel model named Mixed-UNet, which has two parallel branches in the decoding phase. The results can be obtained after fusing the extracted features from two branches. We evaluate the designed Mixed-UNet against several prevalent deep learning-based segmentation approaches on our dataset collected from the local hospital and public datasets. The validation results demonstrate that our model surpasses available methods under the same supervision level in the segmentation of various lesions from brain imaging.
summary: Deep learning techniques have shown great potential in medical image processing, particularly through accurate and reliable image segmentation on magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) scans or computed tomography (CT) scans, which allow the localization and diagnosis of lesions. However, training these segmentation models requires a large number of manually annotated pixel-level labels, which are time-consuming and labor-intensive, in contrast to image-level labels that are easier to obtain. It is imperative to resolve this problem through weakly-supervised semantic segmentation models using image-level labels as supervision since it can significantly reduce human annotation efforts. Most of the advanced solutions exploit class activation mapping (CAM). However, the original CAMs rarely capture the precise boundaries of lesions. In this study, we propose the strategy of multi-scale inference to refine CAMs by reducing the detail loss in single-scale reasoning. For segmentation, we develop a novel model named Mixed-UNet, which has two parallel branches in the decoding phase. The results can be obtained after fusing the extracted features from two branches. We evaluate the designed Mixed-UNet against several prevalent deep learning-based segmentation approaches on our dataset collected from the local hospital and public datasets. The validation results demonstrate that our model surpasses available methods under the same supervision level in the segmentation of various lesions from brain imaging.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术在医学图像处理方面显示出巨大的潜力，特别是通过磁共振成像（MRI）扫描或计算机断层扫描（CT）扫描上准确可靠的图像分割，可以实现病变的定位和诊断。然而，训练这些分割模型需要大量手动注释的像素级标签，与更容易获得的图像级标签相比，这既耗时又费力。必须通过使用图像级标签作为监督的弱监督语义分割模型来解决这个问题，因为它可以显着减少人工注释工作。大多数高级解决方案都利用类激活映射 (CAM)。然而，原始的 CAM 很少能捕捉到病变的精确边界。在本研究中，我们提出了多尺度推理策略，通过减少单尺度推理中的细节损失来细化 CAM。对于分割，我们开发了一种名为 Mixed-UNet 的新颖模型，该模型在解码阶段有两个并行分支。融合两个分支提取的特征后即可得到结果。我们在从当地医院和公共数据集收集的数据集上根据几种流行的基于深度学习的分割方法评估了设计的 Mixed-UNet。验证结果表明，我们的模型在脑成像中各种病变的分割方面优于相同监督水平下的现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mixed-UNet模型，通过多尺度推理优化类激活映射（CAM），实现弱监督语义分割，以减少医学影像标注工作量。
AI.motivation: 医学影像分割需大量像素级标注，耗时耗力。现有CAM方法难以精确捕捉病灶边界，需改进弱监督分割策略以提升效率与精度。
AI.method: 设计多尺度推理策略减少单尺度推理的细节损失，构建包含两个并行解码分支的Mixed-UNet模型，融合双分支特征实现分割。
AI.result: 在本地医院及公共数据集上验证，Mixed-UNet在相同监督水平下优于主流分割方法，各类脑部病灶分割效果显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度推理与双分支结构有效增强CAM精度，为弱监督医学影像分割提供可行方案，降低人工标注依赖。

authors_text: Silvan Mertes,Andreas Margraf,Steffen Geinitz,Elisabeth André
title: Alternative Data Augmentation for Industrial Monitoring using Adversarial Learning
title_zh: 使用对抗性学习进行工业监控的替代数据增强
abstract: Visual inspection software has become a key factor in the manufacturing industry for quality control and process monitoring. Semantic segmentation models have gained importance since they allow for more precise examination. These models, however, require large image datasets in order to achieve a fair accuracy level. In some cases, training data is sparse or lacks of sufficient annotation, a fact that especially applies to highly specialized production environments. Data augmentation represents a common strategy to extend the dataset. Still, it only varies the image within a narrow range. In this article, a novel strategy is proposed to augment small image datasets. The approach is applied to surface monitoring of carbon fibers, a specific industry use case. We apply two different methods to create binary labels: a problem-tailored trigonometric function and a WGAN model. Afterwards, the labels are translated into color images using pix2pix and used to train a U-Net. The results suggest that the trigonometric function is superior to the WGAN model. However, a precise examination of the resulting images indicate that WGAN and image-to-image translation achieve good segmentation results and only deviate to a small degree from traditional data augmentation. In summary, this study examines an industry application of data synthesization using generative adversarial networks and explores its potential for monitoring systems of production environments. \keywords{Image-to-Image Translation, Carbon Fiber, Data Augmentation, Computer Vision, Industrial Monitoring, Adversarial Learning.
summary: Visual inspection software has become a key factor in the manufacturing industry for quality control and process monitoring. Semantic segmentation models have gained importance since they allow for more precise examination. These models, however, require large image datasets in order to achieve a fair accuracy level. Data augmentation represents a common strategy to extend the dataset. Still, it only varies the image within a narrow range. In this article, a novel strategy is proposed to augment small image datasets. The approach is applied to surface monitoring of carbon fibers, a specific industry use case. We apply two different methods to create binary labels: a problem-tailored trigonometric function and a WGAN model. Afterwards, the labels are translated into color images using pix2pix and used to train a U-Net. The results suggest that the trigonometric function is superior to the WGAN model. However, a precise examination of the resulting images indicate that WGAN and image-to-image translation achieve good segmentation results and only deviate to a small degree from traditional data augmentation. In summary, this study examines an industry application of data synthesization using generative adversarial networks and explores its potential for monitoring systems of production environments. \keywords{Image-to-Image Translation, Carbon Fiber, Data Augmentation, Computer Vision, Industrial Monitoring, Adversarial Learning.
abstract_zh: 视觉检测软件已成为制造业质量控制和过程监控的关键因素。语义分割模型变得越来越重要，因为它们允许更精确的检查。然而，这些模型需要大量图像数据集才能达到相当的准确度水平。在某些情况下，训练数据稀疏或缺乏足够的注释，这一事实尤其适用于高度专业化的生产环境。数据增强代表了扩展数据集的常见策略。尽管如此，它仅在很小的范围内改变图像。在本文中，提出了一种新的策略来增强小型图像数据集。该方法适用于碳纤维的表面监测，这是一个特定的行业用例。我们应用两种不同的方法来创建二元标签：针对问题定制的三角函数和 WGAN 模型。然后，使用 pix2pix 将标签转换为彩色图像，并用于训练 U-Net。结果表明三角函数优于 WGAN 模型。然而，对生成图像的精确检查表明，WGAN 和图像到图像转换实现了良好的分割结果，并且与传统数据增强的偏差很小。总之，本研究探讨了使用生成对抗网络进行数据合成的行业应用，并探讨了其在生产环境监控系统中的潜力。 \keywords{图像到图像翻译、碳纤维、数据增强、计算机视觉、工业监控、对抗性学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗学习的工业监控数据增强方法，用于解决碳纤维表面检测中数据集不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 工业视觉检测需高精度分割模型，但专用生产环境常面临标注数据稀缺的问题，传统数据增强效果有限。
AI.method: 采用三角函数生成二值标签与WGAN模型两种方法，结合pix2pix生成彩色图像训练U-Net网络。
AI.result: 三角函数方法在指标上优于WGAN，但两者生成图像的分割效果与传统增强差异较小。
AI.conclusion: 对抗学习在工业数据合成中具有潜力，但需平衡生成质量与实际应用需求。

Afterwards, the labels are translated into color images using pix2pix and used to train a U-Net. The results suggest that the trigonometric function is superior to the WGAN model. However, a precise examination of the resulting images indicate that WGAN and image-to-image translation achieve good segmentation results and only deviate to a small degree from traditional data augmentation. In summary, this study examines an industry application of data synthesization using generative adversarial networks and explores its potential for monitoring systems of production environments. \keywords{Image-to-Image Translation, Carbon Fiber, Data Augmentation, Computer Vision, Industrial Monitoring, Adversarial Learning. 视觉检测软件已成为制造业质量控制和过程监控的关键因素。语义分割模型变得越来越重要，因为它们允许更精确的检查。然而，这些模型需要大量图像数据集才能达到相当的准确度水平。在某些情况下，训练数据稀疏或缺乏足够的注释，这一事实尤其适用于高度专业化的生产环境。数据增强代表了扩展数据集的常见策略。尽管如此，它仅在很小的范围内改变图像。在本文中，提出了一种新的策略来增强小型图像数据集。该方法适用于碳纤维的表面监测，这是一个特定的行业用例。我们应用两种不同的方法来创建二元标签：针对问题定制的三角函数和 WGAN 模型。然后，使用 pix2pix 将标签转换为彩色图像，并用于训练 U-Net。结果表明三角函数优于 WGAN 模型。然而，对生成图像的精确检查表明，WGAN 和图像到图像转换实现了良好的分割结果，并且与传统数据增强的偏差很小。总之，本研究探讨了使用生成对抗网络进行数据合成的行业应用，并探讨了其在生产环境监控系统中的潜力。 \keywords{图像到图像翻译、碳纤维、数据增强、计算机视觉、工业监控、对抗性学习。 本文提出一种基于对抗学习的工业监控数据增强方法，用于解决碳纤维表面检测中数据集不足的问题。 Silvan Mertes,Andreas Margraf,Steffen Geinitz,Elisabeth André cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Adarsh Ghimire,Xiaoxiong Zhang,Naoufel Werghi,Sajid Javed,Jorge Dias
title: Deep learning framework for robot for person detection and tracking
title_zh: 用于人员检测和跟踪的机器人深度学习框架
abstract: Robustly tracking a person of interest in the crowd with a robotic platform is one of the cornerstones of human-robot interaction. The robot platform which is limited by the computational power, rapid movements, and occlusions of the target requires an efficient and robust framework to perform tracking. This paper proposes a deep learning framework for tracking a person using a mobile robot with a stereo camera. The proposed system detects a person based on its head, then utilizes the low-cost, high-speed regression network-based tracker to track the person of interest in real-time. The visual servoing of the mobile robot has been designed using a PID controller which utilizes tracker output and depth estimation of the person in subsequent frames, hence providing smooth and adaptive movement of the robot based on target movement. The proposed system has been tested in a real environment, thus proving its effectiveness.
summary: Robustly tracking a person of interest in the crowd with a robotic platform is one of the cornerstones of human-robot interaction. The robot platform which is limited by the computational power, rapid movements, and occlusions of the target requires an efficient and robust framework to perform tracking. This paper proposes a deep learning framework for tracking a person using a mobile robot with a stereo camera. The proposed system detects a person based on its head, then utilizes the low-cost, high-speed regression network-based tracker to track the person of interest in real-time. The visual servoing of the mobile robot has been designed using a PID controller which utilizes tracker output and depth estimation of the person in subsequent frames, hence providing smooth and adaptive movement of the robot based on target movement. The proposed system has been tested in a real environment, thus proving its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 使用机器人平台稳健地跟踪人群中感兴趣的人是人机交互的基石之一。机器人平台受到计算能力、快速运动和目标遮挡的限制，需要一个高效、鲁棒的框架来执行跟踪。本文提出了一种深度学习框架，用于使用带有立体摄像头的移动机器人来跟踪人。所提出的系统根据头部检测人，然后利用低成本、高速的基于回归网络的跟踪器来实时跟踪感兴趣的人。移动机器人的视觉伺服是使用 PID 控制器设计的，该控制器利用跟踪器输出和后续帧中人的深度估计，从而根据目标运动提供机器人的平滑和自适应运动。所提出的系统已经在真实环境中进行了测试，从而证明了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于机器人平台的人体检测与跟踪的深度学习框架。
AI.motivation: 在人群环境中，机器人平台需要一种高效且鲁棒的框架来实现对特定目标的跟踪，以应对计算能力限制、目标快速移动和遮挡等问题。
AI.method: 该系统基于立体相机，首先通过头部检测定位目标，再使用低成本、高速回归网络进行实时跟踪，并结合PID控制器实现机器人视觉伺服控制。
AI.result: 该系统在真实环境中进行了测试，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器人平台在复杂环境中的目标跟踪提供了一种高效、鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Tanja Svarre,Tony Russell-Rose
title: Think outside the search box: A comparative study of visual and form-based query builders
title_zh: 跳出搜索框思考：视觉和基于表单的查询构建器的比较研究
abstract: Knowledge workers such as healthcare information professionals, legal researchers, and librarians need to create and execute search strategies that are comprehensive, transparent, and reproducible. The traditional solution is to use proprietary query building tools provided by literature database vendors. In the majority of cases, these query builders are designed using a form-based paradigm that requires the user to enter keywords and ontology terms on a line-by-line basis and then combine them using Boolean operators. However, recent years have witnessed significant changes in human-computer interaction technologies and users can now engage with online information systems using a variety of novel data visualisation techniques. In this paper, we evaluate a new approach to query building in which users express concepts as objects on a visual canvas and compare this with traditional form-based query building in a lab-based user study. The results demonstrate the potential of visual interfaces to mitigate some of the shortcomings associated with form-based interfaces and encourage more exploratory search behaviour. They also demonstrate the value of having a temporary 'scratch' space in query formulation. In addition, the findings highlight an ongoing need for transparency and reproducibility in professional search and raise further questions around how these properties may best be supported.
summary: Knowledge workers such as healthcare information professionals, legal researchers, and librarians need to create and execute search strategies that are comprehensive, transparent, and reproducible. The traditional solution is to use proprietary query building tools provided by literature database vendors. In the majority of cases, these query builders are designed using a form-based paradigm that requires the user to enter keywords and ontology terms on a line-by-line basis and then combine them using Boolean operators. However, recent years have witnessed significant changes in human-computer interaction technologies and users can now engage with online information systems using a variety of novel data visualisation techniques. In this paper, we evaluate a new approach to query building in which users express concepts as objects on a visual canvas and compare this with traditional form-based query building in a lab-based user study. The results demonstrate the potential of visual interfaces to mitigate some of the shortcomings associated with form-based interfaces and encourage more exploratory search behaviour. They also demonstrate the value of having a temporary 'scratch' space in query formulation. In addition, the findings highlight an ongoing need for transparency and reproducibility in professional search and raise further questions around how these properties may best be supported.
abstract_zh: 医疗信息专业人员、法律研究人员和图书馆员等知识工作者需要创建和执行全面、透明和可重复的检索策略。传统的解决方案是使用文献数据库供应商提供的专有查询构建工具。在大多数情况下，这些查询生成器是使用基于表单的范例设计的，该范例要求用户逐行输入关键字和本体术语，然后使用布尔运算符将它们组合起来。然而，近年来人机交互技术发生了重大变化，用户现在可以使用各种新颖的数据可视化技术与在线信息系统进行交互。在本文中，我们评估了一种新的查询构建方法，其中用户将概念表达为视觉画布上的对象，并将其与基于实验室的用户研究中传统的基于表单的查询构建进行比较。结果表明，视觉界面有潜力减轻与基于表单的界面相关的一些缺点，并鼓励更多的探索性搜索行为。它们还展示了在查询制定中拥有临时“临时”空间的价值。此外，研究结果强调了专业搜索中对透明度和可重复性的持续需求，并提出了有关如何最好地支持这些属性的进一步问题。

AI.tldr: 比较视觉化查询构建工具与传统表单式工具在专业搜索中的效果
AI.motivation: 传统表单式查询工具存在局限性，而可视化技术可能提升搜索效率和用户体验，需验证其有效性
AI.method: 通过实验室用户研究，比较视觉化查询构建工具与传统表单式工具在任务完成度、用户满意度等方面的表现
AI.result: 视觉化界面能缓解传统工具的不足，促进探索性搜索，同时凸显临时草稿空间的重要性，并强调透明性和可重复性的必要性
AI.conclusion: 视觉化查询构建工具在提升搜索体验方面具有潜力，但需进一步解决透明性和可重复性等专业需求

authors_text: Thomas George Thuruthel,Fumiya Iida
title: Multimodel Sensor Fusion for Learning Rich Models for Interacting Soft Robots
title_zh: 多模型传感器融合，用于学习交互软机器人的丰富模型
abstract: Soft robots are typically approximated as low-dimensional systems, especially when learning-based methods are used. This leads to models that are limited in their capability to predict the large number of deformation modes and interactions that a soft robot can have. In this work, we present a deep-learning methodology to learn high-dimensional visual models of a soft robot combining multimodal sensorimotor information. The models are learned in an end-to-end fashion, thereby requiring no intermediate sensor processing or grounding of data. The capabilities and advantages of such a modelling approach are shown on a soft anthropomorphic finger with embedded soft sensors. We also show that how such an approach can be extended to develop higher level cognitive functions like identification of the self and the external environment and acquiring object manipulation skills. This work is a step towards the integration of soft robotics and developmental robotics architectures to create the next generation of intelligent soft robots.
summary: Soft robots are typically approximated as low-dimensional systems, especially when learning-based methods are used. This leads to models that are limited in their capability to predict the large number of deformation modes and interactions that a soft robot can have. In this work, we present a deep-learning methodology to learn high-dimensional visual models of a soft robot combining multimodal sensorimotor information. The models are learned in an end-to-end fashion, thereby requiring no intermediate sensor processing or grounding of data. The capabilities and advantages of such a modelling approach are shown on a soft anthropomorphic finger with embedded soft sensors. We also show that how such an approach can be extended to develop higher level cognitive functions like identification of the self and the external environment and acquiring object manipulation skills. This work is a step towards the integration of soft robotics and developmental robotics architectures to create the next generation of intelligent soft robots.
abstract_zh: 软机器人通常被近似为低维系统，特别是在使用基于学习的方法时。这导致模型预测软机器人可能具有的大量变形模式和交互的能力受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种深度学习方法来学习结合多模态感觉运动信息的软机器人的高维视觉模型。这些模型以端到端的方式学习，因此不需要中间传感器处理或数据基础。这种建模方法的功能和优点在带有嵌入式软传感器的软拟人手指上得到了体现。我们还展示了如何扩展这种方法以开发更高水平的认知功能，例如识别自我和外部环境以及获得物体操作技能。这项工作是朝着集成软机器人和开发机器人架构以创建下一代智能软机器人迈出的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模态传感器融合的深度学习方法，用于学习软机器人的高维视觉模型。
AI.motivation: 传统软机器人模型因简化为低维系统，难以准确预测其复杂的变形模式和交互行为，需更丰富的建模方法。
AI.method: 通过端到端深度学习框架整合多模态传感与运动数据，无需中间数据处理即可直接学习高维视觉模型。
AI.result: 在嵌入软传感器的仿生手指上验证了方法有效性，并展示了其在自我识别、环境感知及物体操作等高层认知功能中的扩展潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为软机器人与发育机器人架构的融合提供了新路径，推动下一代智能软机器人的发展。

search_text: Multimodel Sensor Fusion for Learning Rich Models for Interacting Soft Robots 多模型传感器融合，用于学习交互软机器人的丰富模型 Soft robots are typically approximated as low-dimensional systems, especially when learning-based methods are used. This leads to models that are limited in their capability to predict the large number of deformation modes and interactions that a soft robot can have. In this work, we present a deep-learning methodology to learn high-dimensional visual models of a soft robot combining multimodal sensorimotor information. The models are learned in an end-to-end fashion, thereby requiring no intermediate sensor processing or grounding of data. The capabilities and advantages of such a modelling approach are shown on a soft anthropomorphic finger with embedded soft sensors. We also show that how such an approach can be extended to develop higher level cognitive functions like identification of the self and the external environment and acquiring object manipulation skills. This work is a step towards the integration of soft robotics and developmental robotics architectures to create the next generation of intelligent soft robots. 软机器人通常被近似为低维系统，特别是在使用基于学习的方法时。这导致模型预测软机器人可能具有的大量变形模式和交互的能力受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种深度学习方法来学习结合多模态感觉运动信息的软机器人的高维视觉模型。这些模型以端到端的方式学习，因此不需要中间传感器处理或数据基础。这种建模方法的功能和优点在带有嵌入式软传感器的软拟人手指上得到了体现。我们还展示了如何扩展这种方法以开发更高水平的认知功能，例如识别自我和外部环境以及获得物体操作技能。这项工作是朝着集成软机器人和开发机器人架构以创建下一代智能软机器人迈出的一步。 本文提出一种基于多模态传感器融合的深度学习方法，用于学习软机器人的高维视觉模型。 Thomas George Thuruthel,Fumiya Iida cs.RO

authors_text: Hirotaka Tahara,Hikaru Sasaki,Hanbit Oh,Brendan Michael,Takamitsu Matsubara
title: Disturbance-Injected Robust Imitation Learning with Task Achievement
title_zh: 具有任务成就的干扰注入鲁棒模仿学习
comment: 7 pages, Accepted by the 2022 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2022)
comments: 7 pages, Accepted by the 2022 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2022)
abstract: Robust imitation learning using disturbance injections overcomes issues of limited variation in demonstrations. However, these methods assume demonstrations are optimal, and that policy stabilization can be learned via simple augmentations. In real-world scenarios, demonstrations are often of diverse-quality, and disturbance injection instead learns sub-optimal policies that fail to replicate desired behavior. To address this issue, this paper proposes a novel imitation learning framework that combines both policy robustification and optimal demonstration learning. Specifically, this combinatorial approach forces policy learning and disturbance injection optimization to focus on mainly learning from high task achievement demonstrations, while utilizing low achievement ones to decrease the number of samples needed. The effectiveness of the proposed method is verified through experiments using an excavation task in both simulations and a real robot, resulting in high-achieving policies that are more stable and robust to diverse-quality demonstrations. In addition, this method utilizes all of the weighted sub-optimal demonstrations without eliminating them, resulting in practical data efficiency benefits.
summary: Robust imitation learning using disturbance injections overcomes issues of limited variation in demonstrations. However, these methods assume demonstrations are optimal, and that policy stabilization can be learned via simple augmentations. In real-world scenarios, demonstrations are often of diverse-quality, and disturbance injection instead learns sub-optimal policies that fail to replicate desired behavior. To address this issue, this paper proposes a novel imitation learning framework that combines both policy robustification and optimal demonstration learning. Specifically, this combinatorial approach forces policy learning and disturbance injection optimization to focus on mainly learning from high task achievement demonstrations, while utilizing low achievement ones to decrease the number of samples needed. The effectiveness of the proposed method is verified through experiments using an excavation task in both simulations and a real robot, resulting in high-achieving policies that are more stable and robust to diverse-quality demonstrations. In addition, this method utilizes all of the weighted sub-optimal demonstrations without eliminating them, resulting in practical data efficiency benefits.
abstract_zh: 使用干扰注入的鲁棒模仿学习克服了演示中变化有限的问题。然而，这些方法假设示范是最优的，并且可以通过简单的增强来学习政策稳定。在现实场景中，演示通常具有不同的质量，并且干扰注入反而会学习无法复制所需行为的次优策略。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种新颖的模仿学习框架，该框架结合了策略鲁棒性和最优示范学习。具体来说，这种组合方法迫使策略学习和干扰注入优化主要集中于从高任务成就示范中学习，同时利用低成就示范来减少所需的样本数量。通过在模拟和真实机器人中使用挖掘任务进行的实验验证了所提出方法的有效性，从而产生了对不同质量的演示更加稳定和鲁棒的高效策略。此外，该方法利用所有加权次优演示而不消除它们，从而带来实际的数据效率优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合策略鲁棒化与最优示范学习的模仿学习框架，以解决真实场景中示范质量参差不齐导致的次优策略问题。
AI.motivation: 现有扰动注入方法假设示范为最优且通过简单增强实现策略稳定，但实际场景中示范质量多样，导致策略失效。需利用高低质量示范协同提升学习效率与稳定性。
AI.method: 设计组合方法，使策略学习与扰动优化聚焦于高任务成就示范，同时利用低成就示范减少样本需求，通过加权保留所有子最优示范提升数据效率。
AI.result: 在模拟与真实机械臂挖掘任务中验证，方法生成的策略更稳定且对多样质量示范鲁棒，同时实现高效数据利用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过协同利用高低质量示范，在实际场景中有效提升策略性能与数据效率，为鲁棒模仿学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Milan Groshev,Jorge Martín-Pérez,Carlos Guimarães,Antonio de la Oliva,Carlos J. Bernardos
title: FoReCo: a forecast-based recovery mechanism for real-time remote control of robotic manipulators
title_zh: FoReCo：基于预测的机器人机械臂实时远程控制恢复机制
comment: 10 figures, 12 pages, journal, submitted to IEEE TNSM
comments: 10 figures, 12 pages, journal, submitted to IEEE TNSM
abstract: Wireless communications represent a game changer for future manufacturing plants, enabling flexible production chains as machinery and other components are not restricted to a location by the rigid wired connections on the factory floor. However, the presence of electromagnetic interference in the wireless spectrum may result in packet loss and delay, making it a challenging environment to meet the extreme reliability requirements of industrial applications. In such conditions, achieving real-time remote control, either from the Edge or Cloud, becomes complex. In this paper, we investigate a forecast-based recovery mechanism for real-time remote control of robotic manipulators (FoReCo) that uses Machine Learning (ML) to infer lost commands caused by interference in the wireless channel. FoReCo is evaluated through both simulation and experimentation in interference prone IEEE 802.11 wireless links, and using a commercial research robot that performs pick-and-place tasks. Results show that in case of interference, FoReCo trajectory error is decreased by x18 and x2 times in simulation and experimentation, and that FoReCo is sufficiently lightweight to be deployed in the hardware of already used in existing solutions.
summary: Wireless communications represent a game changer for future manufacturing plants, enabling flexible production chains as machinery and other components are not restricted to a location by the rigid wired connections on the factory floor. However, the presence of electromagnetic interference in the wireless spectrum may result in packet loss and delay, making it a challenging environment to meet the extreme reliability requirements of industrial applications. In such conditions, achieving real-time remote control, either from the Edge or Cloud, becomes complex. In this paper, we investigate a forecast-based recovery mechanism for real-time remote control of robotic manipulators (FoReCo) that uses Machine Learning (ML) to infer lost commands caused by interference in the wireless channel. FoReCo is evaluated through both simulation and experimentation in interference prone IEEE 802.11 wireless links, and using a commercial research robot that performs pick-and-place tasks. Results show that in case of interference, FoReCo trajectory error is decreased by x18 and x2 times in simulation and experimentation, and that FoReCo is sufficiently lightweight to be deployed in the hardware of already used in existing solutions.
abstract_zh: 无线通信代表了未来制造工厂的游戏规则改变者，实现了灵活的生产链，因为机器和其他组件不再受到工厂车间刚性有线连接的限制。然而，无线频谱中电磁干扰的存在可能会导致数据包丢失和延迟，从而使其成为满足工业应用的极端可靠性要求的具有挑战性的环境。在这种情况下，从边缘或云端实现实时远程控制变得很复杂。在本文中，我们研究了一种基于预测的机器人操纵器实时远程控制恢复机制（FoReCo），该机制使用机器学习（ML）来推断因无线信道干扰而导致的命令丢失。 FoReCo 通过在易受干扰的 IEEE 802.11 无线链路中进行模拟和实验，并使用执行拾放任务的商业研究机器人进行评估。结果表明，在干扰情况下，FoReCo 轨迹误差在仿真和实验中分别降低了 18 倍和 2 倍，并且 FoReCo 足够轻量，可以部署在现有解决方案中已使用的硬件中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预测的恢复机制FoReCo，用于解决无线环境下工业机器人实时远程控制中的丢包和延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 无线通信在工业场景中易受电磁干扰导致丢包和延迟，影响实时控制的可靠性，亟需有效解决方案。
AI.method: 利用机器学习预测无线信道中因干扰丢失的指令，并通过仿真和实际机器人实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 仿真和实验中轨迹误差分别降低18倍和2倍，且FoReCo轻量级可部署于现有硬件。
AI.conclusion: FoReCo能有效应对无线干扰下的实时控制挑战，具备实际部署价值。

In this paper, we investigate a forecast-based recovery mechanism for real-time remote control of robotic manipulators (FoReCo) that uses Machine Learning (ML) to infer lost commands caused by interference in the wireless channel. FoReCo is evaluated through both simulation and experimentation in interference prone IEEE 802.11 wireless links, and using a commercial research robot that performs pick-and-place tasks. Results show that in case of interference, FoReCo trajectory error is decreased by x18 and x2 times in simulation and experimentation, and that FoReCo is sufficiently lightweight to be deployed in the hardware of already used in existing solutions. 无线通信代表了未来制造工厂的游戏规则改变者，实现了灵活的生产链，因为机器和其他组件不再受到工厂车间刚性有线连接的限制。然而，无线频谱中电磁干扰的存在可能会导致数据包丢失和延迟，从而使其成为满足工业应用的极端可靠性要求的具有挑战性的环境。在这种情况下，从边缘或云端实现实时远程控制变得很复杂。在本文中，我们研究了一种基于预测的机器人操纵器实时远程控制恢复机制（FoReCo），该机制使用机器学习（ML）来推断因无线信道干扰而导致的命令丢失。 FoReCo 通过在易受干扰的 IEEE 802.11 无线链路中进行模拟和实验，并使用执行拾放任务的商业研究机器人进行评估。结果表明，在干扰情况下，FoReCo 轨迹误差在仿真和实验中分别降低了 18 倍和 2 倍，并且 FoReCo 足够轻量，可以部署在现有解决方案中已使用的硬件中。 本文提出了一种基于预测的恢复机制FoReCo，用于解决无线环境下工业机器人实时远程控制中的丢包和延迟问题。 Milan Groshev,Jorge Martín-Pérez,Carlos Guimarães,Antonio de la Oliva,Carlos J. Bernardos cs.NI,cs.RO

authors_text: Hao Li,Xu Li,Belhal Karimi,Jie Chen,Mingming Sun
title: Joint learning of object graph and relation graph for visual question answering
title_zh: 用于视觉问答的对象图和关系图的联合学习
abstract: Modeling visual question answering(VQA) through scene graphs can significantly improve the reasoning accuracy and interpretability. However, existing models answer poorly for complex reasoning questions with attributes or relations, which causes false attribute selection or missing relation in Figure 1(a). It is because these models cannot balance all kinds of information in scene graphs, neglecting relation and attribute information. In this paper, we introduce a novel Dual Message-passing enhanced Graph Neural Network (DM-GNN), which can obtain a balanced representation by properly encoding multi-scale scene graph information. Specifically, we (i)transform the scene graph into two graphs with diversified focuses on objects and relations; Then we design a dual structure to encode them, which increases the weights from relations (ii)fuse the encoder output with attribute features, which increases the weights from attributes; (iii)propose a message-passing mechanism to enhance the information transfer between objects, relations and attributes. We conduct extensive experiments on datasets including GQA, VG, motif-VG and achieve new state of the art.
summary: Modeling visual question answering(VQA) through scene graphs can significantly improve the reasoning accuracy and interpretability. However, existing models answer poorly for complex reasoning questions with attributes or relations, which causes false attribute selection or missing relation in Figure 1(a). It is because these models cannot balance all kinds of information in scene graphs, neglecting relation and attribute information. In this paper, we introduce a novel Dual Message-passing enhanced Graph Neural Network (DM-GNN), which can obtain a balanced representation by properly encoding multi-scale scene graph information. Specifically, we (i)transform the scene graph into two graphs with diversified focuses on objects and relations; Then we design a dual structure to encode them, which increases the weights from relations (ii)fuse the encoder output with attribute features, which increases the weights from attributes; (iii)propose a message-passing mechanism to enhance the information transfer between objects, relations and attributes. We conduct extensive experiments on datasets including GQA, VG, motif-VG and achieve new state of the art.
abstract_zh: 通过场景图对视觉问答（VQA）进行建模可以显着提高推理准确性和可解释性。然而，现有模型对于具有属性或关系的复杂推理问题回答不佳，这导致图 1(a) 中错误的属性选择或缺失关系。这是因为这些模型无法平衡场景图中的各种信息，忽略了关系和属性信息。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的双消息传递增强图神经网络（DM-GNN），它可以通过正确编码多尺度场景图信息来获得平衡表示。具体来说，我们（i）将场景图转换为两个分别关注对象和关系的图；然后我们设计了一个对偶结构来对它们进行编码，这增加了关系的权重（ii）将编码器输出与属性特征融合，这增加了属性的权重； (iii)提出一种消息传递机制来增强对象、关系和属性之间的信息传递。我们对 GQA、VG、motif-VG 等数据集进行了广泛的实验，并实现了新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双消息传递增强的图神经网络（DM-GNN），通过联合学习场景图中的物体图和关系图，提升视觉问答任务的推理准确性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理包含属性或复杂关系的视觉问答时表现不佳，存在属性选择错误或关系缺失的问题，主要原因是未能平衡场景图中的多类信息，忽视了关系和属性的重要性。
AI.method: 设计DM-GNN模型：(i)将场景图拆分为侧重物体和关系的双图结构；(ii)通过双编码器增强关系和属性权重；(iii)引入消息传递机制促进物体、关系与属性间的信息交互。
AI.result: 在GQA、VG、motif-VG等数据集上取得新的最先进性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过平衡多尺度场景图信息并增强跨模态交互，DM-GNN有效解决了复杂视觉问答任务中的信息缺失问题，提升了模型表现。

authors_text: Stefan Borasinski,Esin Yavuz,Sébastien Béhuret
title: Paired Image-to-Image Translation Quality Assessment Using Multi-Method Fusion
title_zh: 使用多方法融合的配对图像到图像翻译质量评估
abstract: How best to evaluate synthesized images has been a longstanding problem in image-to-image translation, and to date remains largely unresolved. This paper proposes a novel approach that combines signals of image quality between paired source and transformation to predict the latter's similarity with a hypothetical ground truth. We trained a Multi-Method Fusion (MMF) model via an ensemble of gradient-boosted regressors using Image Quality Assessment (IQA) metrics to predict Deep Image Structure and Texture Similarity (DISTS), enabling models to be ranked without the need for ground truth data. Analysis revealed the task to be feature-constrained, introducing a trade-off at inference between metric computation time and prediction accuracy. The MMF model we present offers an efficient way to automate the evaluation of synthesized images, and by extension the image-to-image translation models that generated them.
summary: How best to evaluate synthesized images has been a longstanding problem in image-to-image translation, and to date remains largely unresolved. This paper proposes a novel approach that combines signals of image quality between paired source and transformation to predict the latter's similarity with a hypothetical ground truth. We trained a Multi-Method Fusion (MMF) model via an ensemble of gradient-boosted regressors using Image Quality Assessment (IQA) metrics to predict Deep Image Structure and Texture Similarity (DISTS), enabling models to be ranked without the need for ground truth data. Analysis revealed the task to be feature-constrained, introducing a trade-off at inference between metric computation time and prediction accuracy. The MMF model we present offers an efficient way to automate the evaluation of synthesized images, and by extension the image-to-image translation models that generated them.
abstract_zh: 如何最好地评估合成图像一直是图像到图像翻译中的一个长期存在的问题，并且迄今为止在很大程度上仍未得到解决。本文提出了一种新颖的方法，它将配对源和变换之间的图像质量信号结合起来，以预测后者与假设的基本事实的相似性。我们通过梯度增强回归器集合训练了多方法融合（MMF）模型，使用图像质量评估（IQA）指标来预测深度​​图像结构和纹理相似性（DISTS），从而无需地面实况数据即可对模型进行排名。分析表明该任务受到特征限制，在度量计算时间和预测准确性之间引入了推理权衡。我们提出的 MMF 模型提供了一种有效的方法来自动评估合成图像，并扩展生成它们的图像到图像转换模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需真实数据的图像翻译质量评估方法，通过融合多指标预测合成图像与假设真实图像的相似度。
AI.motivation: 现有图像翻译质量评估依赖真实数据且存在局限，需开发无需真实数据的自动化评估方法以提升效率。
AI.method: 构建多方法融合（MMF）模型，集成梯度提升回归器与图像质量评估指标，预测深度图像结构与纹理相似度（DISTS）。
AI.result: 验证了任务特征受限性，揭示评估速度与精度的权衡关系，证明MMF模型可高效自动化评估合成图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为图像翻译模型提供无需真实数据的高效评估方案，推动合成图像质量分析的自动化进程。

authors_text: Shiqi Yang,Yaxing Wang,Kai Wang,Shangling Jui,Joost van de Weijer
title: Attracting and Dispersing: A Simple Approach for Source-free Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 吸引和分散：无源域适应的简单方法
abstract: We propose a simple but effective source-free domain adaptation (SFDA) method. Treating SFDA as an unsupervised clustering problem and following the intuition that local neighbors in feature space should have more similar predictions than other features, we propose to optimize an objective of prediction consistency. This objective encourages local neighborhood features in feature space to have similar predictions while features farther away in feature space have dissimilar predictions, leading to efficient feature clustering and cluster assignment simultaneously. For efficient training, we seek to optimize an upper-bound of the objective resulting in two simple terms. Furthermore, we relate popular existing methods in domain adaptation, source-free domain adaptation and contrastive learning via the perspective of discriminability and diversity. The experimental results prove the superiority of our method, and our method can be adopted as a simple but strong baseline for future research in SFDA. Our method can be also adapted to source-free open-set and partial-set DA which further shows the generalization ability of our method. Code is available in https://github.com/Albert0147/AaD_SFDA.
summary: We propose a simple but effective source-free domain adaptation (SFDA) method. Treating SFDA as an unsupervised clustering problem and following the intuition that local neighbors in feature space should have more similar predictions than other features, we propose to optimize an objective of prediction consistency. This objective encourages local neighborhood features in feature space to have similar predictions while features farther away in feature space have dissimilar predictions, leading to efficient feature clustering and cluster assignment simultaneously. For efficient training, we seek to optimize an upper-bound of the objective resulting in two simple terms. Furthermore, we relate popular existing methods in domain adaptation, source-free domain adaptation and contrastive learning via the perspective of discriminability and diversity. The experimental results prove the superiority of our method, and our method can be adopted as a simple but strong baseline for future research in SFDA. Our method can be also adapted to source-free open-set and partial-set DA which further shows the generalization ability of our method. Code is available in https://github.com/Albert0147/AaD_SFDA.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单但有效的无源域适应（SFDA）方法。将 SFDA 视为无监督聚类问题，并遵循特征空间中的局部邻居应该比其他特征有更多相似预测的直觉，我们建议优化预测一致性的目标。该目标鼓励特征空间中的局部邻域特征具有相似的预测，而特征空间中较远的特征具有不同的预测，从而同时实现高效的特征聚类和聚类分配。为了有效的训练，我们寻求优化目标的上限，从而产生两个简单的术语。此外，我们从可区分性和多样性的角度，将领域适应、无源领域适应和对比学习中流行的现有方法联系起来。实验结果证明了我们方法的优越性，我们的方法可以作为 SFDA 未来研究的简单但有力的基线。我们的方法还可以适用于无源开放集和部分集 DA，这进一步显示了我们方法的泛化能力。代码可在 https://github.com/Albert0147/AaD_SFDA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单有效的无源域适应（SFDA）方法，通过优化预测一致性目标实现特征空间的聚类与分配。
AI.motivation: 现有SFDA方法在处理特征空间局部相似性与全局差异性时存在不足，需设计更高效的聚类与预测一致性优化策略。
AI.method: 将SFDA视为无监督聚类问题，通过优化预测一致性目标，使局部邻居特征预测相似、远距离特征预测差异，并分解目标为两个简单项进行高效训练。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法的优越性，其可作为SFDA研究的强基线，并能扩展至开放集与部分集域适应任务。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过预测一致性优化实现了高效的特征聚类，具有良好的泛化能力，为SFDA提供了简单有效的解决方案。

search_text: Attracting and Dispersing: A Simple Approach for Source-free Domain Adaptation 吸引和分散：无源域适应的简单方法 We propose a simple but effective source-free domain adaptation (SFDA) method. Treating SFDA as an unsupervised clustering problem and following the intuition that local neighbors in feature space should have more similar predictions than other features, we propose to optimize an objective of prediction consistency. This objective encourages local neighborhood features in feature space to have similar predictions while features farther away in feature space have dissimilar predictions, leading to efficient feature clustering and cluster assignment simultaneously. For efficient training, we seek to optimize an upper-bound of the objective resulting in two simple terms. Furthermore, we relate popular existing methods in domain adaptation, source-free domain adaptation and contrastive learning via the perspective of discriminability and diversity. The experimental results prove the superiority of our method, and our method can be adopted as a simple but strong baseline for future research in SFDA. Our method can be also adapted to source-free open-set and partial-set DA which further shows the generalization ability of our method. Code is available in https://github.com/Albert0147/AaD_SFDA. 我们提出了一种简单但有效的无源域适应（SFDA）方法。将 SFDA 视为无监督聚类问题，并遵循特征空间中的局部邻居应该比其他特征有更多相似预测的直觉，我们建议优化预测一致性的目标。该目标鼓励特征空间中的局部邻域特征具有相似的预测，而特征空间中较远的特征具有不同的预测，从而同时实现高效的特征聚类和聚类分配。为了有效的训练，我们寻求优化目标的上限，从而产生两个简单的术语。此外，我们从可区分性和多样性的角度，将领域适应、无源领域适应和对比学习中流行的现有方法联系起来。实验结果证明了我们方法的优越性，我们的方法可以作为 SFDA 未来研究的简单但有力的基线。我们的方法还可以适用于无源开放集和部分集 DA，这进一步显示了我们方法的泛化能力。代码可在 https://github.com/Albert0147/AaD_SFDA 获取。 本文提出一种简单有效的无源域适应（SFDA）方法，通过优化预测一致性目标实现特征空间的聚类与分配。 Shiqi Yang,Yaxing Wang,Kai Wang,Shangling Jui,Joost van de Weijer cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Huiyun Yang,Huadong Chen,Hao Zhou,Lei Li
title: Enhancing Cross-lingual Transfer by Manifold Mixup
title_zh: 通过流形混合增强跨语言迁移
abstract: Based on large-scale pre-trained multilingual representations, recent cross-lingual transfer methods have achieved impressive transfer performances. However, the performance of target languages still lags far behind the source language. In this paper, our analyses indicate such a performance gap is strongly associated with the cross-lingual representation discrepancy. To achieve better cross-lingual transfer performance, we propose the cross-lingual manifold mixup (X-Mixup) method, which adaptively calibrates the representation discrepancy and gives a compromised representation for target languages. Experiments on the XTREME benchmark show X-Mixup achieves 1.8% performance gains on multiple text understanding tasks, compared with strong baselines, and significantly reduces the cross-lingual representation discrepancy.
summary: Based on large-scale pre-trained multilingual representations, recent cross-lingual transfer methods have achieved impressive transfer performances. However, the performance of target languages still lags far behind the source language. In this paper, our analyses indicate such a performance gap is strongly associated with the cross-lingual representation discrepancy. To achieve better cross-lingual transfer performance, we propose the cross-lingual manifold mixup (X-Mixup) method, which adaptively calibrates the representation discrepancy and gives a compromised representation for target languages. Experiments on the XTREME benchmark show X-Mixup achieves 1.8% performance gains on multiple text understanding tasks, compared with strong baselines, and significantly reduces the cross-lingual representation discrepancy.
abstract_zh: 基于大规模预训练的多语言表示，最近的跨语言迁移方法取得了令人印象深刻的迁移性能。然而，目标语言的性能仍然远远落后于源语言。在本文中，我们的分析表明这种性能差距与跨语言表示差异密切相关。为了实现更好的跨语言传输性能，我们提出了跨语言流形混合（X-Mixup）方法，该方法自适应地校准表示差异并为目标语言提供折衷的表示。 XTREME 基准测试的实验表明，与强大的基线相比，X-Mixup 在多个文本理解任务上实现了 1.8% 的性能提升，并显着减少了跨语言表示差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为X-Mixup的跨语言流形混洗方法，旨在通过校准跨语言表示差异来提升多语言迁移性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言迁移方法在目标语言上的表现显著低于源语言，主要受限于跨语言表示空间的不一致性问题。
AI.method: 设计X-Mixup算法自适应调整源语言与目标语言的表示分布，通过生成妥协性表征来缩小跨语言表示差异。
AI.result: 在XTREME基准测试中，X-Mixup在多项文本理解任务上实现1.8%的性能提升，并显著降低跨语言表示差异度。
AI.conclusion: X-Mixup方法有效缓解了跨语言表示不一致问题，为提升多语言迁移性能提供了新思路和可行方案。

authors_text: Xiaokun Zhang,Bo Xu,Liang Yang,Chenliang Li,Fenglong Ma,Haifeng Liu,Hongfei Lin
title: Price DOES Matter! Modeling Price and Interest Preferences in Session-based Recommendation
title_zh: 价格很重要！基于会话的推荐中的价格和兴趣偏好建模
comment: This paper has bee accepted as a conference paper at SIGIR 2022
comments: This paper has bee accepted as a conference paper at SIGIR 2022
abstract: Session-based recommendation aims to predict items that an anonymous user would like to purchase based on her short behavior sequence. The current approaches towards session-based recommendation only focus on modeling users' interest preferences, while they all ignore a key attribute of an item, i.e., the price. Many marketing studies have shown that the price factor significantly influences users' behaviors and the purchase decisions of users are determined by both price and interest preferences simultaneously. However, it is nontrivial to incorporate price preferences for session-based recommendation. Firstly, it is hard to handle heterogeneous information from various features of items to capture users' price preferences. Secondly, it is difficult to model the complex relations between price and interest preferences in determining user choices. To address the above challenges, we propose a novel method Co-guided Heterogeneous Hypergraph Network (CoHHN) for session-based recommendation. Towards the first challenge, we devise a heterogeneous hypergraph to represent heterogeneous information and rich relations among them. A dual-channel aggregating mechanism is then designed to aggregate various information in the heterogeneous hypergraph. After that, we extract users' price preferences and interest preferences via attention layers. As to the second challenge, a co-guided learning scheme is designed to model the relations between price and interest preferences and enhance the learning of each other. Finally, we predict user actions based on item features and users' price and interest preferences. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed CoHHN. Further analysis reveals the significance of price for session-based recommendation.
summary: Session-based recommendation aims to predict items that an anonymous user would like to purchase based on her short behavior sequence. The current approaches towards session-based recommendation only focus on modeling users' interest preferences, while they all ignore a key attribute of an item, i.e., the price. Many marketing studies have shown that the price factor significantly influences users' behaviors and the purchase decisions of users are determined by both price and interest preferences simultaneously. However, it is nontrivial to incorporate price preferences for session-based recommendation. Firstly, it is hard to handle heterogeneous information from various features of items to capture users' price preferences. Secondly, it is difficult to model the complex relations between price and interest preferences in determining user choices. To address the above challenges, we propose a novel method Co-guided Heterogeneous Hypergraph Network (CoHHN) for session-based recommendation. Towards the first challenge, we devise a heterogeneous hypergraph to represent heterogeneous information and rich relations among them. A dual-channel aggregating mechanism is then designed to aggregate various information in the heterogeneous hypergraph. After that, we extract users' price preferences and interest preferences via attention layers. As to the second challenge, a co-guided learning scheme is designed to model the relations between price and interest preferences and enhance the learning of each other. Finally, we predict user actions based on item features and users' price and interest preferences. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed CoHHN. Further analysis reveals the significance of price for session-based recommendation.
abstract_zh: 基于会话的推荐旨在根据匿名用户的简短行为序列来预测她想要购买的商品。当前基于会话的推荐方法仅关注对用户兴趣偏好进行建模，而忽略了商品的一个关键属性，即价格。许多营销研究表明，价格因素显着影响用户的行为，用户的购买决策同时受到价格偏好和兴趣偏好的影响。然而，将价格偏好纳入基于会话的推荐并非易事。首先，很难处理来自商品各种特征的异构信息以捕获用户的价格偏好。其次，在确定用户选择时很难对价格和兴趣偏好之间的复杂关系进行建模。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种用于基于会话的推荐的新方法共同引导异构超图网络（CoHHN）。针对第一个挑战，我们设计了一个异构超图来表示异构信息和它们之间丰富的关系。然后设计双通道聚合机制来聚合异构超图中的各种信息。之后，我们通过注意力层提取用户的价格偏好和兴趣偏好。对于第二个挑战，设计了一种共同引导的学习方案来模拟价格和兴趣偏好之间的关系，并增强彼此的学习。最后，我们根据商品特征以及用户的价格和兴趣偏好来预测用户行为。对三个真实世界数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出的 CoHHN 的有效性。进一步的分析揭示了价格对于基于会话的推荐的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过建模价格和兴趣偏好，提升基于会话的推荐系统效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于会话的推荐方法仅关注用户兴趣偏好，忽略了价格这一关键影响因素，而价格与兴趣共同决定用户购买决策。
AI.method: 提出Co-guided Heterogeneous Hypergraph Network (CoHHN)方法，利用异构超图建模多特征信息，通过双通道聚合机制提取价格和兴趣偏好，并设计协同引导学习框架建模二者关系。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验表明，CoHHN在推荐效果上优于现有方法，验证了价格因素的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 价格是影响用户行为的关键因素，本文方法有效融合价格与兴趣偏好，为会话推荐提供了新思路。

As to the second challenge, a co-guided learning scheme is designed to model the relations between price and interest preferences and enhance the learning of each other. Finally, we predict user actions based on item features and users' price and interest preferences. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed CoHHN. Further analysis reveals the significance of price for session-based recommendation. 基于会话的推荐旨在根据匿名用户的简短行为序列来预测她想要购买的商品。当前基于会话的推荐方法仅关注对用户兴趣偏好进行建模，而忽略了商品的一个关键属性，即价格。许多营销研究表明，价格因素显着影响用户的行为，用户的购买决策同时受到价格偏好和兴趣偏好的影响。然而，将价格偏好纳入基于会话的推荐并非易事。首先，很难处理来自商品各种特征的异构信息以捕获用户的价格偏好。其次，在确定用户选择时很难对价格和兴趣偏好之间的复杂关系进行建模。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种用于基于会话的推荐的新方法共同引导异构超图网络（CoHHN）。针对第一个挑战，我们设计了一个异构超图来表示异构信息和它们之间丰富的关系。然后设计双通道聚合机制来聚合异构超图中的各种信息。之后，我们通过注意力层提取用户的价格偏好和兴趣偏好。对于第二个挑战，设计了一种共同引导的学习方案来模拟价格和兴趣偏好之间的关系，并增强彼此的学习。最后，我们根据商品特征以及用户的价格和兴趣偏好来预测用户行为。对三个真实世界数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出的 CoHHN 的有效性。进一步的分析揭示了价格对于基于会话的推荐的重要性。 本文旨在通过建模价格和兴趣偏好，提升基于会话的推荐系统效果。 Xiaokun Zhang,Bo Xu,Liang Yang,Chenliang Li,Fenglong Ma,Haifeng Liu,Hongfei Lin cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Keyu Wu,Yifan Ye,Lingchen Yang,Hongbo Fu,Kun Zhou,Youyi Zheng
title: NeuralHDHair: Automatic High-fidelity Hair Modeling from a Single Image Using Implicit Neural Representations
title_zh: NeuralHDHair：使用隐式神经表示从单个图像自动进行高保真头发建模
abstract: Undoubtedly, high-fidelity 3D hair plays an indispensable role in digital humans. However, existing monocular hair modeling methods are either tricky to deploy in digital systems (e.g., due to their dependence on complex user interactions or large databases) or can produce only a coarse geometry. In this paper, we introduce NeuralHDHair, a flexible, fully automatic system for modeling high-fidelity hair from a single image. The key enablers of our system are two carefully designed neural networks: an IRHairNet (Implicit representation for hair using neural network) for inferring high-fidelity 3D hair geometric features (3D orientation field and 3D occupancy field) hierarchically and a GrowingNet(Growing hair strands using neural network) to efficiently generate 3D hair strands in parallel. Specifically, we perform a coarse-to-fine manner and propose a novel voxel-aligned implicit function (VIFu) to represent the global hair feature, which is further enhanced by the local details extracted from a hair luminance map. To improve the efficiency of a traditional hair growth algorithm, we adopt a local neural implicit function to grow strands based on the estimated 3D hair geometric features. Extensive experiments show that our method is capable of constructing a high-fidelity 3D hair model from a single image, both efficiently and effectively, and achieves the-state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Undoubtedly, high-fidelity 3D hair plays an indispensable role in digital humans. However, existing monocular hair modeling methods are either tricky to deploy in digital systems (e.g., due to their dependence on complex user interactions or large databases) or can produce only a coarse geometry. In this paper, we introduce NeuralHDHair, a flexible, fully automatic system for modeling high-fidelity hair from a single image. The key enablers of our system are two carefully designed neural networks: an IRHairNet (Implicit representation for hair using neural network) for inferring high-fidelity 3D hair geometric features (3D orientation field and 3D occupancy field) hierarchically and a GrowingNet(Growing hair strands using neural network) to efficiently generate 3D hair strands in parallel. Specifically, we perform a coarse-to-fine manner and propose a novel voxel-aligned implicit function (VIFu) to represent the global hair feature, which is further enhanced by the local details extracted from a hair luminance map. To improve the efficiency of a traditional hair growth algorithm, we adopt a local neural implicit function to grow strands based on the estimated 3D hair geometric features. Extensive experiments show that our method is capable of constructing a high-fidelity 3D hair model from a single image, both efficiently and effectively, and achieves the-state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 毫无疑问，高保真3D头发在数字人类中扮演着不可或缺的角色。然而，现有的单眼头发建模方法要么很难在数字系统中部署（例如，由于它们依赖于复杂的用户交互或大型数据库），要么只能产生粗糙的几何形状。在本文中，我们介绍了 NeuralHDHair，这是一种灵活的全自动系统，用于根据单个图像对高保真头发进行建模。我们系统的关键推动因素是两个精心设计的神经网络：IRHairNet（使用神经网络隐式表示头发），用于分层推断高保真 3D 头发几何特征（3D 方向场和 3D 占用场）；GrowingNet（使用神经网络生长发丝），用于高效并行生成 3D 发丝。具体来说，我们执行从粗到细的方式，并提出一种新颖的体素对齐隐式函数（VIFu）来表示全局头发特征，通过从头发亮度图提取的局部细节进一步增强该特征。为了提高传统头发生长算法的效率，我们采用局部神经隐式函数根据估计的 3D 头发几何特征来生长发丝。大量实验表明，我们的方法能够从单个图像高效且有效地构建高保真 3D 头发模型，并实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeuralHDHair系统，通过单张图像自动生成高保真3D发型模型。
AI.motivation: 现有单目发型建模方法或依赖复杂交互/大型数据库难以部署，或仅能生成粗糙几何结构，亟需高效且高质量的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计IRHairNet分层推理3D发型几何特征（方向场/占用场）与GrowingNet并行生成发丝，采用粗到细策略结合体素对齐隐函数（VIFu）与发丝亮度图增强细节，利用局部神经隐函数提升发丝生长效率。
AI.result: 方法能从单张图像高效生成高保真3D发型模型，在多项指标上达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该系统实现了全自动、高保真发型建模，为数字人应用提供了有效技术支撑。

authors_text: Manuel Baum,Oliver Brock
title: "The World Is Its Own Best Model": Robust Real-World Manipulation Through Online Behavior Selection
title_zh: “世界是它自己的最佳模型”：通过在线行为选择实现稳健的现实世界操纵
comment: Paper accepted at ICRA 22, DOI and License will be updated upon publication at ICRA
comments: Paper accepted at ICRA 22, DOI and License will be updated upon publication at ICRA
abstract: Robotic manipulation behavior should be robust to disturbances that violate high-level task-structure. Such robustness can be achieved by constantly monitoring the environment to observe the discrete high-level state of the task. This is possible because different phases of a task are characterized by different sensor patterns and by monitoring these patterns a robot can decide which controllers to execute in the moment. This relaxes assumptions about the temporal sequence of those controllers and makes behavior robust to unforeseen disturbances. We implement this idea as probabilistic filter over discrete states where each state is direcly associated with a controller. Based on this framework we present a robotic system that is able to open a drawer and grasp tennis balls from it in a surprisingly robust way.
summary: Robotic manipulation behavior should be robust to disturbances that violate high-level task-structure. Such robustness can be achieved by constantly monitoring the environment to observe the discrete high-level state of the task. This is possible because different phases of a task are characterized by different sensor patterns and by monitoring these patterns a robot can decide which controllers to execute in the moment. This relaxes assumptions about the temporal sequence of those controllers and makes behavior robust to unforeseen disturbances. We implement this idea as probabilistic filter over discrete states where each state is direcly associated with a controller. Based on this framework we present a robotic system that is able to open a drawer and grasp tennis balls from it in a surprisingly robust way.
abstract_zh: 机器人操纵行为应该对违反高级任务结构的干扰具有鲁棒性。这种鲁棒性可以通过不断监视环境以观察任务的离散高级状态来实现。这是可能的，因为任务的不同阶段具有不同的传感器模式，并且通过监视这些模式，机器人可以决定当前执行哪些控制器。这放宽了对这些控制器的时间序列的假设，并使行为对不可预见的干扰具有鲁棒性。我们将这个想法实现为离散状态的概率过滤器，其中每个状态都与控制器直接相关。基于这个框架，我们提出了一个机器人系统，它能够以令人惊讶的稳健方式打开抽屉并从中抓取网球。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过在线行为选择实现鲁棒现实世界操作的方法，利用环境监控和概率滤波器关联离散状态与控制器，以适应任务过程中的意外干扰。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人操作依赖固定控制器序列，但现实环境中的意外干扰易导致任务失败，需开发能动态调整行为策略的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 构建基于概率滤波器的离散状态监控系统，每个状态直接映射到特定控制器，通过实时感知环境特征动态切换控制器以适应干扰。
AI.result: 实现的机器人系统可稳定完成抽屉开启及网球抓取任务，表现出对环境扰动和状态变化的强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦控制器时序约束，为复杂动态环境中的机器人操作提供了可扩展的鲁棒性解决方案。

authors_text: Satoshi Funabashi,Tomoki Isobe,Fei Hongyi,Atsumu Hiramoto,Alexander Schmitz,Shigeki Sugano,Tetsuya Ogata
title: Multi-Fingered In-Hand Manipulation with Various Object Properties Using Graph Convolutional Networks and Distributed Tactile Sensors
title_zh: 使用图卷积网络和分布式触觉传感器对各种对象属性进行多指手动操作
abstract: Multi-fingered hands could be used to achieve many dexterous manipulation tasks, similarly to humans, and tactile sensing could enhance the manipulation stability for a variety of objects. However, tactile sensors on multi-fingered hands have a variety of sizes and shapes. Convolutional neural networks (CNN) can be useful for processing tactile information, but the information from multi-fingered hands needs an arbitrary pre-processing, as CNNs require a rectangularly shaped input, which may lead to unstable results. Therefore, how to process such complex shaped tactile information and utilize it for achieving manipulation skills is still an open issue. This paper presents a control method based on a graph convolutional network (GCN) which extracts geodesical features from the tactile data with complicated sensor alignments. Moreover, object property labels are provided to the GCN to adjust in-hand manipulation motions. Distributed tri-axial tactile sensors are mounted on the fingertips, finger phalanges and palm of an Allegro hand, resulting in 1152 tactile measurements. Training data is collected with a data-glove to transfer human dexterous manipulation directly to the robot hand. The GCN achieved high success rates for in-hand manipulation. We also confirmed that fragile objects were deformed less when correct object labels were provided to the GCN. When visualizing the activation of the GCN with a PCA, we verified that the network acquired geodesical features. Our method achieved stable manipulation even when an experimenter pulled a grasped object and for untrained objects.
summary: Multi-fingered hands could be used to achieve many dexterous manipulation tasks, similarly to humans, and tactile sensing could enhance the manipulation stability for a variety of objects. However, tactile sensors on multi-fingered hands have a variety of sizes and shapes. This paper presents a control method based on a graph convolutional network (GCN) which extracts geodesical features from the tactile data with complicated sensor alignments. Moreover, object property labels are provided to the GCN to adjust in-hand manipulation motions. Distributed tri-axial tactile sensors are mounted on the fingertips, finger phalanges and palm of an Allegro hand, resulting in 1152 tactile measurements. Training data is collected with a data-glove to transfer human dexterous manipulation directly to the robot hand. The GCN achieved high success rates for in-hand manipulation. We also confirmed that fragile objects were deformed less when correct object labels were provided to the GCN. When visualizing the activation of the GCN with a PCA, we verified that the network acquired geodesical features. Our method achieved stable manipulation even when an experimenter pulled a grasped object and for untrained objects.
abstract_zh: 与人类类似，多指手可以用来实现许多灵巧的操作任务，而触觉传感可以增强对各种物体的操作稳定性。然而，多指手上的触觉传感器具有多种尺寸和形状。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 可用于处理触觉信息，但来自多指手的信息需要任意预处理，因为 CNN 需要矩形输入，这可能会导致结果不稳定。因此，如何处理这种复杂形状的触觉信息并利用它来实现操纵技能仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。本文提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的控制方法，该方法从具有复杂传感器对准的触觉数据中提取测地线特征。此外，还向 GCN 提供对象属性标签来调整手动操作动作。分布式三轴触觉传感器安装在 Allegro 手的指尖、指骨和手掌上，可进行 1152 次触觉测量。使用数据手套收集训练数据，将人类灵巧的操作直接转移到机器人手上。 GCN 在手动操作方面取得了很高的成功率。我们还确认，当向 GCN 提供正确的物体标签时，易碎物体的变形会更小。当使用 PCA 可视化 GCN 的激活时，我们验证了网络获得了测地线特征。即使实验者拉动抓握的物体以及未经训练的物体，我们的方法也能实现稳定的操纵。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）和分布式触觉传感器的多指手内在操作控制方法，用于处理复杂形状的触觉数据并适应不同物体属性。
AI.motivation: 多指手的触觉传感器形状复杂，传统卷积神经网络（CNN）因需矩形输入难以处理此类数据，且需适应不同物体属性以提高操作稳定性。
AI.method: 采用图卷积网络（GCN）提取触觉数据的测地特征，并结合物体属性标签调整操作动作；在Allegro手上安装分布式三轴触觉传感器，利用数据手套采集训练数据。
AI.result: GCN在内在操作任务中取得高成功率，正确物体标签下易碎物体变形更少；通过PCA验证网络获取了测地特征，且在外部拉力和未训练物体上仍保持稳定操作。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效处理复杂触觉数据并适应物体属性，为多指机械手实现稳定、灵活的内在操作提供了新思路。

search_text: Multi-Fingered In-Hand Manipulation with Various Object Properties Using Graph Convolutional Networks and Distributed Tactile Sensors 使用图卷积网络和分布式触觉传感器对各种对象属性进行多指手动操作 Multi-fingered hands could be used to achieve many dexterous manipulation tasks, similarly to humans, and tactile sensing could enhance the manipulation stability for a variety of objects. However, tactile sensors on multi-fingered hands have a variety of sizes and shapes. Convolutional neural networks (CNN) can be useful for processing tactile information, but the information from multi-fingered hands needs an arbitrary pre-processing, as CNNs require a rectangularly shaped input, which may lead to unstable results. Therefore, how to process such complex shaped tactile information and utilize it for achieving manipulation skills is still an open issue. This paper presents a control method based on a graph convolutional network (GCN) which extracts geodesical features from the tactile data with complicated sensor alignments. Moreover, object property labels are provided to the GCN to adjust in-hand manipulation motions. Distributed tri-axial tactile sensors are mounted on the fingertips, finger phalanges and palm of an Allegro hand, resulting in 1152 tactile measurements. Training data is collected with a data-glove to transfer human dexterous manipulation directly to the robot hand. The GCN achieved high success rates for in-hand manipulation. We also confirmed that fragile objects were deformed less when correct object labels were provided to the GCN. When visualizing the activation of the GCN with a PCA, we verified that the network acquired geodesical features. Our method achieved stable manipulation even when an experimenter pulled a grasped object and for untrained objects. 与人类类似，多指手可以用来实现许多灵巧的操作任务，而触觉传感可以增强对各种物体的操作稳定性。然而，多指手上的触觉传感器具有多种尺寸和形状。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 可用于处理触觉信息，但来自多指手的信息需要任意预处理，因为 CNN 需要矩形输入，这可能会导致结果不稳定。因此，如何处理这种复杂形状的触觉信息并利用它来实现操纵技能仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。本文提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的控制方法，该方法从具有复杂传感器对准的触觉数据中提取测地线特征。此外，还向 GCN 提供对象属性标签来调整手动操作动作。分布式三轴触觉传感器安装在 Allegro 手的指尖、指骨和手掌上，可进行 1152 次触觉测量。使用数据手套收集训练数据，将人类灵巧的操作直接转移到机器人手上。 GCN 在手动操作方面取得了很高的成功率。我们还确认，当向 GCN 提供正确的物体标签时，易碎物体的变形会更小。当使用 PCA 可视化 GCN 的激活时，我们验证了网络获得了测地线特征。即使实验者拉动抓握的物体以及未经训练的物体，我们的方法也能实现稳定的操纵。 本文提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）和分布式触觉传感器的多指手内在操作控制方法，用于处理复杂形状的触觉数据并适应不同物体属性。 Satoshi Funabashi,Tomoki Isobe,Fei Hongyi,Atsumu Hiramoto,Alexander Schmitz,Shigeki Sugano,Tetsuya Ogata cs.RO

authors_text: Iason Katsamenis,Matthaios Bimpas,Eftychios Protopapadakis,Charalampos Zafeiropoulos,Dimitris Kalogeras,Anastasios Doulamis,Nikolaos Doulamis,Carlos Martín-Portugués Montoliu,Yannis Handanos,Franziska Schmidt,Lionel Ott,Miquel Cantero,Rafael Lopez
title: Robotic Maintenance of Road Infrastructures: The HERON Project
title_zh: 道路基础设施的机器人维护：HERON 项目
abstract: Of all public assets, road infrastructure tops the list. Roads are crucial for economic development and growth, providing access to education, health, and employment. The maintenance, repair, and upgrade of roads are therefore vital to road users' health and safety as well as to a well-functioning and prosperous modern economy. The EU-funded HERON project will develop an integrated automated system to adequately maintain road infrastructure. In turn, this will reduce accidents, lower maintenance costs, and increase road network capacity and efficiency. To coordinate maintenance works, the project will design an autonomous ground robotic vehicle that will be supported by autonomous drones. Sensors and scanners for 3D mapping will be used in addition to artificial intelligence toolkits to help coordinate road maintenance and upgrade workflows.
summary: Of all public assets, road infrastructure tops the list. Roads are crucial for economic development and growth, providing access to education, health, and employment. The maintenance, repair, and upgrade of roads are therefore vital to road users' health and safety as well as to a well-functioning and prosperous modern economy. The EU-funded HERON project will develop an integrated automated system to adequately maintain road infrastructure. In turn, this will reduce accidents, lower maintenance costs, and increase road network capacity and efficiency. To coordinate maintenance works, the project will design an autonomous ground robotic vehicle that will be supported by autonomous drones. Sensors and scanners for 3D mapping will be used in addition to artificial intelligence toolkits to help coordinate road maintenance and upgrade workflows.
abstract_zh: 在所有公共资产中，道路基础设施位居榜首。道路对于经济发展和增长至关重要，提供教育、医疗和就业机会。因此，道路的维护、修理和升级对于道路使用者的健康和安全以及良好运转和繁荣的现代经济至关重要。欧盟资助的 HERON 项目将开发一个集成自动化系统，以充分维护道路基础设施。反过来，这将减少事故，降低维护成本，并提高路网容量和效率。为了协调维护工作，该项目将设计一种由自主无人机支持的自主地面机器人车辆。除了人工智能工具包之外，还将使用用于 3D 测绘的传感器和扫描仪来帮助协调道路维护和升级工作流程。

AI.tldr: HERON项目旨在开发集成自动化系统，通过自主机器人和无人机技术实现道路基础设施的高效维护。
AI.motivation: 道路基础设施对经济和社会发展至关重要，传统维护方式存在成本高、效率低及安全隐患等问题，亟需智能化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计自主地面机器人与无人机协同系统，结合3D测绘传感器、扫描仪及人工智能工具，实现道路维护工作的自动化协调与优化。
AI.result: 降低道路维护成本，减少交通事故，提升道路网络容量与运行效率，推动基础设施智能化升级。
AI.conclusion: HERON项目通过创新技术整合，为未来道路基础设施维护提供了高效、安全的自动化解决方案，具有显著的经济和社会价值。

authors_text: Yinjie Zhang,Yi Liu,Wei Guo
title: Improved-Flow Warp Module for Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于遥感语义分割的改进流扭曲模块
abstract: Remote sensing semantic segmentation aims to assign automatically each pixel on aerial images with specific label. In this letter, we proposed a new module, called improved-flow warp module (IFWM), to adjust semantic feature maps across different scales for remote sensing semantic segmentation. The improved-flow warp module is applied along with the feature extraction process in the convolutional neural network. First, IFWM computes the offsets of pixels by a learnable way, which can alleviate the misalignment of the multi-scale features. Second, the offsets help with the low-resolution deep feature up-sampling process to improve the feature accordance, which boosts the accuracy of semantic segmentation. We validate our method on several remote sensing datasets, and the results prove the effectiveness of our method..
summary: Remote sensing semantic segmentation aims to assign automatically each pixel on aerial images with specific label. In this letter, we proposed a new module, called improved-flow warp module (IFWM), to adjust semantic feature maps across different scales for remote sensing semantic segmentation. The improved-flow warp module is applied along with the feature extraction process in the convolutional neural network. First, IFWM computes the offsets of pixels by a learnable way, which can alleviate the misalignment of the multi-scale features. Second, the offsets help with the low-resolution deep feature up-sampling process to improve the feature accordance, which boosts the accuracy of semantic segmentation. We validate our method on several remote sensing datasets, and the results prove the effectiveness of our method..
abstract_zh: 遥感语义分割旨在自动为航空图像上的每个像素分配特定标签。在这封信中，我们提出了一个新模块，称为改进流扭曲模块（IFWM），用于调整不同尺度的语义特征图以进行遥感语义分割。改进的流扭曲模块与卷积神经网络中的特征提取过程一起应用。首先，IFWM通过可学习的方式计算像素的偏移，这可以减轻多尺度特征的错位。其次，偏移量有助于低分辨率深度特征上采样过程，以提高特征一致性，从而提高语义分割的准确性。我们在几个遥感数据集上验证了我们的方法，结果证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的流形变换模块（IFWM），用于解决遥感语义分割中多尺度特征对齐问题，提升像素级分类精度。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像多尺度特征在语义分割中易出现像素级对齐偏差，导致低分辨率特征上采样时信息丢失，影响分割精度。
AI.method: 设计可学习的像素偏移计算机制，在卷积神经网络特征提取过程中动态调整多尺度特征图，通过偏移量引导低分辨率特征的上采样过程。
AI.result: 在多个遥感数据集实验验证中，IFWM模块有效提升了语义分割的mIoU指标，证明了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: IFWM模块通过动态特征对齐机制显著改善了遥感图像语义分割性能，为多尺度特征融合提供了新思路。

search_text: Improved-Flow Warp Module for Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation 用于遥感语义分割的改进流扭曲模块 Remote sensing semantic segmentation aims to assign automatically each pixel on aerial images with specific label. In this letter, we proposed a new module, called improved-flow warp module (IFWM), to adjust semantic feature maps across different scales for remote sensing semantic segmentation. The improved-flow warp module is applied along with the feature extraction process in the convolutional neural network. First, IFWM computes the offsets of pixels by a learnable way, which can alleviate the misalignment of the multi-scale features. Second, the offsets help with the low-resolution deep feature up-sampling process to improve the feature accordance, which boosts the accuracy of semantic segmentation. We validate our method on several remote sensing datasets, and the results prove the effectiveness of our method.. 遥感语义分割旨在自动为航空图像上的每个像素分配特定标签。在这封信中，我们提出了一个新模块，称为改进流扭曲模块（IFWM），用于调整不同尺度的语义特征图以进行遥感语义分割。改进的流扭曲模块与卷积神经网络中的特征提取过程一起应用。首先，IFWM通过可学习的方式计算像素的偏移，这可以减轻多尺度特征的错位。其次，偏移量有助于低分辨率深度特征上采样过程，以提高特征一致性，从而提高语义分割的准确性。我们在几个遥感数据集上验证了我们的方法，结果证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出改进的流形变换模块（IFWM），用于解决遥感语义分割中多尺度特征对齐问题，提升像素级分类精度。 Yinjie Zhang,Yi Liu,Wei Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Nakyeong Yang,Yunah Jang,Hwanhee Lee,Seohyeong Jung,Kyomin Jung
title: Task-specific Compression for Multi-task Language Models using Attribution-based Pruning
title_zh: 使用基于归因的修剪对多任务语言模型进行特定于任务的压缩
abstract: Multi-task language models show outstanding performance for various natural language understanding tasks with only a single model. However, these language models utilize an unnecessarily large number of model parameters, even when used only for a specific task. This paper proposes a novel training-free compression method for multi-task language models using a pruning method. Specifically, we use an attribution method to determine which neurons are essential for performing a specific task. We task-specifically prune unimportant neurons and leave only task-specific parameters. Furthermore, we extend our method to be applicable in low-resource and unsupervised settings. Since our compression method is training-free, it uses few computing resources and does not destroy the pre-trained knowledge of language models. Experimental results on the six widely-used datasets show that our proposed pruning method significantly outperforms baseline pruning methods. In addition, we demonstrate that our method preserves performance even in an unseen domain setting.
summary: Multi-task language models show outstanding performance for various natural language understanding tasks with only a single model. However, these language models utilize an unnecessarily large number of model parameters, even when used only for a specific task. This paper proposes a novel training-free compression method for multi-task language models using a pruning method. Specifically, we use an attribution method to determine which neurons are essential for performing a specific task. We task-specifically prune unimportant neurons and leave only task-specific parameters. Furthermore, we extend our method to be applicable in low-resource and unsupervised settings. Since our compression method is training-free, it uses few computing resources and does not destroy the pre-trained knowledge of language models. Experimental results on the six widely-used datasets show that our proposed pruning method significantly outperforms baseline pruning methods. In addition, we demonstrate that our method preserves performance even in an unseen domain setting.
abstract_zh: 多任务语言模型仅使用单个模型即可在各种自然语言理解任务中表现出出色的性能。然而，这些语言模型使用了不必要的大量模型参数，即使仅用于特定任务也是如此。本文提出了一种使用剪枝方法的多任务语言模型的新型免训练压缩方法。具体来说，我们使用归因方法来确定哪些神经元对于执行特定任务至关重要。我们针对特定任务修剪不重要的神经元，只留下特定任务的参数。此外，我们扩展了我们的方法，使其适用于资源匮乏和无人监督的环境。由于我们的压缩方法是免训练的，因此它使用的计算资源很少，并且不会破坏语言模型的预先训练的知识。在六个广泛使用的数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的剪枝方法显着优于基线剪枝方法。此外，我们还证明了我们的方法即使在不可见的域设置中也能保持性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的多任务语言模型压缩方法，通过归因剪枝技术实现特定任务的参数优化。
AI.motivation: 多任务语言模型参数冗余度高，即使单任务使用也浪费资源，需开发无需训练且保留预训练知识的压缩方案。
AI.method: 基于归因方法识别关键神经元，执行任务特定剪枝并保留必要参数，扩展至低资源和无监督场景。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上显著优于基线方法，且在未见过的领域保持性能稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效压缩模型规模而不损失性能，适用于不同资源环境，具有实际应用价值。
