authors_text: Gül Varol,Liliane Momeni,Samuel Albanie,Triantafyllos Afouras,Andrew Zisserman
title: Scaling up sign spotting through sign language dictionaries
title_zh: 通过手语词典扩大标志识别范围
comment: Appears in: 2022 International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). 25 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2010.04002
comments: Appears in: 2022 International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). 25 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2010.04002
abstract: The focus of this work is $\textit{sign spotting}$ - given a video of an isolated sign, our task is to identify $\textit{whether}$ and $\textit{where}$ it has been signed in a continuous, co-articulated sign language video. To achieve this sign spotting task, we train a model using multiple types of available supervision by: (1) $\textit{watching}$ existing footage which is sparsely labelled using mouthing cues; (2) $\textit{reading}$ associated subtitles (readily available translations of the signed content) which provide additional $\textit{weak-supervision}$; (3) $\textit{looking up}$ words (for which no co-articulated labelled examples are available) in visual sign language dictionaries to enable novel sign spotting. These three tasks are integrated into a unified learning framework using the principles of Noise Contrastive Estimation and Multiple Instance Learning. We validate the effectiveness of our approach on low-shot sign spotting benchmarks. In addition, we contribute a machine-readable British Sign Language (BSL) dictionary dataset of isolated signs, BSLDict, to facilitate study of this task. The dataset, models and code are available at our project page.
summary: The focus of this work is $\textit{sign spotting}$ - given a video of an isolated sign, our task is to identify $\textit{whether}$ and $\textit{where}$ it has been signed in a continuous, co-articulated sign language video. To achieve this sign spotting task, we train a model using multiple types of available supervision by: (1) $\textit{watching}$ existing footage which is sparsely labelled using mouthing cues; (2) $\textit{reading}$ associated subtitles (readily available translations of the signed content) which provide additional $\textit{weak-supervision}$; (3) $\textit{looking up}$ words (for which no co-articulated labelled examples are available) in visual sign language dictionaries to enable novel sign spotting. These three tasks are integrated into a unified learning framework using the principles of Noise Contrastive Estimation and Multiple Instance Learning. We validate the effectiveness of our approach on low-shot sign spotting benchmarks. In addition, we contribute a machine-readable British Sign Language (BSL) dictionary dataset of isolated signs, BSLDict, to facilitate study of this task. The dataset, models and code are available at our project page.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的重点是 $\textit{符号识别}$ - 给定一个孤立符号的视频，我们的任务是识别 $\textit{是否}$ 以及 $\textit{哪里}$ 它已在连续的、共同表达的手语视频中签名。为了实现这个标志识别任务，我们通过以下方式使用多种类型的可用监督来训练模型：（1）$\textit{watching}$使用嘴型线索稀疏标记的现有镜头； (2) $\textit{阅读}$相关字幕（签名内容的现成翻译）提供额外的$\textit{弱监督}$； (3) 在视觉手语词典中$\textit{查找}$个单词（没有可用的共同表达的标记示例），以实现新颖的符号识别。使用噪声对比估计和多实例学习的原理将这三个任务集成到统一的学习框架中。我们验证了我们的方法在低样本标志识别基准上的有效性。此外，我们还贡献了一个机器可读的英国手语（BSL）孤立符号词典数据集 BSLDict，以促进这项任务的研究。数据集、模型和代码可在我们的项目页面获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过手语词典扩展手语识别的方法，解决连续手语视频中孤立手势定位问题。
AI.motivation: 手语识别面临标注数据稀缺、连续手势难以分割的挑战，传统方法依赖大量人工标注难以扩展。
AI.method: 融合稀疏口型标注、字幕弱监督和手语词典三类监督信号，结合噪声对比估计与多实例学习框架进行联合训练。
AI.result: 在少样本基准测试中验证方法有效性，并发布包含2000个孤立手势的BSLDict数据集。
AI.conclusion: 通过多源监督与知识迁移显著提升少样本手语识别性能，为手语理解研究提供新数据基础。

authors_text: M. Cuciniello,T. Amorese,G. Cordasco,S. Marrone,F. Marulli,F. Cavallo,O. Gordeeva,Z. Callejas Carrión,A. Esposito
title: Identifying synthetic voices qualities for conversational agents
title_zh: 识别对话代理的合成语音质量
abstract: The present study aims to explore user acceptance and perceptions toward different quality levels of synthetical voices. To achieve this, four voices have been exploited considering two main factors: the quality of the voices (low vs high) and their gender (male and female). 186 volunteers were recruited and subsequently allocated into four groups of different ages respec-tively, adolescents, young adults, middle-aged and seniors. After having randomly listened to each voice, participants were asked to fill the Virtual Agent Voice Acceptance Questionnaire (VAVAQ). Outcomes show that the two higher quality voices of Antonio and Giulia were more appreciated than the low-quality voices of Edoardo and Clara by the whole sample in terms of pragmatic, hedonic and attractiveness qualities attributed to the voices. Concerning preferences towards differently aged voices, it clearly appeared that they varied according to participants age' ranges examined. Furthermore, in terms of suitability to perform different tasks, participants considered Antonio and Giulia equally adapt for healthcare and front office jobs. Antonio was also judged to be significantly more qualified to accomplish protection and security tasks, while Edoardo was classified as the absolute least skilled in conducting household chores.
summary: The present study aims to explore user acceptance and perceptions toward different quality levels of synthetical voices. To achieve this, four voices have been exploited considering two main factors: the quality of the voices (low vs high) and their gender (male and female). 186 volunteers were recruited and subsequently allocated into four groups of different ages respec-tively, adolescents, young adults, middle-aged and seniors. Outcomes show that the two higher quality voices of Antonio and Giulia were more appreciated than the low-quality voices of Edoardo and Clara by the whole sample in terms of pragmatic, hedonic and attractiveness qualities attributed to the voices. Concerning preferences towards differently aged voices, it clearly appeared that they varied according to participants age' ranges examined. Furthermore, in terms of suitability to perform different tasks, participants considered Antonio and Giulia equally adapt for healthcare and front office jobs. Antonio was also judged to be significantly more qualified to accomplish protection and security tasks, while Edoardo was classified as the absolute least skilled in conducting household chores.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在探讨用户对不同质量水平的合成语音的接受度和看法。为了实现这一目标，考虑到两个主要因素，利用了四种声音：声音的质量（低与高）及其性别（男性和女性）。招募了186名志愿者，随后将其分为四个不同年龄组，分别为青少年、青年、中年和老年。在随机听取每个声音后，参与者被要求填写虚拟代理语音接受调查问卷（VAVAQ）。结果表明，就声音的实用性、享乐性和吸引力而言，整个样本对 Antonio 和 Giulia 两个较高质量的声音比 Edoardo 和 Clara 的低质量声音更欣赏。关于对不同年龄声音的偏好，很明显，它们根据所检查的参与者的年龄范围而变化。此外，就执行不同任务的适合性而言，参与者认为安东尼奥和朱利亚同样适合医疗保健和前台工作。安东尼奥还被认为更有资格完成保护和安全任务，而爱德华多被认为是最不擅长做家务的人。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨用户对不同质量合成语音的接受度和感知差异，分析年龄和性别因素对语音评价的影响。
AI.motivation: 合成语音在对话代理中的应用日益广泛，但用户对其质量与适用性的接受度尚不明确，需通过实证研究指导技术优化与场景适配。
AI.method: 选取四组合成语音（高低质量+男女声），招募186名志愿者按年龄分组，通过随机听取语音并填写VAVAQ问卷收集数据，分析语音质量、性别及年龄对评价的影响。
AI.result: 高质量语音（Antonio和Giulia）在实用性、愉悦感和吸引力上显著优于低质量语音。年龄分组偏好存在差异，Antonio在安保任务中表现最佳，Edoardo在家务任务中评价最低。
AI.conclusion: 语音质量直接影响用户接受度，但年龄因素显著影响偏好分布，任务适配性需结合语音特性与用户群体特征综合考量。

search_text: Identifying synthetic voices qualities for conversational agents 识别对话代理的合成语音质量 The present study aims to explore user acceptance and perceptions toward different quality levels of synthetical voices. To achieve this, four voices have been exploited considering two main factors: the quality of the voices (low vs high) and their gender (male and female). 186 volunteers were recruited and subsequently allocated into four groups of different ages respec-tively, adolescents, young adults, middle-aged and seniors. After having randomly listened to each voice, participants were asked to fill the Virtual Agent Voice Acceptance Questionnaire (VAVAQ). Outcomes show that the two higher quality voices of Antonio and Giulia were more appreciated than the low-quality voices of Edoardo and Clara by the whole sample in terms of pragmatic, hedonic and attractiveness qualities attributed to the voices. Concerning preferences towards differently aged voices, it clearly appeared that they varied according to participants age' ranges examined. Furthermore, in terms of suitability to perform different tasks, participants considered Antonio and Giulia equally adapt for healthcare and front office jobs. Antonio was also judged to be significantly more qualified to accomplish protection and security tasks, while Edoardo was classified as the absolute least skilled in conducting household chores. 本研究旨在探讨用户对不同质量水平的合成语音的接受度和看法。为了实现这一目标，考虑到两个主要因素，利用了四种声音：声音的质量（低与高）及其性别（男性和女性）。招募了186名志愿者，随后将其分为四个不同年龄组，分别为青少年、青年、中年和老年。在随机听取每个声音后，参与者被要求填写虚拟代理语音接受调查问卷（VAVAQ）。结果表明，就声音的实用性、享乐性和吸引力而言，整个样本对 Antonio 和 Giulia 两个较高质量的声音比 Edoardo 和 Clara 的低质量声音更欣赏。关于对不同年龄声音的偏好，很明显，它们根据所检查的参与者的年龄范围而变化。此外，就执行不同任务的适合性而言，参与者认为安东尼奥和朱利亚同样适合医疗保健和前台工作。安东尼奥还被认为更有资格完成保护和安全任务，而爱德华多被认为是最不擅长做家务的人。 本研究探讨用户对不同质量合成语音的接受度和感知差异，分析年龄和性别因素对语音评价的影响。 M. Cuciniello,T. Amorese,G. Cordasco,S. Marrone,F. Marulli,F. Cavallo,O. Gordeeva,Z. Callejas Carrión,A. Esposito cs.HC

authors_text: Thanh Tung Khuat,David Jacob Kedziora,Bogdan Gabrys
title: The Roles and Modes of Human Interactions with Automated Machine Learning Systems
title_zh: 人类与自动化机器学习系统交互的角色和模式
comment: Submitted to Foundations and Trends in Human-Computer Interaction
comments: Submitted to Foundations and Trends in Human-Computer Interaction
abstract: As automated machine learning (AutoML) systems continue to progress in both sophistication and performance, it becomes important to understand the `how' and `why' of human-computer interaction (HCI) within these frameworks, both current and expected. Such a discussion is necessary for optimal system design, leveraging advanced data-processing capabilities to support decision-making involving humans, but it is also key to identifying the opportunities and risks presented by ever-increasing levels of machine autonomy. Within this context, we focus on the following questions: (i) How does HCI currently look like for state-of-the-art AutoML algorithms, especially during the stages of development, deployment, and maintenance? (ii) Do the expectations of HCI within AutoML frameworks vary for different types of users and stakeholders? (iii) How can HCI be managed so that AutoML solutions acquire human trust and broad acceptance? (iv) As AutoML systems become more autonomous and capable of learning from complex open-ended environments, will the fundamental nature of HCI evolve? To consider these questions, we project existing literature in HCI into the space of AutoML; this connection has, to date, largely been unexplored. In so doing, we review topics including user-interface design, human-bias mitigation, and trust in artificial intelligence (AI). Additionally, to rigorously gauge the future of HCI, we contemplate how AutoML may manifest in effectively open-ended environments. This discussion necessarily reviews projected developmental pathways for AutoML, such as the incorporation of reasoning, although the focus remains on how and why HCI may occur in such a framework rather than on any implementational details. Ultimately, this review serves to identify key research directions aimed at better facilitating the roles and modes of human interactions with both current and future AutoML systems.

(iii) How can HCI be managed so that AutoML solutions acquire human trust and broad acceptance? (iv) As AutoML systems become more autonomous and capable of learning from complex open-ended environments, will the fundamental nature of HCI evolve? To consider these questions, we project existing literature in HCI into the space of AutoML; this connection has, to date, largely been unexplored. In so doing, we review topics including user-interface design, human-bias mitigation, and trust in artificial intelligence (AI). Additionally, to rigorously gauge the future of HCI, we contemplate how AutoML may manifest in effectively open-ended environments. This discussion necessarily reviews projected developmental pathways for AutoML, such as the incorporation of reasoning, although the focus remains on how and why HCI may occur in such a framework rather than on any implementational details. Ultimately, this review serves to identify key research directions aimed at better facilitating the roles and modes of human interactions with both current and future AutoML systems.
abstract_zh: 随着自动化机器学习 (AutoML) 系统在复杂性和性能方面不断进步，了解这些框架内人机交互 (HCI) 的“方式”和“原因”变得非常重要，无论是当前的还是预期的。这样的讨论对于优化系统设计、利用先进的数据处理能力来支持涉及人类的决策是必要的，但它也是识别不断提高的机器自主水平所带来的机会和风险的关键。在此背景下，我们重点关注以下问题：（i）目前最先进的 AutoML 算法的 HCI 是什么样子的，特别是在开发、部署和维护阶段？ (ii) AutoML 框架内的 HCI 期望是否因不同类型的用户和利益相关者而异？ (iii) 如何管理 HCI 以使 AutoML 解决方案获得人类的信任和广泛接受？ (iv) 随着 AutoML 系统变得更加自主并能够从复杂的开放式环境中学习，HCI 的基本性质会演变吗？为了考虑这些问题，我们将 HCI 领域的现有文献投射到 AutoML 领域；迄今为止，这种联系基本上尚未被探索过。在此过程中，我们回顾了包括用户界面设计、人为偏见缓解和人工智能 (AI) 信任等主题。此外，为了严格衡量 HCI 的未来，我们思考 AutoML 如何在有效的开放环境中体现。本次讨论有必要回顾 AutoML 的预计发展路径，例如推理的结合，尽管重点仍然是人机交互如何以及为何会在这样的框架中发生，而不是任何实现细节。最终，本次综述旨在确定关键研究方向，旨在更好地促进人类与当前和未来 AutoML 系统交互的角色和模式。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人类与自动化机器学习（AutoML）系统在开发、部署和维护阶段的交互方式，分析了不同用户群体的需求，并预测了随着AutoML自主性提升，人机交互模式的潜在演变。
AI.motivation: 随着AutoML系统复杂性的增加，理解人机交互（HCI）对于优化系统设计、确保人类信任及识别技术风险至关重要，但当前相关研究仍显不足。
AI.method: 通过回顾人机交互领域现有文献，将其映射到AutoML场景，分析用户界面设计、人类偏见缓解及AI信任等主题，并探讨AutoML在开放环境中的未来发展方向。
AI.result: 明确了当前AutoML系统中人机交互的关键挑战，提出了针对不同用户需求的交互设计方向，并指出了未来需重点研究的领域，如自主性增强下的交互模式演变。
AI.conclusion: 人机交互研究需与AutoML技术发展同步推进，以确保系统可信赖性与实用性，同时需关注自主性提升带来的交互范式变革。

authors_text: Michał Karpiński,Marek Piotrów
title: Reusing Comparator Networks in Pseudo-Boolean Encodings
title_zh: 在伪布尔编码中重用比较器网络
abstract: A Pseudo-Boolean (PB) constraint is a linear inequality constraint over Boolean literals. One of the popular, efficient ideas used to solve PB-problems (a set of PB-constraints) is to translate them to SAT instances (encodings) via, for example, sorting networks, then to process those instances using state-of-the-art SAT-solvers. In this paper we show an improvement of such technique. By using a variation of a greedy set cover algorithm, when adding constraints to our encoding, we reuse parts of the already encoded PB-instance in order to decrease the size (the number of variables and clauses) of the resulting SAT instance. The experimental evaluation shows that the proposed method increases the number of solved instances.
summary: A Pseudo-Boolean (PB) constraint is a linear inequality constraint over Boolean literals. One of the popular, efficient ideas used to solve PB-problems (a set of PB-constraints) is to translate them to SAT instances (encodings) via, for example, sorting networks, then to process those instances using state-of-the-art SAT-solvers. In this paper we show an improvement of such technique. By using a variation of a greedy set cover algorithm, when adding constraints to our encoding, we reuse parts of the already encoded PB-instance in order to decrease the size (the number of variables and clauses) of the resulting SAT instance. The experimental evaluation shows that the proposed method increases the number of solved instances.
abstract_zh: 伪布尔 (PB) 约束是布尔文字上的线性不等式约束。用于解决 PB 问题（一组 PB 约束）的流行、有效的想法之一是通过排序网络等将它们转换为 SAT 实例（编码），然后使用最先进的 SAT 求解器处理这些实例。在本文中，我们展示了这种技术的改进。通过使用贪婪集覆盖算法的变体，在向编码添加约束时，我们重用已编码的 PB 实例的部分内容，以减少生成的 SAT 实例的大小（变量和子句的数量）。实验评估表明，所提出的方法增加了解决实例的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的伪布尔约束到SAT问题的编码方法，通过重用已编码的部分来减少SAT实例的规模。
AI.motivation: 伪布尔约束问题通常需要转换为SAT问题进行求解，但传统的转换方法可能导致SAT实例规模过大，影响求解效率。
AI.method: 本文采用一种改进的贪心集覆盖算法，在添加约束时重用已编码的伪布尔实例部分，以减少SAT实例的变量和子句数量。
AI.result: 实验评估表明，该方法提高了所解决的实例数量，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过重用已编码部分，该方法在减少SAT实例规模和提高求解效率方面取得了显著成效。

authors_text: Yueying Kao,Bowen Pan,Miao Xu,Jiangjing Lyu,Xiangyu Zhu,Yuanzhang Chang,Xiaobo Li,Zhen Lei
title: Towards 3D Face Reconstruction in Perspective Projection: Estimating 6DoF Face Pose from Monocular Image
title_zh: 透视投影中的 3D 人脸重建：从单目图像估计 6DoF 人脸姿势
abstract: In 3D face reconstruction, orthogonal projection has been widely employed to substitute perspective projection to simplify the fitting process. This approximation performs well when the distance between camera and face is far enough. However, in some scenarios that the face is very close to camera or moving along the camera axis, the methods suffer from the inaccurate reconstruction and unstable temporal fitting due to the distortion under the perspective projection. In this paper, we aim to address the problem of single-image 3D face reconstruction under perspective projection. Specifically, a deep neural network, Perspective Network (PerspNet), is proposed to simultaneously reconstruct 3D face shape in canonical space and learn the correspondence between 2D pixels and 3D points, by which the 6DoF (6 Degrees of Freedom) face pose can be estimated to represent perspective projection. Besides, we contribute a large ARKitFace dataset to enable the training and evaluation of 3D face reconstruction solutions under the scenarios of perspective projection, which has 902,724 2D facial images with ground-truth 3D face mesh and annotated 6DoF pose parameters. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms current state-of-the-art methods by a significant margin. The code and data are available at https://github.com/cbsropenproject/6dof_face.
summary: In 3D face reconstruction, orthogonal projection has been widely employed to substitute perspective projection to simplify the fitting process. This approximation performs well when the distance between camera and face is far enough. However, in some scenarios that the face is very close to camera or moving along the camera axis, the methods suffer from the inaccurate reconstruction and unstable temporal fitting due to the distortion under the perspective projection. In this paper, we aim to address the problem of single-image 3D face reconstruction under perspective projection. Specifically, a deep neural network, Perspective Network (PerspNet), is proposed to simultaneously reconstruct 3D face shape in canonical space and learn the correspondence between 2D pixels and 3D points, by which the 6DoF (6 Degrees of Freedom) face pose can be estimated to represent perspective projection. Besides, we contribute a large ARKitFace dataset to enable the training and evaluation of 3D face reconstruction solutions under the scenarios of perspective projection, which has 902,724 2D facial images with ground-truth 3D face mesh and annotated 6DoF pose parameters. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms current state-of-the-art methods by a significant margin. The code and data are available at https://github.com/cbsropenproject/6dof_face.
abstract_zh: 在3D人脸重建中，正交投影已被广泛用于替代透视投影以简化拟合过程。当相机和脸部之间的距离足够远时，这种近似效果很好。然而，在一些人脸距离相机非常近或沿相机轴移动的场景中，由于透视投影下的畸变，这些方法会出现重建不准确和时间拟合不稳定的问题。在本文中，我们旨在解决透视投影下的单图像 3D 人脸重建问题。具体来说，提出了一种深度神经网络——透视网络（PerspNet），可以同时在规范空间中重建3D人脸形状，并学习2D像素和3D点之间的对应关系，从而可以估计6DoF（6自由度）人脸姿势来表示透视投影。此外，我们还贡献了一个大型 ARKitFace 数据集，可以在透视投影场景下训练和评估 3D 人脸重建解决方案，该数据集包含 902,724 张 2D 人脸图像，带有真实的 3D 人脸网格和带注释的 6DoF 姿态参数。实验结果表明，我们的方法明显优于当前最先进的方法。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/cbsropenproject/6dof_face 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单目图像的透视投影3D人脸重建方法，通过估计6自由度（6DoF）人脸姿态解决传统正交投影下的重建误差问题。
AI.motivation: 传统正交投影在人脸距离相机较近或沿光轴移动时会导致重建不准确和时序不稳定，需通过透视投影建模提升精度。
AI.method: 设计PerspNet深度网络同时重建规范空间3D人脸形状并学习2D像素与3D点的对应关系，结合自建的包含90万张标注图像的ARKitFace数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在透视投影场景下显著优于现有最先进算法，代码和数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入6DoF姿态估计和专用数据集，本文为透视投影下的3D人脸重建提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Panagiotis Chatziantoniou,Antonis Tsigkanos,Dimitris Theodoropoulos,Nektarios Kranitis,Antonis Paschalis
title: An Efficient Architecture and High-Throughput Implementation of CCSDS-123.0-B-2 Hybrid Entropy Coder Targeting Space-Grade SRAM FPGA Technology
title_zh: 针对航天级 SRAM FPGA 技术的 CCSDS-123.0-B-2 混合熵编码器的高效架构和高吞吐量实现
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, to be published in IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems (TAES)
comments: 12 pages, 7 figures, to be published in IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems (TAES)
abstract: Nowadays, hyperspectral imaging is recognized as cornerstone remote sensing technology. The explosive growth in image data volume and instrument data rates, compete with limited on-board storage resources and downlink bandwidth, making hyperspectral image data compression a mission critical on-board processing task. The Consultative Committee for Space Data Systems (CCSDS) extended the previous issue of the CCSDS-123.0 Recommended Standard for multi- and hyperspectral image compression to provide with Near-Lossless compression functionality. A key feature of the CCSDS-123.0-B-2 is the improved Hybrid Entropy Coder, which at low bit rates, provides substantially better compression performance than the Issue 1 entropy coders. In this paper, we introduce a high-throughput hardware implementation of the CCSDS-123.0-B-2 Hybrid Entropy Coder. The introduced architecture exploits the systolic design pattern to provide modularity and latency insensitivity in a deep and elastic pipeline achieving a constant throughput of 1 sample/cycle with a small FPGA resource footprint. This architecture is described in portable VHDL RTL and is implemented, validated and demonstrated on a commercially available Xilinx KCU105 development board hosting a Xilinx Kintex Ultrascale XCKU040 SRAM FPGA, and thus, is directly transferable to Xilinx Radiation Tolerant Kintex UltraScale XQRKU060 space-grade devices for space deployments. Moreover, state-of-the-art SpaceFibre (ECSS-E-ST-50-11C) serial link interface and test equipment were used in the validation platform to emulate an on-board deployment. The introduced CCSDS-123.0-B-2 Hybrid Entropy Encoder achieves a constant throughput performance of 305 MSamples/s. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first published fully-compliant architecture and high-throughput implementation of the CCSDS-123.0-B-2 Hybrid Entropy Coder, targeting space-grade FPGA technology.

The explosive growth in image data volume and instrument data rates, compete with limited on-board storage resources and downlink bandwidth, making hyperspectral image data compression a mission critical on-board processing task. The Consultative Committee for Space Data Systems (CCSDS) extended the previous issue of the CCSDS-123.0 Recommended Standard for multi- and hyperspectral image compression to provide with Near-Lossless compression functionality. A key feature of the CCSDS-123.0-B-2 is the improved Hybrid Entropy Coder, which at low bit rates, provides substantially better compression performance than the Issue 1 entropy coders. In this paper, we introduce a high-throughput hardware implementation of the CCSDS-123.0-B-2 Hybrid Entropy Coder. The introduced architecture exploits the systolic design pattern to provide modularity and latency insensitivity in a deep and elastic pipeline achieving a constant throughput of 1 sample/cycle with a small FPGA resource footprint. This architecture is described in portable VHDL RTL and is implemented, validated and demonstrated on a commercially available Xilinx KCU105 development board hosting a Xilinx Kintex Ultrascale XCKU040 SRAM FPGA, and thus, is directly transferable to Xilinx Radiation Tolerant Kintex UltraScale XQRKU060 space-grade devices for space deployments. Moreover, state-of-the-art SpaceFibre (ECSS-E-ST-50-11C) serial link interface and test equipment were used in the validation platform to emulate an on-board deployment. The introduced CCSDS-123.0-B-2 Hybrid Entropy Encoder achieves a constant throughput performance of 305 MSamples/s. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first published fully-compliant architecture and high-throughput implementation of the CCSDS-123.0-B-2 Hybrid Entropy Coder, targeting space-grade FPGA technology.
abstract_zh: 如今，高光谱成像被认为是遥感技术的基石。图像数据量和仪器数据速率的爆炸式增长与有限的机载存储资源和下行链路带宽竞争，使得高光谱图像数据压缩成为关键的机载处理任务。空间数据系统咨询委员会 (CCSDS) 扩展了上一期多光谱和高光谱图像压缩 CCSDS-123.0 推荐标准，以提供近无损压缩功能。 CCSDS-123.0-B-2 的一个关键特性是改进的混合熵编码器，它在低比特率下可提供比问题 1 熵编码器更好的压缩性能。在本文中，我们介绍了 CCSDS-123.0-B-2 混合熵编码器的高吞吐量硬件实现。所引入的架构利用脉动设计模式，在深度且弹性的管道中提供模块化和延迟不敏感，以较小的 FPGA 资源占用实现 1 个样本/周期的恒定吞吐量。该架构以便携式 VHDL RTL 进行描述，并在托管 Xilinx Kintex Ultrascale XCKU040 SRAM FPGA 的商用 Xilinx KCU105 开发板上实现、验证和演示，因此可直接转移到用于空间部署的 Xilinx 耐辐射 Kintex UltraScale XQRKU060 航天级器件。此外，验证平台中还使用了最先进的 SpaceFibre (ECSS-E-ST-50-11C) 串行链路接口和测试设备来模拟机载部署。推出的 CCSDS-123.0-B-2 混合熵编码器实现了 305 MSamples/s 的恒定吞吐量性能。据我们所知，这是第一个发布的完全兼容架构和高吞吐量的 CCSDS-123.0-B-2 混合熵编码器实现，针对航天级 FPGA 技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对航天级SRAM FPGA技术的高效架构和高吞吐量实现的CCSDS-123.0-B-2混合熵编码器。
AI.motivation: 高光谱成像数据量激增导致星载存储和下传带宽受限，需高效压缩技术。CCSDS-123.0-B-2标准的混合熵编码器在低比特率下表现更优，但缺乏针对航天级FPGA的高效实现。
AI.method: 采用系综设计模式构建模块化深度流水线架构，通过VHDL实现并在Xilinx Kintex UltraScale FPGA开发板上验证，结合SpaceFibre接口模拟星载环境。
AI.result: 实现305 MSamples/s恒定吞吐量，资源占用少，是首个针对航天级FPGA的CCSDS-123.0-B-2混合熵编码器完整合规实现。

search_text: An Efficient Architecture and High-Throughput Implementation of CCSDS-123.0-B-2 Hybrid Entropy Coder Targeting Space-Grade SRAM FPGA Technology 针对航天级 SRAM FPGA 技术的 CCSDS-123.0-B-2 混合熵编码器的高效架构和高吞吐量实现 Nowadays, hyperspectral imaging is recognized as cornerstone remote sensing technology. The explosive growth in image data volume and instrument data rates, compete with limited on-board storage resources and downlink bandwidth, making hyperspectral image data compression a mission critical on-board processing task. The Consultative Committee for Space Data Systems (CCSDS) extended the previous issue of the CCSDS-123.0 Recommended Standard for multi- and hyperspectral image compression to provide with Near-Lossless compression functionality. A key feature of the CCSDS-123.0-B-2 is the improved Hybrid Entropy Coder, which at low bit rates, provides substantially better compression performance than the Issue 1 entropy coders. In this paper, we introduce a high-throughput hardware implementation of the CCSDS-123.0-B-2 Hybrid Entropy Coder. The introduced architecture exploits the systolic design pattern to provide modularity and latency insensitivity in a deep and elastic pipeline achieving a constant throughput of 1 sample/cycle with a small FPGA resource footprint. This architecture is described in portable VHDL RTL and is implemented, validated and demonstrated on a commercially available Xilinx KCU105 development board hosting a Xilinx Kintex Ultrascale XCKU040 SRAM FPGA, and thus, is directly transferable to Xilinx Radiation Tolerant Kintex UltraScale XQRKU060 space-grade devices for space deployments. Moreover, state-of-the-art SpaceFibre (ECSS-E-ST-50-11C) serial link interface and test equipment were used in the validation platform to emulate an on-board deployment. The introduced CCSDS-123.0-B-2 Hybrid Entropy Encoder achieves a constant throughput performance of 305 MSamples/s. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first published fully-compliant architecture and high-throughput implementation of the CCSDS-123.0-B-2 Hybrid Entropy Coder, targeting space-grade FPGA technology. 如今，高光谱成像被认为是遥感技术的基石。图像数据量和仪器数据速率的爆炸式增长与有限的机载存储资源和下行链路带宽竞争，使得高光谱图像数据压缩成为关键的机载处理任务。空间数据系统咨询委员会 (CCSDS) 扩展了上一期多光谱和高光谱图像压缩 CCSDS-123.0 推荐标准，以提供近无损压缩功能。 CCSDS-123.0-B-2 的一个关键特性是改进的混合熵编码器，它在低比特率下可提供比问题 1 熵编码器更好的压缩性能。在本文中，我们介绍了 CCSDS-123.0-B-2 混合熵编码器的高吞吐量硬件实现。所引入的架构利用脉动设计模式，在深度且弹性的管道中提供模块化和延迟不敏感，以较小的 FPGA 资源占用实现 1 个样本/周期的恒定吞吐量。该架构以便携式 VHDL RTL 进行描述，并在托管 Xilinx Kintex Ultrascale XCKU040 SRAM FPGA 的商用 Xilinx KCU105 开发板上实现、验证和演示，因此可直接转移到用于空间部署的 Xilinx 耐辐射 Kintex UltraScale XQRKU060 航天级器件。此外，验证平台中还使用了最先进的 SpaceFibre (ECSS-E-ST-50-11C) 串行链路接口和测试设备来模拟机载部署。推出的 CCSDS-123.0-B-2 混合熵编码器实现了 305 MSamples/s 的恒定吞吐量性能。据我们所知，这是第一个发布的完全兼容架构和高吞吐量的 CCSDS-123.0-B-2 混合熵编码器实现，针对航天级 FPGA 技术。 本文提出了一种针对航天级SRAM FPGA技术的高效架构和高吞吐量实现的CCSDS-123.0-B-2混合熵编码器。 Panagiotis Chatziantoniou,Antonis Tsigkanos,Dimitris Theodoropoulos,Nektarios Kranitis,Antonis Paschalis eess.IV,cs.AR

authors_text: Xiao-lin Chen,Wen-jun Hou
title: Identifying Fixation and Saccades in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 识别虚拟现实中的注视和扫视
abstract: Gaze recognition can significantly reduce the amount of eye movement data for a better understanding of cognitive and visual processing. Gaze recognition is an essential precondition for eye-based interaction applications in virtual reality. However, the three-dimensional characteristics of virtual reality environments also pose new challenges to existing recognition algorithms. Based on seven evaluation metrics and the Overall score (the mean of the seven normalized metric values), we obtain optimal parameters of three existing recognition algorithms (Velocity-Threshold Identification, Dispersion-Threshold Identification, and Velocity & Dispersion-Threshold Identification) and our modified Velocity & Dispersion-Threshold Identification algorithm. We compare the performance of these four algorithms with optimal parameters. The results show that our modified Velocity & Dispersion-Threshold Identification performs the best. The impact of interface complexity on classification results is also preliminarily explored. The results show that the algorithms are not sensitive to interface complexity.
summary: Gaze recognition can significantly reduce the amount of eye movement data for a better understanding of cognitive and visual processing. Gaze recognition is an essential precondition for eye-based interaction applications in virtual reality. However, the three-dimensional characteristics of virtual reality environments also pose new challenges to existing recognition algorithms. Based on seven evaluation metrics and the Overall score (the mean of the seven normalized metric values), we obtain optimal parameters of three existing recognition algorithms (Velocity-Threshold Identification, Dispersion-Threshold Identification, and Velocity & Dispersion-Threshold Identification) and our modified Velocity & Dispersion-Threshold Identification algorithm. We compare the performance of these four algorithms with optimal parameters. The results show that our modified Velocity & Dispersion-Threshold Identification performs the best. The impact of interface complexity on classification results is also preliminarily explored. The results show that the algorithms are not sensitive to interface complexity.
abstract_zh: 凝视识别可以显着减少眼球运动数据量，以便更好地理解认知和视觉处理。视线识别是虚拟现实中基于眼睛的交互应用的重要前提。然而，虚拟现实环境的三维特性也对现有的识别算法提出了新的挑战。基于七个评估指标和总体得分（七个归一化指标值的平均值），我们获得了三种现有识别算法（速度阈值识别、色散阈值识别和速度和色散阈值识别）以及改进的速度和色散阈值识别算法的最佳参数。我们将这四种算法的性能与最佳参数进行比较。结果表明，我们改进的速度和色散阈值识别表现最好。还初步探讨了界面复杂度对分类结果的影响。结果表明，该算法对界面复杂度不敏感。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进虚拟现实环境中眼动追踪算法，以更准确地识别注视和扫视行为。
AI.motivation: 现有眼动识别算法在虚拟现实的三维环境中面临挑战，需优化参数以提升准确性并适应复杂交互需求。
AI.method: 基于七项评估指标和总体得分，优化三种现有算法（速度阈值、离散度阈值、联合阈值）及改进后的联合阈值算法参数，并进行性能对比。
AI.result: 改进后的联合阈值算法表现最佳，且算法对界面复杂度不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 改进的联合阈值算法有效解决了VR环境中的眼动识别问题，具有较好的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Yang Li,Cheng Yu,Guangzhi Sun,Hua Jiang,Fanglei Sun,Weiqin Zu,Ying Wen,Yang Yang,Jun Wang
title: Cross-Utterance Conditioned VAE for Non-Autoregressive Text-to-Speech
title_zh: 用于非自回归文本转语音的交叉话语条件 VAE
abstract: Modelling prosody variation is critical for synthesizing natural and expressive speech in end-to-end text-to-speech (TTS) systems. In this paper, a cross-utterance conditional VAE (CUC-VAE) is proposed to estimate a posterior probability distribution of the latent prosody features for each phoneme by conditioning on acoustic features, speaker information, and text features obtained from both past and future sentences. At inference time, instead of the standard Gaussian distribution used by VAE, CUC-VAE allows sampling from an utterance-specific prior distribution conditioned on cross-utterance information, which allows the prosody features generated by the TTS system to be related to the context and is more similar to how humans naturally produce prosody. The performance of CUC-VAE is evaluated via a qualitative listening test for naturalness, intelligibility and quantitative measurements, including word error rates and the standard deviation of prosody attributes. Experimental results on LJ-Speech and LibriTTS data show that the proposed CUC-VAE TTS system improves naturalness and prosody diversity with clear margins.
summary: Modelling prosody variation is critical for synthesizing natural and expressive speech in end-to-end text-to-speech (TTS) systems. In this paper, a cross-utterance conditional VAE (CUC-VAE) is proposed to estimate a posterior probability distribution of the latent prosody features for each phoneme by conditioning on acoustic features, speaker information, and text features obtained from both past and future sentences. At inference time, instead of the standard Gaussian distribution used by VAE, CUC-VAE allows sampling from an utterance-specific prior distribution conditioned on cross-utterance information, which allows the prosody features generated by the TTS system to be related to the context and is more similar to how humans naturally produce prosody. The performance of CUC-VAE is evaluated via a qualitative listening test for naturalness, intelligibility and quantitative measurements, including word error rates and the standard deviation of prosody attributes. Experimental results on LJ-Speech and LibriTTS data show that the proposed CUC-VAE TTS system improves naturalness and prosody diversity with clear margins.
abstract_zh: 韵律变化建模对于在端到端文本转语音 (TTS) 系统中合成自然且富有表现力的语音至关重要。在本文中，提出了一种交叉话语条件 VAE（CUC-VAE），通过对从过去和未来句子中获得的声学特征、说话人信息和文本特征进行条件估计来估计每个音素的潜在韵律特征的后验概率分布。在推理时，CUC-VAE 不是 VAE 使用的标准高斯分布，而是允许从以交叉话语信息为条件的特定于话语的先验分布中进行采样，这使得 TTS 系统生成的韵律特征与上下文相关，并且更类似于人类自然产生韵律的方式。 CUC-VAE 的性能通过自然度、清晰度和定量测量的定性听力测试进行评估，包括单词错误率和韵律属性的标准偏差。 LJ-Speech 和 LibriTTS 数据上的实验结果表明，所提出的 CUC-VAE TTS 系统以明显的优势提高了自然度和韵律多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨语句条件变分自编码器（CUC-VAE），用于非自回归文本到语音合成，以提升生成语音的韵律自然度和多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端文本到语音系统在建模韵律变化时存在不足，导致生成语音缺乏自然性和表现力，需通过跨上下文信息建模改进韵律生成。
AI.method: 设计CUC-VAE模型，通过结合过去和未来句子的声学特征、说话人信息及文本特征，估计音素级潜在韵律特征的后验分布，并在推理阶段使用基于跨语句信息的语句特定先验分布进行采样。
AI.result: 在LJ-Speech和LibriTTS数据集上的实验表明，CUC-VAE在自然度、可理解性及韵律属性标准差等指标上均优于基线方法，且提升幅度显著。
AI.conclusion: CUC-VAE通过跨语句条件建模有效提升了非自回归TTS系统的韵律生成能力，为自然语音合成提供了新思路。

method: 设计CUC-VAE模型，通过结合过去和未来句子的声学特征、说话人信息及文本特征，估计音素级潜在韵律特征的后验分布，并在推理阶段使用基于跨语句信息的语句特定先验分布进行采样。
result: 在LJ-Speech和LibriTTS数据集上的实验表明，CUC-VAE在自然度、可理解性及韵律属性标准差等指标上均优于基线方法，且提升幅度显著。
conclusion: CUC-VAE通过跨语句条件建模有效提升了非自回归TTS系统的韵律生成能力，为自然语音合成提供了新思路。
search_text: Cross-Utterance Conditioned VAE for Non-Autoregressive Text-to-Speech 用于非自回归文本转语音的交叉话语条件 VAE Modelling prosody variation is critical for synthesizing natural and expressive speech in end-to-end text-to-speech (TTS) systems. In this paper, a cross-utterance conditional VAE (CUC-VAE) is proposed to estimate a posterior probability distribution of the latent prosody features for each phoneme by conditioning on acoustic features, speaker information, and text features obtained from both past and future sentences. At inference time, instead of the standard Gaussian distribution used by VAE, CUC-VAE allows sampling from an utterance-specific prior distribution conditioned on cross-utterance information, which allows the prosody features generated by the TTS system to be related to the context and is more similar to how humans naturally produce prosody. The performance of CUC-VAE is evaluated via a qualitative listening test for naturalness, intelligibility and quantitative measurements, including word error rates and the standard deviation of prosody attributes. Experimental results on LJ-Speech and LibriTTS data show that the proposed CUC-VAE TTS system improves naturalness and prosody diversity with clear margins. 韵律变化建模对于在端到端文本转语音 (TTS) 系统中合成自然且富有表现力的语音至关重要。在本文中，提出了一种交叉话语条件 VAE（CUC-VAE），通过对从过去和未来句子中获得的声学特征、说话人信息和文本特征进行条件估计来估计每个音素的潜在韵律特征的后验概率分布。在推理时，CUC-VAE 不是 VAE 使用的标准高斯分布，而是允许从以交叉话语信息为条件的特定于话语的先验分布中进行采样，这使得 TTS 系统生成的韵律特征与上下文相关，并且更类似于人类自然产生韵律的方式。 CUC-VAE 的性能通过自然度、清晰度和定量测量的定性听力测试进行评估，包括单词错误率和韵律属性的标准偏差。 LJ-Speech 和 LibriTTS 数据上的实验结果表明，所提出的 CUC-VAE TTS 系统以明显的优势提高了自然度和韵律多样性。 本文提出一种跨语句条件变分自编码器（CUC-VAE），用于非自回归文本到语音合成，以提升生成语音的韵律自然度和多样性。 Yang Li,Cheng Yu,Guangzhi Sun,Hua Jiang,Fanglei Sun,Weiqin Zu,Ying Wen,Yang Yang,Jun Wang cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Ying Zhou,Xuanang Chen,Ben He,Zheng Ye,Le Sun
title: Re-thinking Knowledge Graph Completion Evaluation from an Information Retrieval Perspective
title_zh: 从信息检索角度重新思考知识图谱完成度评价
abstract: Knowledge graph completion (KGC) aims to infer missing knowledge triples based on known facts in a knowledge graph. Current KGC research mostly follows an entity ranking protocol, wherein the effectiveness is measured by the predicted rank of a masked entity in a test triple. The overall performance is then given by a micro(-average) metric over all individual answer entities. Due to the incomplete nature of the large-scale knowledge bases, such an entity ranking setting is likely affected by unlabelled top-ranked positive examples, raising questions on whether the current evaluation protocol is sufficient to guarantee a fair comparison of KGC systems. To this end, this paper presents a systematic study on whether and how the label sparsity affects the current KGC evaluation with the popular micro metrics. Specifically, inspired by the TREC paradigm for large-scale information retrieval (IR) experimentation, we create a relatively "complete" judgment set based on a sample from the popular FB15k-237 dataset following the TREC pooling method. According to our analysis, it comes as a surprise that switching from the original labels to our "complete" labels results in a drastic change of system ranking of a variety of 13 popular KGC models in terms of micro metrics. Further investigation indicates that the IR-like macro(-average) metrics are more stable and discriminative under different settings, meanwhile, less affected by label sparsity. Thus, for KGC evaluation, we recommend conducting TREC-style pooling to balance between human efforts and label completeness, and reporting also the IR-like macro metrics to reflect the ranking nature of the KGC task.
summary: Knowledge graph completion (KGC) aims to infer missing knowledge triples based on known facts in a knowledge graph. Current KGC research mostly follows an entity ranking protocol, wherein the effectiveness is measured by the predicted rank of a masked entity in a test triple. The overall performance is then given by a micro(-average) metric over all individual answer entities. Due to the incomplete nature of the large-scale knowledge bases, such an entity ranking setting is likely affected by unlabelled top-ranked positive examples, raising questions on whether the current evaluation protocol is sufficient to guarantee a fair comparison of KGC systems. To this end, this paper presents a systematic study on whether and how the label sparsity affects the current KGC evaluation with the popular micro metrics. Specifically, inspired by the TREC paradigm for large-scale information retrieval (IR) experimentation, we create a relatively "complete" judgment set based on a sample from the popular FB15k-237 dataset following the TREC pooling method. According to our analysis, it comes as a surprise that switching from the original labels to our "complete" labels results in a drastic change of system ranking of a variety of 13 popular KGC models in terms of micro metrics. Further investigation indicates that the IR-like macro(-average) metrics are more stable and discriminative under different settings, meanwhile, less affected by label sparsity. Thus, for KGC evaluation, we recommend conducting TREC-style pooling to balance between human efforts and label completeness, and reporting also the IR-like macro metrics to reflect the ranking nature of the KGC task.
abstract_zh: 知识图补全（KGC）旨在根据知识图中的已知事实推断缺失的知识三元组。当前的 KGC 研究主要遵循实体排名协议，其中有效性是通过测试三元组中屏蔽实体的预测排名来衡量的。然后，整体性能由所有单独答案实体的微观（平均）指标给出。由于大规模知识库的不完整性，这种实体排名设置可能会受到未标记的排名靠前的正例的影响，这引发了人们对当前评估协议是否足以保证 KGC 系统的公平比较的疑问。为此，本文利用流行的微观指标，系统地研究了标签稀疏性是否以及如何影响当前的 KGC 评估。具体来说，受到大规模信息检索（IR）实验的 TREC 范式的启发，我们按照 TREC 池化方法，基于流行的 FB15k-237 数据集的样本创建了一个相对“完整”的判断集。根据我们的分析，令人惊讶的是，从原始标签切换到我们的“完整”标签导致 13 个流行 KGC 模型的系统排名在微观指标方面发生了巨大变化。进一步的研究表明，类似 IR 的宏观（平均）指标在不同设置下更加稳定和具有区分性，同时受标签稀疏性的影响较小。因此，对于 KGC 评估，我们建议进行 TREC 式池化以平衡人类努力和标签完整性之间的关系，并报告类似 IR 的宏观指标以反映 KGC 任务的排名性质。

AI.tldr: 从信息检索视角重新思考知识图谱补全评估方法，提出基于TREC范式的评估改进方案。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱补全评估依赖实体排序和微平均指标，但大规模知识库的标签稀疏性可能导致未标注的正例影响评估公平性，需改进评估协议。
AI.method: 借鉴TREC信息检索实验范式，采用FB15k-237数据集构建较完整的判断集，对比分析微平均与宏观平均指标在不同标签稀疏场景下的稳定性。
AI.result: 使用完整标签后13种主流模型的系统排名发生显著变化，宏观平均指标在不同设置下更稳定且受标签稀疏性影响更小。
AI.conclusion: 建议采用TREC风格的池化方法平衡标注成本与完整性，同时报告信息检索类宏观指标以更准确反映知识图谱补全任务的排序特性。

authors_text: Sangshin Oh,Seyun Um,Hong-Goo Kang
title: ReCAB-VAE: Gumbel-Softmax Variational Inference Based on Analytic Divergence
title_zh: ReCAB-VAE：基于分析散度的Gumbel-Softmax变分推理
abstract: The Gumbel-softmax distribution, or Concrete distribution, is often used to relax the discrete characteristics of a categorical distribution and enable back-propagation through differentiable reparameterization. Although it reliably yields low variance gradients, it still relies on a stochastic sampling process for optimization. In this work, we present a relaxed categorical analytic bound (ReCAB), a novel divergence-like metric which corresponds to the upper bound of the Kullback-Leibler divergence (KLD) of a relaxed categorical distribution. The proposed metric is easy to implement because it has a closed form solution, and empirical results show that it is close to the actual KLD. Along with this new metric, we propose a relaxed categorical analytic bound variational autoencoder (ReCAB-VAE) that successfully models both continuous and relaxed discrete latent representations. We implement an emotional text-to-speech synthesis system based on the proposed framework, and show that the proposed system flexibly and stably controls emotion expressions with better speech quality compared to baselines that use stochastic estimation or categorical distribution approximation.
summary: The Gumbel-softmax distribution, or Concrete distribution, is often used to relax the discrete characteristics of a categorical distribution and enable back-propagation through differentiable reparameterization. Although it reliably yields low variance gradients, it still relies on a stochastic sampling process for optimization. In this work, we present a relaxed categorical analytic bound (ReCAB), a novel divergence-like metric which corresponds to the upper bound of the Kullback-Leibler divergence (KLD) of a relaxed categorical distribution. The proposed metric is easy to implement because it has a closed form solution, and empirical results show that it is close to the actual KLD. Along with this new metric, we propose a relaxed categorical analytic bound variational autoencoder (ReCAB-VAE) that successfully models both continuous and relaxed discrete latent representations. We implement an emotional text-to-speech synthesis system based on the proposed framework, and show that the proposed system flexibly and stably controls emotion expressions with better speech quality compared to baselines that use stochastic estimation or categorical distribution approximation.
abstract_zh: Gumbel-softmax 分布或具体分布通常用于放松分类分布的离散特征，并通过可微分重新参数化实现反向传播。尽管它可靠地产生低方差梯度，但它仍然依赖于随机采样过程来进行优化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个宽松的分类分析界限（ReCAB），这是一种新颖的类似散度的度量，它对应于宽松分类分布的 Kullback-Leibler 散度（KLD）的上限。所提出的度量很容易实现，因为它具有封闭形式的解决方案，并且实证结果表明它接近实际的 KLD。除了这个新指标之外，我们还提出了一种宽松的分类分析边界变分自动编码器（ReCAB-VAE），它可以成功地对连续和宽松的离散潜在表示进行建模。我们基于所提出的框架实现了情感文本到语音合成系统，并表明与使用随机估计或分类分布近似的基线相比，所提出的系统灵活稳定地控制情感表达，具有更好的语音质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于解析散度的Gumbel-Softmax变分推理方法ReCAB-VAE，并应用于情感语音合成系统。
AI.motivation: 传统Gumbel-Softmax虽能实现离散分布的连续松弛，但依赖随机采样过程导致优化不稳定，需寻找更高效的确定性替代方案。
AI.method: 设计解析散度ReCAB作为KL散度上界，通过闭式解计算降低方差；构建融合连续与松弛离散潜在表示的ReCAB-VAE模型，并实现情感语音合成系统。
AI.result: 实验表明ReCAB与真实KL散度接近，情感语音合成系统在情绪控制稳定性与语音质量上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ReCAB为变分推理提供新度量，提升VAE训练效率，验证了其在情感语音合成等任务中的有效性。

Along with this new metric, we propose a relaxed categorical analytic bound variational autoencoder (ReCAB-VAE) that successfully models both continuous and relaxed discrete latent representations. We implement an emotional text-to-speech synthesis system based on the proposed framework, and show that the proposed system flexibly and stably controls emotion expressions with better speech quality compared to baselines that use stochastic estimation or categorical distribution approximation. Gumbel-softmax 分布或具体分布通常用于放松分类分布的离散特征，并通过可微分重新参数化实现反向传播。尽管它可靠地产生低方差梯度，但它仍然依赖于随机采样过程来进行优化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个宽松的分类分析界限（ReCAB），这是一种新颖的类似散度的度量，它对应于宽松分类分布的 Kullback-Leibler 散度（KLD）的上限。所提出的度量很容易实现，因为它具有封闭形式的解决方案，并且实证结果表明它接近实际的 KLD。除了这个新指标之外，我们还提出了一种宽松的分类分析边界变分自动编码器（ReCAB-VAE），它可以成功地对连续和宽松的离散潜在表示进行建模。我们基于所提出的框架实现了情感文本到语音合成系统，并表明与使用随机估计或分类分布近似的基线相比，所提出的系统灵活稳定地控制情感表达，具有更好的语音质量。 本文提出基于解析散度的Gumbel-Softmax变分推理方法ReCAB-VAE，并应用于情感语音合成系统。 Sangshin Oh,Seyun Um,Hong-Goo Kang eess.AS,cs.AI

authors_text: Nicolas W. Remerscheid,Alexander Ziller,Daniel Rueckert,Georgios Kaissis
title: SmoothNets: Optimizing CNN architecture design for differentially private deep learning
title_zh: SmoothNets：优化 CNN 架构设计以实现差分隐私深度学习
abstract: The arguably most widely employed algorithm to train deep neural networks with Differential Privacy is DPSGD, which requires clipping and noising of per-sample gradients. This introduces a reduction in model utility compared to non-private training. Empirically, it can be observed that this accuracy degradation is strongly dependent on the model architecture. We investigated this phenomenon and, by combining components which exhibit good individual performance, distilled a new model architecture termed SmoothNet, which is characterised by increased robustness to the challenges of DP-SGD training. Experimentally, we benchmark SmoothNet against standard architectures on two benchmark datasets and observe that our architecture outperforms others, reaching an accuracy of 73.5\% on CIFAR-10 at $\varepsilon=7.0$ and 69.2\% at $\varepsilon=7.0$ on ImageNette, a state-of-the-art result compared to prior architectural modifications for DP.
summary: The arguably most widely employed algorithm to train deep neural networks with Differential Privacy is DPSGD, which requires clipping and noising of per-sample gradients. This introduces a reduction in model utility compared to non-private training. Empirically, it can be observed that this accuracy degradation is strongly dependent on the model architecture. We investigated this phenomenon and, by combining components which exhibit good individual performance, distilled a new model architecture termed SmoothNet, which is characterised by increased robustness to the challenges of DP-SGD training. Experimentally, we benchmark SmoothNet against standard architectures on two benchmark datasets and observe that our architecture outperforms others, reaching an accuracy of 73.5\% on CIFAR-10 at $\varepsilon=7.0$ and 69.2\% at $\varepsilon=7.0$ on ImageNette, a state-of-the-art result compared to prior architectural modifications for DP.
abstract_zh: 可以说，最广泛使用的用于训练具有差分隐私的深度神经网络的算法是 DPSGD，它需要对每个样本梯度进行裁剪和噪声处理。与非私人培训相比，这导致模型效用降低。根据经验，可以观察到这种精度下降很大程度上取决于模型架构。我们研究了这种现象，并通过组合表现出良好个体性能的组件，提炼出一种称为 SmoothNet 的新模型架构，其特点是对 DP-SGD 训练挑战的鲁棒性增强。实验上，我们在两个基准数据集上针对标准架构对 SmoothNet 进行基准测试，并观察到我们的架构优于其他架构，在 $\varepsilon=7.0$ 的 CIFAR-10 上达到 73.5\% 的准确率，在 ImageNette 上 $\varepsilon=7.0$ 的准确率达到 69.2\%，与之前的 DP 架构修改相比，这是最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 设计一种优化的CNN架构（SmoothNet），以提高差分隐私深度学习中的模型准确性。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私训练（DPSGD）因梯度裁剪和噪声添加导致模型精度下降，而此问题与模型架构密切相关，需针对性优化架构以缓解精度损失。
AI.method: 通过组合表现优异的组件，蒸馏出具有更高DP-SGD鲁棒性的新型CNN架构SmoothNet。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上ε=7.0时达73.5%精度，在ImageNette上达69.2%，优于现有差分隐私架构方法。
AI.conclusion: SmoothNet证明了架构优化对差分隐私深度学习的重要性，为后续研究提供了有效方向。

authors_text: Aditya Agarwal,Bipasha Sen,Shankara Narayanan V,Vishal Reddy Mandadi,Brojeshwar Bhowmick,K Madhava Krishna
title: Approaches and Challenges in Robotic Perception for Table-top Rearrangement and Planning
title_zh: 用于桌面重新布置和规划的机器人感知的方法和挑战
abstract: Table-top Rearrangement and Planning is a challenging problem that relies heavily on an excellent perception stack. The perception stack involves observing and registering the 3D scene on the table, detecting what objects are on the table, and how to manipulate them. Consequently, it greatly influences the system's task-planning and motion-planning stacks that follow. We present a comprehensive overview and discuss the different challenges associated with the perception module. This work is a result of our extensive involvement in the ICRA 2022 Open Cloud Robot Table Organization Challenge, in which we stood third in the final rankings.
summary: Table-top Rearrangement and Planning is a challenging problem that relies heavily on an excellent perception stack. The perception stack involves observing and registering the 3D scene on the table, detecting what objects are on the table, and how to manipulate them. Consequently, it greatly influences the system's task-planning and motion-planning stacks that follow. We present a comprehensive overview and discuss the different challenges associated with the perception module. This work is a result of our extensive involvement in the ICRA 2022 Open Cloud Robot Table Organization Challenge, in which we stood third in the final rankings.
abstract_zh: 桌面重排和规划是一个具有挑战性的问题，在很大程度上依赖于优秀的感知堆栈。感知堆栈涉及观察和注册桌子上的 3D 场景、检测桌子上有哪些对象以及如何操纵它们。因此，它极大地影响了系统随后的任务规划和运动规划堆栈。我们提供全面的概述并讨论与感知模块相关的不同挑战。这项工作是我们广泛参与 ICRA 2022 开放云机器人桌组织挑战赛的结果，我们在最终排名中获得第三名。

AI.tldr: 探讨桌面整理与规划中机器人感知模块的挑战与方法
AI.motivation: 感知系统对任务规划和运动规划有重大影响，需解决其挑战以提高整体系统性能
AI.method: 通过综述不同感知技术，分析其在桌面整理中的挑战，并结合竞赛经验进行讨论
AI.result: 在ICRA 2022挑战赛中排名第三，验证了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 强调感知模块的关键作用，并指出未来研究需解决的挑战

authors_text: Nicolas Ugrinovic,Albert Pumarola,Alberto Sanfeliu,Francesc Moreno-Noguer
title: Single-view 3D Body and Cloth Reconstruction under Complex Poses
title_zh: 复杂姿势下的单视图3D身体和布料重建
abstract: Recent advances in 3D human shape reconstruction from single images have shown impressive results, leveraging on deep networks that model the so-called implicit function to learn the occupancy status of arbitrarily dense 3D points in space. However, while current algorithms based on this paradigm, like PiFuHD, are able to estimate accurate geometry of the human shape and clothes, they require high-resolution input images and are not able to capture complex body poses. Most training and evaluation is performed on 1k-resolution images of humans standing in front of the camera under neutral body poses. In this paper, we leverage publicly available data to extend existing implicit function-based models to deal with images of humans that can have arbitrary poses and self-occluded limbs. We argue that the representation power of the implicit function is not sufficient to simultaneously model details of the geometry and of the body pose. We, therefore, propose a coarse-to-fine approach in which we first learn an implicit function that maps the input image to a 3D body shape with a low level of detail, but which correctly fits the underlying human pose, despite its complexity. We then learn a displacement map, conditioned on the smoothed surface and on the input image, which encodes the high-frequency details of the clothes and body. In the experimental section, we show that this coarse-to-fine strategy represents a very good trade-off between shape detail and pose correctness, comparing favorably to the most recent state-of-the-art approaches. Our code will be made publicly available.
summary: Recent advances in 3D human shape reconstruction from single images have shown impressive results, leveraging on deep networks that model the so-called implicit function to learn the occupancy status of arbitrarily dense 3D points in space. However, while current algorithms based on this paradigm, like PiFuHD, are able to estimate accurate geometry of the human shape and clothes, they require high-resolution input images and are not able to capture complex body poses. Most training and evaluation is performed on 1k-resolution images of humans standing in front of the camera under neutral body poses. In this paper, we leverage publicly available data to extend existing implicit function-based models to deal with images of humans that can have arbitrary poses and self-occluded limbs. We argue that the representation power of the implicit function is not sufficient to simultaneously model details of the geometry and of the body pose. We, therefore, propose a coarse-to-fine approach in which we first learn an implicit function that maps the input image to a 3D body shape with a low level of detail, but which correctly fits the underlying human pose, despite its complexity. We then learn a displacement map, conditioned on the smoothed surface and on the input image, which encodes the high-frequency details of the clothes and body. In the experimental section, we show that this coarse-to-fine strategy represents a very good trade-off between shape detail and pose correctness, comparing favorably to the most recent state-of-the-art approaches. Our code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 利用对所谓隐式函数进行建模的深度网络来学习空间中任意密集的 3D 点的占用状态，从单幅图像重建 3D 人体形状的最新进展已经显示出令人印象深刻的结果。然而，虽然当前基于此范例的算法（例如 PiFuHD）能够估计人体形状和衣服的精确几何形状，但它们需要高分辨率输入图像，并且无法捕获复杂的身体姿势。大多数训练和评估都是在人体以中性身体姿势站在摄像机前的 1k 分辨率图像上进行的。在本文中，我们利用公开数据来扩展现有的基于隐式函数的模型，以处理可以具有任意姿势和自遮挡肢体的人类图像。我们认为隐函数的表示能力不足以同时对几何形状和身体姿势的细节进行建模。因此，我们提出了一种从粗到精的方法，其中我们首先学习一个隐式函数，该函数将输入图像映射到细节水平较低的 3D 身体形状，但它正确地适合潜在的人体姿势，尽管其复杂性。然后，我们学习一个以平滑表面和输入图像为条件的位移图，它对衣服和身体的高频细节进行编码。在实验部分，我们表明这种从粗到细的策略代表了形状细节和姿势正确性之间的非常好的权衡，与最新的最先进的方法相比毫不逊色。我们的代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种复杂姿态下单视角3D人体与服装重建方法，通过改进隐式函数模型解决现有方法在姿态适应性和细节表达上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于隐式函数的重建方法依赖高分辨率图像且无法处理复杂姿态，隐式函数难以同时建模几何细节与人体姿态信息。
AI.method: 采用粗到细两阶段策略：先训练隐式函数生成低细节但符合复杂姿态的3D人体基础形状，再通过输入图像和光滑表面生成的位移图编码服装高频细节。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持姿态准确性的同时显著提升形状细节还原度，优于当前最先进的重建方法。
AI.conclusion: 粗到细框架有效平衡了姿态正确性与几何细节表达，为复杂姿态下的3D人体重建提供了新解决方案。

motivation: 现有基于隐式函数的重建方法依赖高分辨率图像且无法处理复杂姿态，隐式函数难以同时建模几何细节与人体姿态信息。
method: 采用粗到细两阶段策略：先训练隐式函数生成低细节但符合复杂姿态的3D人体基础形状，再通过输入图像和光滑表面生成的位移图编码服装高频细节。
result: 实验表明该方法在保持姿态准确性的同时显著提升形状细节还原度，优于当前最先进的重建方法。
conclusion: 粗到细框架有效平衡了姿态正确性与几何细节表达，为复杂姿态下的3D人体重建提供了新解决方案。
search_text: Single-view 3D Body and Cloth Reconstruction under Complex Poses 复杂姿势下的单视图3D身体和布料重建 Recent advances in 3D human shape reconstruction from single images have shown impressive results, leveraging on deep networks that model the so-called implicit function to learn the occupancy status of arbitrarily dense 3D points in space. However, while current algorithms based on this paradigm, like PiFuHD, are able to estimate accurate geometry of the human shape and clothes, they require high-resolution input images and are not able to capture complex body poses. Most training and evaluation is performed on 1k-resolution images of humans standing in front of the camera under neutral body poses. In this paper, we leverage publicly available data to extend existing implicit function-based models to deal with images of humans that can have arbitrary poses and self-occluded limbs. We argue that the representation power of the implicit function is not sufficient to simultaneously model details of the geometry and of the body pose. We, therefore, propose a coarse-to-fine approach in which we first learn an implicit function that maps the input image to a 3D body shape with a low level of detail, but which correctly fits the underlying human pose, despite its complexity. We then learn a displacement map, conditioned on the smoothed surface and on the input image, which encodes the high-frequency details of the clothes and body. In the experimental section, we show that this coarse-to-fine strategy represents a very good trade-off between shape detail and pose correctness, comparing favorably to the most recent state-of-the-art approaches. Our code will be made publicly available. 利用对所谓隐式函数进行建模的深度网络来学习空间中任意密集的 3D 点的占用状态，从单幅图像重建 3D 人体形状的最新进展已经显示出令人印象深刻的结果。然而，虽然当前基于此范例的算法（例如 PiFuHD）能够估计人体形状和衣服的精确几何形状，但它们需要高分辨率输入图像，并且无法捕获复杂的身体姿势。大多数训练和评估都是在人体以中性身体姿势站在摄像机前的 1k 分辨率图像上进行的。在本文中，我们利用公开数据来扩展现有的基于隐式函数的模型，以处理可以具有任意姿势和自遮挡肢体的人类图像。我们认为隐函数的表示能力不足以同时对几何形状和身体姿势的细节进行建模。因此，我们提出了一种从粗到精的方法，其中我们首先学习一个隐式函数，该函数将输入图像映射到细节水平较低的 3D 身体形状，但它正确地适合潜在的人体姿势，尽管其复杂性。然后，我们学习一个以平滑表面和输入图像为条件的位移图，它对衣服和身体的高频细节进行编码。在实验部分，我们表明这种从粗到细的策略代表了形状细节和姿势正确性之间的非常好的权衡，与最新的最先进的方法相比毫不逊色。我们的代码将公开。 本文提出一种复杂姿态下单视角3D人体与服装重建方法，通过改进隐式函数模型解决现有方法在姿态适应性和细节表达上的不足。 Nicolas Ugrinovic,Albert Pumarola,Alberto Sanfeliu,Francesc Moreno-Noguer cs.CV

authors_text: Dan Malkin,Tomasz Limisiewicz,Gabriel Stanovsky
title: A Balanced Data Approach for Evaluating Cross-Lingual Transfer: Mapping the Linguistic Blood Bank
title_zh: 评估跨语言迁移的平衡数据方法：绘制语言血库图
abstract: We show that the choice of pretraining languages affects downstream cross-lingual transfer for BERT-based models. We inspect zero-shot performance in balanced data conditions to mitigate data size confounds, classifying pretraining languages that improve downstream performance as donors, and languages that are improved in zero-shot performance as recipients. We develop a method of quadratic time complexity in the number of languages to estimate these relations, instead of an exponential exhaustive computation of all possible combinations. We find that our method is effective on a diverse set of languages spanning different linguistic features and two downstream tasks. Our findings can inform developers of large-scale multilingual language models in choosing better pretraining configurations.
summary: We show that the choice of pretraining languages affects downstream cross-lingual transfer for BERT-based models. We inspect zero-shot performance in balanced data conditions to mitigate data size confounds, classifying pretraining languages that improve downstream performance as donors, and languages that are improved in zero-shot performance as recipients. We develop a method of quadratic time complexity in the number of languages to estimate these relations, instead of an exponential exhaustive computation of all possible combinations. We find that our method is effective on a diverse set of languages spanning different linguistic features and two downstream tasks. Our findings can inform developers of large-scale multilingual language models in choosing better pretraining configurations.
abstract_zh: 我们表明，预训练语言的选择会影响基于 BERT 的模型的下游跨语言迁移。我们检查平衡数据条件下的零样本性能，以减轻数据大小的混淆，将提高下游性能的预训练语言分类为捐赠者，将零样本性能提高的语言分类为接收者。我们开发了一种语言数量的二次时间复杂度的方法来估计这些关系，而不是对所有可能的组合进行指数穷举计算。我们发现我们的方法对跨越不同语言特征和两个下游任务的多种语言有效。我们的研究结果可以帮助大规模多语言语言模型的开发人员选择更好的预训练配置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种平衡数据方法评估跨语言迁移效果，通过建立语言间的供体-受体关系图谱，优化多语言模型预训练配置。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言迁移评估受数据规模干扰，缺乏有效方法分析预训练语言间的相互影响关系，阻碍模型配置优化。
AI.method: 设计二次时间复杂度算法，在平衡数据条件下通过零样本测试识别语言供体/受体关系，替代传统指数级组合计算。
AI.result: 方法在包含不同语言特征的多语言数据集和两个下游任务中验证有效，成功映射出语言间的迁移增强关系网络。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多语言模型开发者提供预训练语言配置优化依据，通过量化语言间迁移潜力关系提升模型跨语言性能。

authors_text: Chentao Cao,Zhuo-Xu Cui,Qingyong Zhu,Congcong Liu,Dong Liang,Yanjie Zhu
title: PS-Net: Learned Partially Separable Model for Dynamic MR Imaging
title_zh: PS-Net：动态 MR 成像的学习部分可分离模型
abstract: Deep learning methods driven by the low-rank regularization have achieved attractive performance in dynamic magnetic resonance (MR) imaging. However, most of these methods represent low-rank prior by hand-crafted nuclear norm, which cannot accurately approximate the low-rank prior over the entire dataset through a fixed regularization parameter. In this paper, we propose a learned low-rank method for dynamic MR imaging. In particular, we unrolled the semi-quadratic splitting method (HQS) algorithm for the partially separable (PS) model to a network, in which the low-rank is adaptively characterized by a learnable null-space transform. Experiments on the cardiac cine dataset show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art compressed sensing (CS) methods and existing deep learning methods both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Deep learning methods driven by the low-rank regularization have achieved attractive performance in dynamic magnetic resonance (MR) imaging. However, most of these methods represent low-rank prior by hand-crafted nuclear norm, which cannot accurately approximate the low-rank prior over the entire dataset through a fixed regularization parameter. In this paper, we propose a learned low-rank method for dynamic MR imaging. In particular, we unrolled the semi-quadratic splitting method (HQS) algorithm for the partially separable (PS) model to a network, in which the low-rank is adaptively characterized by a learnable null-space transform. Experiments on the cardiac cine dataset show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art compressed sensing (CS) methods and existing deep learning methods both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 由低秩正则化驱动的深度学习方法在动态磁共振（MR）成像中取得了引人注目的性能。然而，这些方法大多数通过手工设计的核范数来表示低秩先验，无法通过固定的正则化参数准确地近似整个数据集上的低秩先验。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于动态 MR 成像的学习低秩方法。特别是，我们将部分可分离（PS）模型的半二次分裂法（HQS）算法展开到网络中，其中低秩通过可学习的零空间变换自适应地表征。对心脏电影数据集的实验表明，所提出的模型在数量和质量上都优于最先进的压缩感知（CS）方法和现有的深度学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PS-Net模型，通过可学习的低秩表征方法改进动态磁共振成像的重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有低秩正则化方法依赖手工设计的核范数，难以通过固定参数准确捕捉动态MRI数据的全局低秩特性。
AI.method: 将半二次分裂算法（HQS）展开为神经网络，引入可学习的零空间变换自适应表征低秩结构。
AI.result: 在心脏动态MRI数据集上，PS-Net在定量指标和视觉质量上均优于压缩感知和现有深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 学习型低秩表征有效提升了动态MRI重建性能，为深度学习与信号处理结合提供了新思路。

authors_text: Weixin Feng,Xingyuan Bu,Chenchen Zhang,Xubin Li
title: Beyond Bounding Box: Multimodal Knowledge Learning for Object Detection
title_zh: 超越边界框：用于目标检测的多模态知识学习
abstract: Multimodal supervision has achieved promising results in many visual language understanding tasks, where the language plays an essential role as a hint or context for recognizing and locating instances. However, due to the defects of the human-annotated language corpus, multimodal supervision remains unexplored in fully supervised object detection scenarios. In this paper, we take advantage of language prompt to introduce effective and unbiased linguistic supervision into object detection, and propose a new mechanism called multimodal knowledge learning (\textbf{MKL}), which is required to learn knowledge from language supervision. Specifically, we design prompts and fill them with the bounding box annotations to generate descriptions containing extensive hints and context for instances recognition and localization. The knowledge from language is then distilled into the detection model via maximizing cross-modal mutual information in both image- and object-level. Moreover, the generated descriptions are manipulated to produce hard negatives to further boost the detector performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method yields a consistent performance gain by 1.6\% $\sim$ 2.1\% and achieves state-of-the-art on MS-COCO and OpenImages datasets.
summary: Multimodal supervision has achieved promising results in many visual language understanding tasks, where the language plays an essential role as a hint or context for recognizing and locating instances. However, due to the defects of the human-annotated language corpus, multimodal supervision remains unexplored in fully supervised object detection scenarios. In this paper, we take advantage of language prompt to introduce effective and unbiased linguistic supervision into object detection, and propose a new mechanism called multimodal knowledge learning (\textbf{MKL}), which is required to learn knowledge from language supervision. Specifically, we design prompts and fill them with the bounding box annotations to generate descriptions containing extensive hints and context for instances recognition and localization. The knowledge from language is then distilled into the detection model via maximizing cross-modal mutual information in both image- and object-level. Moreover, the generated descriptions are manipulated to produce hard negatives to further boost the detector performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method yields a consistent performance gain by 1.6\% $\sim$ 2.1\% and achieves state-of-the-art on MS-COCO and OpenImages datasets.
abstract_zh: 多模态监督在许多视觉语言理解任务中取得了可喜的成果，其中语言作为识别和定位实例的提示或上下文发挥着重要作用。然而，由于人类注释语言语料库的缺陷，多模态监督在完全监督的目标检测场景中仍未得到探索。在本文中，我们利用语言提示将有效且无偏的语言监督引入到目标检测中，并提出了一种称为多模态知识学习（\textbf{MKL}）的新机制，该机制需要从语言监督中学习知识。具体来说，我们设计提示并用边界框注释填充它们，以生成包含用于实例识别和本地化的广泛提示和上下文的描述。然后，通过最大化图像和对象级别的跨模式互信息，将语言知识提炼到检测模型中。此外，生成的描述被操纵以产生硬底片，以进一步提高检测器的性能。大量实验表明，所提出的方法产生了 1.6\% $\sim$ 2.1\% 的一致性能增益，并在 MS-COCO 和 OpenImages 数据集上达到了最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态知识学习方法（MKL），通过语言提示生成描述性文本，提升目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测依赖边界框标注，而人类标注的语料存在缺陷，未充分利用语言作为监督信号。语言提示可提供更丰富的上下文信息，但此前未在完全监督场景中探索。
AI.method: 设计语言提示模板并填充边界框注释生成描述文本，通过最大化图像级和对象级跨模态互信息蒸馏语言知识，同时利用生成描述制造困难负样本增强检测器。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和OpenImages数据集上实现1.6%-2.1%的性能提升，达到当时最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 多模态知识学习有效融合语言监督，证明了语言提示在目标检测中的潜力，为未来研究提供新方向。

search_text: Beyond Bounding Box: Multimodal Knowledge Learning for Object Detection 超越边界框：用于目标检测的多模态知识学习 Multimodal supervision has achieved promising results in many visual language understanding tasks, where the language plays an essential role as a hint or context for recognizing and locating instances. However, due to the defects of the human-annotated language corpus, multimodal supervision remains unexplored in fully supervised object detection scenarios. In this paper, we take advantage of language prompt to introduce effective and unbiased linguistic supervision into object detection, and propose a new mechanism called multimodal knowledge learning (\textbf{MKL}), which is required to learn knowledge from language supervision. Specifically, we design prompts and fill them with the bounding box annotations to generate descriptions containing extensive hints and context for instances recognition and localization. The knowledge from language is then distilled into the detection model via maximizing cross-modal mutual information in both image- and object-level. Moreover, the generated descriptions are manipulated to produce hard negatives to further boost the detector performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method yields a consistent performance gain by 1.6\% $\sim$ 2.1\% and achieves state-of-the-art on MS-COCO and OpenImages datasets. 多模态监督在许多视觉语言理解任务中取得了可喜的成果，其中语言作为识别和定位实例的提示或上下文发挥着重要作用。然而，由于人类注释语言语料库的缺陷，多模态监督在完全监督的目标检测场景中仍未得到探索。在本文中，我们利用语言提示将有效且无偏的语言监督引入到目标检测中，并提出了一种称为多模态知识学习（\textbf{MKL}）的新机制，该机制需要从语言监督中学习知识。具体来说，我们设计提示并用边界框注释填充它们，以生成包含用于实例识别和本地化的广泛提示和上下文的描述。然后，通过最大化图像和对象级别的跨模式互信息，将语言知识提炼到检测模型中。此外，生成的描述被操纵以产生硬底片，以进一步提高检测器的性能。大量实验表明，所提出的方法产生了 1.6\% $\sim$ 2.1\% 的一致性能增益，并在 MS-COCO 和 OpenImages 数据集上达到了最先进的水平。 本文提出一种多模态知识学习方法（MKL），通过语言提示生成描述性文本，提升目标检测性能。 Weixin Feng,Xingyuan Bu,Chenchen Zhang,Xubin Li cs.CV

authors_text: Zizheng Yan,Yushuang Wu,Guanbin Li,Yipeng Qin,Xiaoguang Han,Shuguang Cui
title: Multi-level Consistency Learning for Semi-supervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 半监督领域适应的多级一致性学习
abstract: Semi-supervised domain adaptation (SSDA) aims to apply knowledge learned from a fully labeled source domain to a scarcely labeled target domain. In this paper, we propose a Multi-level Consistency Learning (MCL) framework for SSDA. Specifically, our MCL regularizes the consistency of different views of target domain samples at three levels: (i) at inter-domain level, we robustly and accurately align the source and target domains using a prototype-based optimal transport method that utilizes the pros and cons of different views of target samples; (ii) at intra-domain level, we facilitate the learning of both discriminative and compact target feature representations by proposing a novel class-wise contrastive clustering loss; (iii) at sample level, we follow standard practice and improve the prediction accuracy by conducting a consistency-based self-training. Empirically, we verified the effectiveness of our MCL framework on three popular SSDA benchmarks, i.e., VisDA2017, DomainNet, and Office-Home datasets, and the experimental results demonstrate that our MCL framework achieves the state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Semi-supervised domain adaptation (SSDA) aims to apply knowledge learned from a fully labeled source domain to a scarcely labeled target domain. In this paper, we propose a Multi-level Consistency Learning (MCL) framework for SSDA. Specifically, our MCL regularizes the consistency of different views of target domain samples at three levels: (i) at inter-domain level, we robustly and accurately align the source and target domains using a prototype-based optimal transport method that utilizes the pros and cons of different views of target samples; (ii) at intra-domain level, we facilitate the learning of both discriminative and compact target feature representations by proposing a novel class-wise contrastive clustering loss; (iii) at sample level, we follow standard practice and improve the prediction accuracy by conducting a consistency-based self-training. Empirically, we verified the effectiveness of our MCL framework on three popular SSDA benchmarks, i.e., VisDA2017, DomainNet, and Office-Home datasets, and the experimental results demonstrate that our MCL framework achieves the state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 半监督域适应（SSDA）旨在将从完全标记的源域中学到的知识应用于几乎没有标记的目标域。在本文中，我们提出了 SSDA 的多级一致性学习（MCL）框架。具体来说，我们的 MCL 在三个层面上规范了目标域样本不同视图的一致性：（i）在域间层面，我们使用基于原型的最优传输方法稳健且准确地对齐源域和目标域，该方法利用了目标样本不同视图的优缺点； （ii）在域内层面，我们通过提出一种新颖的类对比聚类损失来促进区分性和紧凑目标特征表示的学习； （iii）在样本层面，我们遵循标准实践，通过进行基于一致性的自我训练来提高预测准确性。根据经验，我们在三个流行的 SSDA 基准数据集（VisDA2017、DomainNet 和 Office-Home 数据集）上验证了我们的 MCL 框架的有效性，实验结果表明我们的 MCL 框架实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多级一致性学习框架（MCL），用于半监督领域自适应任务，旨在将带标签的源领域知识迁移到标签稀缺的目标领域。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法在处理目标领域样本标签稀缺和领域差异时存在局限性，需通过多层级一致性约束提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: MCL框架包含三级一致性约束：1）跨领域层面，基于原型的最优传输方法对齐源目标领域；2）领域内层面，设计类级对比聚类损失学习判别性特征；3）样本层面，采用一致性自训练提升预测精度。
AI.result: 在VisDA2017、DomainNet和Office-Home三个基准数据集上，MCL框架达到当时最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 多级一致性学习通过跨领域对齐、领域内特征学习和样本级自训练的协同作用，有效解决了半监督领域自适应中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Sabeesh Ethiraj,Bharath Kumar Bolla
title: Augmentations: An Insight into their Effectiveness on Convolution Neural Networks
title_zh: 增强：深入了解其在卷积神经网络上的有效性
abstract: Augmentations are the key factor in determining the performance of any neural network as they provide a model with a critical edge in boosting its performance. Their ability to boost a model's robustness depends on two factors, viz-a-viz, the model architecture, and the type of augmentations. Augmentations are very specific to a dataset, and it is not imperative that all kinds of augmentation would necessarily produce a positive effect on a model's performance. Hence there is a need to identify augmentations that perform consistently well across a variety of datasets and also remain invariant to the type of architecture, convolutions, and the number of parameters used. Hence there is a need to identify augmentations that perform consistently well across a variety of datasets and also remain invariant to the type of architecture, convolutions, and the number of parameters used. This paper evaluates the effect of parameters using 3x3 and depth-wise separable convolutions on different augmentation techniques on MNIST, FMNIST, and CIFAR10 datasets. Statistical Evidence shows that techniques such as Cutouts and Random horizontal flip were consistent on both parametrically low and high architectures. Depth-wise separable convolutions outperformed 3x3 convolutions at higher parameters due to their ability to create deeper networks. Augmentations resulted in bridging the accuracy gap between the 3x3 and depth-wise separable convolutions, thus establishing their role in model generalization. At higher number augmentations did not produce a significant change in performance. The synergistic effect of multiple augmentations at higher parameters, with antagonistic effect at lower parameters, was also evaluated. The work proves that a delicate balance between architectural supremacy and augmentations needs to be achieved to enhance a model's performance in any given deep learning task.

abstract_zh: 增强是决定任何神经网络性能的关键因素，因为它们为模型提供了提高其性能的关键优势。他们提高模型稳健性的能力取决于两个因素，即模型架构和增强类型。增强对于数据集来说是非常特定的，并不是所有类型的增强都一定会对模型的性能产生积极的影响。因此，需要确定在各种数据集上始终表现良好的增强，并且对架构类型、卷积和所使用的参数数量保持不变。因此，需要确定在各种数据集上始终表现良好的增强，并且对架构类型、卷积和所使用的参数数量保持不变。本文评估了使用 3x3 和深度可分离卷积的参数对 MNIST、FMNIST 和 CIFAR10 数据集上不同增强技术的影响。统计证据表明，剪​​切和随机水平翻转等技术在参数低和高参数架构上都是一致的。深度可分离卷积由于能够创建更深的网络，因此在较高参数下的性能优于 3x3 卷积。增强缩小了 3x3 和深度可分离卷积之间的精度差距，从而确立了它们在模型泛化中的作用。在更高的数量下，增强不会对性能产生显着的变化。还评估了较高参数下多重增强的协同效应和较低参数下的拮抗效应。这项工作证明，需要在架构优势和增强之间实现微妙的平衡，以提高模型在任何给定深度学习任务中的性能。

AI.tldr: 分析数据增强在不同卷积神经网络架构和参数配置下的效果，评估其对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 确定在不同数据集和模型架构下均表现稳定的增强方法，以提升模型鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 在MNIST、FMNIST和CIFAR10数据集上，使用3x3卷积和深度可分离卷积，评估多种增强技术的效果，并通过统计分析比较其性能差异。
AI.result: Cutout和随机水平翻转在高低参数架构中表现稳定；深度可分离卷积在高参数下优于3x3卷积；增强技术缩小了两种卷积的准确率差距，但过多增强无显著提升，且存在参数依赖的协同与对抗效应。
AI.conclusion: 需在模型架构与增强策略间取得平衡，以优化深度学习任务中的模型性能。

result: Cutout和随机水平翻转在高低参数架构中表现稳定；深度可分离卷积在高参数下优于3x3卷积；增强技术缩小了两种卷积的准确率差距，但过多增强无显著提升，且存在参数依赖的协同与对抗效应。

search_text: Augmentations: An Insight into their Effectiveness on Convolution Neural Networks 增强：深入了解其在卷积神经网络上的有效性 Augmentations are the key factor in determining the performance of any neural network as they provide a model with a critical edge in boosting its performance. Their ability to boost a model's robustness depends on two factors, viz-a-viz, the model architecture, and the type of augmentations. Augmentations are very specific to a dataset, and it is not imperative that all kinds of augmentation would necessarily produce a positive effect on a model's performance. Hence there is a need to identify augmentations that perform consistently well across a variety of datasets and also remain invariant to the type of architecture, convolutions, and the number of parameters used. Hence there is a need to identify augmentations that perform consistently well across a variety of datasets and also remain invariant to the type of architecture, convolutions, and the number of parameters used. This paper evaluates the effect of parameters using 3x3 and depth-wise separable convolutions on different augmentation techniques on MNIST, FMNIST, and CIFAR10 datasets. Statistical Evidence shows that techniques such as Cutouts and Random horizontal flip were consistent on both parametrically low and high architectures. Depth-wise separable convolutions outperformed 3x3 convolutions at higher parameters due to their ability to create deeper networks. Augmentations resulted in bridging the accuracy gap between the 3x3 and depth-wise separable convolutions, thus establishing their role in model generalization. At higher number augmentations did not produce a significant change in performance. The synergistic effect of multiple augmentations at higher parameters, with antagonistic effect at lower parameters, was also evaluated. The work proves that a delicate balance between architectural supremacy and augmentations needs to be achieved to enhance a model's performance in any given deep learning task. 增强是决定任何神经网络性能的关键因素，因为它们为模型提供了提高其性能的关键优势。他们提高模型稳健性的能力取决于两个因素，即模型架构和增强类型。增强对于数据集来说是非常特定的，并不是所有类型的增强都一定会对模型的性能产生积极的影响。因此，需要确定在各种数据集上始终表现良好的增强，并且对架构类型、卷积和所使用的参数数量保持不变。因此，需要确定在各种数据集上始终表现良好的增强，并且对架构类型、卷积和所使用的参数数量保持不变。本文评估了使用 3x3 和深度可分离卷积的参数对 MNIST、FMNIST 和 CIFAR10 数据集上不同增强技术的影响。统计证据表明，剪​​切和随机水平翻转等技术在参数低和高参数架构上都是一致的。深度可分离卷积由于能够创建更深的网络，因此在较高参数下的性能优于 3x3 卷积。增强缩小了 3x3 和深度可分离卷积之间的精度差距，从而确立了它们在模型泛化中的作用。在更高的数量下，增强不会对性能产生显着的变化。还评估了较高参数下多重增强的协同效应和较低参数下的拮抗效应。这项工作证明，需要在架构优势和增强之间实现微妙的平衡，以提高模型在任何给定深度学习任务中的性能。 分析数据增强在不同卷积神经网络架构和参数配置下的效果，评估其对模型性能的影响。 Sabeesh Ethiraj,Bharath Kumar Bolla cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Min Peng,Chongyang Wang,Yuan Gao,Yu Shi,Xiang-Dong Zhou
title: Multilevel Hierarchical Network with Multiscale Sampling for Video Question Answering
title_zh: 用于视频问答的具有多尺度采样的多级分层网络
comment: Accepted by IJCAI 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.04735
comments: Accepted by IJCAI 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.04735
abstract: Video question answering (VideoQA) is challenging given its multimodal combination of visual understanding and natural language processing. While most existing approaches ignore the visual appearance-motion information at different temporal scales, it is unknown how to incorporate the multilevel processing capacity of a deep learning model with such multiscale information. Targeting these issues, this paper proposes a novel Multilevel Hierarchical Network (MHN) with multiscale sampling for VideoQA. MHN comprises two modules, namely Recurrent Multimodal Interaction (RMI) and Parallel Visual Reasoning (PVR). With a multiscale sampling, RMI iterates the interaction of appearance-motion information at each scale and the question embeddings to build the multilevel question-guided visual representations. Thereon, with a shared transformer encoder, PVR infers the visual cues at each level in parallel to fit with answering different question types that may rely on the visual information at relevant levels. Through extensive experiments on three VideoQA datasets, we demonstrate improved performances than previous state-of-the-arts and justify the effectiveness of each part of our method.
summary: Video question answering (VideoQA) is challenging given its multimodal combination of visual understanding and natural language processing. While most existing approaches ignore the visual appearance-motion information at different temporal scales, it is unknown how to incorporate the multilevel processing capacity of a deep learning model with such multiscale information. Targeting these issues, this paper proposes a novel Multilevel Hierarchical Network (MHN) with multiscale sampling for VideoQA. MHN comprises two modules, namely Recurrent Multimodal Interaction (RMI) and Parallel Visual Reasoning (PVR). With a multiscale sampling, RMI iterates the interaction of appearance-motion information at each scale and the question embeddings to build the multilevel question-guided visual representations. Thereon, with a shared transformer encoder, PVR infers the visual cues at each level in parallel to fit with answering different question types that may rely on the visual information at relevant levels. Through extensive experiments on three VideoQA datasets, we demonstrate improved performances than previous state-of-the-arts and justify the effectiveness of each part of our method.
abstract_zh: 视频问答 (VideoQA) 具有视觉理解和自然语言处理的多模态组合，因此具有挑战性。虽然大多数现有方法忽略了不同时间尺度的视觉外观运动信息，但尚不清楚如何将深度学习模型的多级处理能力与此类多尺度信息结合起来。针对这些问题，本文提出了一种新颖的具有多尺度采样的多级分层网络（MHN）用于VideoQA。 MHN 包括两个模块，即循环多模态交互（RMI）和并行视觉推理（PVR）。通过多尺度采样，RMI 迭代每个尺度的外观运动信息和问题嵌入的交互，以构建多级问题引导的视觉表示。因此，通过共享变压器编码器，PVR 并行推断每个级别的视觉线索，以适应回答可能依赖于相关级别的视觉信息的不同问题类型。通过对三个 VideoQA 数据集进行广泛的实验，我们展示了比以前最先进的技术更高的性能，并证明了我们方法每个部分的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多级分层网络（MHN）结合多尺度采样方法，用于改进视频问答（VideoQA）任务中的视觉-语言信息融合。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答方法未能有效整合不同时间尺度的视觉外观-运动信息，且缺乏深度学习模型在多尺度信息上的层次化处理能力。
AI.method: MHN包含两个模块：通过多尺度采样迭代交互视觉信息与问题嵌入的递归多模态交互模块（RMI），以及利用共享Transformer编码器并行推理各层级视觉线索的并行视觉推理模块（PVR）。
AI.result: 在三个视频问答数据集上的实验表明，该方法性能优于现有最先进模型，且验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MHN通过多尺度视觉信息与问题引导的层次化处理，显著提升了视频问答任务的准确性。
